Friend,

I have always been consistent in advocating for life and the rights of the unborn.

I'm so proud to announce that **I received an A+ Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life rating.**

[](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=a99e42662cc845d28449c3fa3b22a834&_e=hApamWUAwIFT945h-JWDFJa2c7IL98neHmXqObJS5fvnoUmNjaYNDzipBBjv7xXqu5R6idb8aTER1JMhqMNIZX-wuvIZj2CfAADl50BlHVIX6FeNLTJJ45RslQUINJXH92BZ-n0SmnSENqdGDzgBRmSe2WJBxeUDZm0ruWgly4EcrxO2xo250hu9juHeMcfCsk3xOs9bGQvvmoxsdRetW4QeOhvjJNYfB2wLR0ZlJWi5aAHHqY03S4L1-22ptk00byT13c7xWPsU5eVzKokU7NWxQqiqqVjrNz-6Wc5HD50shehMIiS48R4fxVYdW1SPfuN0EXgEFemjRktEyHNEYw%3D%3D)

Although the issue of abortion can be controversial, I believe it is fundamental to stand firm for life even when it isn't politically convenient.

I will ALWAYS be a champion for the unborn, and America is better served when our leaders stand together in this fight.

body:
| | | Peter, I talked with President Trump, and he had SO MANY wonderful things to say about the people of Missouri.

He knows we stand with him, and he’s so grateful for your support.

He mentioned he may hold a rally in Missouri, and asked if that’s something you’d like.

body:
My campaign manager called me this morning and let me know that our fundraising hasn’t been quite as strong this month.
#

Hey Peter, it’s Ruben.
I’m not afraid to ask for help when I need it.
And today, I need it.
My campaign manager called me this morning and let me know that our fundraising hasn’t been quite as strong this month.
Folks just aren’t chipping in as much as we need them to, and I’m having a hard time understanding why.
Kari Lake is as chaotic and extreme as ever, and the polls lately have her ahead of us.
Kyrsten Sinema is going to make a decision on running for re-election literally any day now, and when she does this race is going to change in a major way.
And in every campaign over the last six years, Arizona’s Senate race has been one of the most competitive and expensive in the country. It absolutely will be again in 2024.
So, whatever the reason is, we have to turn things around.
That’s why I’m asking you to join my top-supporters and make your first online donation. We can’t fall short in Arizona this year. Not with so much at stake.
[**So, if you care about this race and about holding control of the Senate, please: Chip in $3. I can’t do this without you.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb24.Oewwi1&refcode=em240211-2-120&t=1&akid=1949%2E734936%2EEXNDXX)

name: James Comer
subject: Between a rock and a hard place
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Comer for Congress**
body:
Biden’s presidency is on life support
| | [ ](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=50b262f957d74dbbb12284ec77d2d1fb&_e=nnBOqEsezojaJB0oerAIIsmOiWQIif2j4Vd6Sbic4WXJ7TzMggJKkZrO1JyCJ3o2S-oHGvKMX-Wl1ajxRAxpDyrHzugUWoLMFA3MsKdbyWYzfrZsw3bU3VlYrG3kPKRwhUNfZJGU4WRWO0evtbOglilzXyHWn-ptNnx0gmy-TPTWjsJm2QypJQ9tGUvPPLzcBHWoJ1HXpQwxJ8LgXJNDCyYfmG6VM2BJ56WCduXilVJbexLEMPYAVyYdChrJyzho2FOd7PRjI6uMohIZPfTqHjFkCaa5sESuG4U622-46okiOHqn9XZTIN9S5SPGmzsO)
---
Fellow American, **Joe Biden is between a rock and a hard place.** With my investigation heating up and his record low approval ratings sinking even further, _his presidency is on life support_. This month, both Joe Biden's brother James and his son Hunter will be giving sworn testimony to my committee. We have finally reached the inner circle of the Biden Crime Family, and they have a lot of questions to answer. Before they do, let's review what my investigation has exposed so far:
* We've shown that there was no "wall" between the Biden Vice Presidency and the Biden Family business schemes.

* **We 've discovered there were 40 FBI informants around the Biden Family over the past 15 years.**

* We've exposed the blatant lie that was the "ethics agreement" separating the White House from Hunter's shady art dealings.

* We've collected **170 suspicious activity reports** from bank accounts connected to the Biden Family.

* We've found over **20 Biden Family shell companies** that funneled money from all over the world into the pockets of the Biden's and their associates.

I could go on and on, but I think you get the point... **Hunter and James Biden have a lot to answer for, and the stakes have never been higher.** These depositions pose a massive threat to the Biden Crime Family, and it is absolutely essential we're ready to weather the barrage of attacks that they will launch in response.
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=50b262f957d74dbbb12284ec77d2d1fb&_e=nnBOqEsezojaJB0oerAIIsmOiWQIif2j4Vd6Sbic4WXJ7TzMggJKkZrO1JyCJ3o2S-oHGvKMX-Wl1ajxRAxpDyrHzugUWoLMFA3MsKdbyWYzfrZsw3bU3VlYrG3kPKRwhUNfZJGU4WRWO0evtbOglilzXyHWn-ptNnx0gmy-TPQ5bBnDOkF7iqkTr8zmdZ0SgnUsv3kYzka4EJHMC9FF_PFwHuw7BbpEv3GSvrym-JrkTIZ8HtsQ9D0lRe0KI3vEYR40x42FVUSOi0iphMHuRtJF4IG8euxkNEmAUJCJLElozB5OjKdiLRcIhrmccORa)
---
People will do just about anything when their back is up against the wall, and I know the Biden's are going to come after me with everything they have. [**I 'd be honored to have your support as I gear up for the fight of my life.**](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=50b262f957d74dbbb12284ec77d2d1fb&_e=nnBOqEsezojaJB0oerAIIsmOiWQIif2j4Vd6Sbic4WXJ7TzMggJKkZrO1JyCJ3o2S-oHGvKMX-Wl1ajxRAxpDyrHzugUWoLMFA3MsKdbyWYzfrZsw3bU3VlYrG3kPKRwhUNfZJGU4WRWO0evtbOglilzXyHWn-ptNnx0gmy-TPRIagbnZGoaGrS69kn8azyJpiig5xI65VbcMCD0CIkLqcwe2TcHgSH1ycW8D6lvZ9HKSOXVkM4SnAEENo5nXdpxfiGnphg0FSSrl0XiJZ2CJxdbc7SekmWvS3i3ME87BBcDmyhWSl18B2Z7FR8usn4p) _With Courage,_ James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee

Every major race ratings service, from Cook Political Report to CNN, is sounding the alarm: Arizona could be the state that decides our country's future. The situation is critical. Kari Lake is leading a campaign of chaos, gaining momentum every day. She's not just winning over Arizona's GOP; she's got the backing of the national party, Trump, and the entire MAGA movement. Trump sees Arizona as his first step back to the White House, and with the Senate hanging in the balance, we can't afford to lose. Your support is crucial in this fight. name: =?utf-8?Q?Jesse?=
subject: This is hard work but I do it for us
body:
Jesse James knows the value of a hard days work. He should, he's been working non-stop since he was 15. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mullenformontana/this-is-hard-work-but-i-do-it-for-us?e=805e709ff8)
---
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=ef3cb24217&e=805e709ff8)
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=4ee1e8f721&e=805e709ff8)
_The Mullen Brothers & Spike - Jesse James, left, Lloyd, center, and Louis, right, and Jesse’s childhood pet, Spike._
Hey team, it’s Jesse James,
My brothers and I didn’t have a lot growing up, and with both our parents working full-time, we had to rely on each other.
Being the oldest of three latchkey kids, I grew up fast and learned to put out fires (literally, a couple of times).
[**Will you chip in $10?**](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=3fbd07bac8&e=805e709ff8)
But that made me into the man I am today. My parents worked hard to provide for us, my mother was a nurse in the maternity ward, and my father was a newspaper reporter.
It taught me the value of hard work – I haven’t been unemployed a day since turning 15, sometimes working two or three jobs to provide for my family. I’ve been a roofer, lifeguard, bartender, journalist, and more.
[**Your donations keep this campaign going.**](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=33f9735813&e=805e709ff8)
I’m taking that work ethic to the campaign trail and to the Capitol. Can I count on you to help?

clean_body: Jesse James knows the value of a hard days work. He should, he's been working non-stop since he was 15. | | | | | The Mullen Brothers & Spike - Jesse James, left, Lloyd, center, and Louis, right, and Jesse’s childhood pet, Spike. Hey team, it’s Jesse James, My brothers and I didn’t have a lot growing up, and with both our parents working full-time, we had to rely on each other. Being the oldest of three latchkey kids, I grew up fast and learned to put out fires (literally, a couple of times). But that made me into the man I am today. My parents worked hard to provide for us, my mother was a nurse in the maternity ward, and my father was a newspaper reporter. It taught me the value of hard work – I haven’t been unemployed a day since turning 15, sometimes working two or three jobs to provide for my family. I’ve been a roofer, lifeguard, bartender, journalist, and more. I’m taking that work ethic to the campaign trail and to the Capitol. Can I count on you to help? | The Mullen Brothers - Jesse James as the pilot, Louis is wing walking, and Lloyd playing co-pilot. This year is flying by. We’re only 267 days away from the Election! I’ll pilot the plane, but need you to get off the ground. | | | | | Copyright (C) 2024 Mullen for Secretary of State. All rights reserved.

subject: the GOP’s plot to SHUT DOWN the post office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
please submit your response right away:
| **Republicans Ramp Up Attacks on USPS, Vote-by-Mail Ahead of 2024 Election** Vote-by-mail has expanded voting rights access to millions of people — and played a HUGE part in President Biden’s 2020 victory.

**But Republicans are already seeking their revenge... They would love nothing more than to DESTROY the Postal Service entirely!**

**And with Donald Trump’s handpicked Postmaster General Louis DeJoy still calling the shots,_they could get away with it!_** [**_So we need to know where you stand immediately:_

My campaign relies on $5 donations, not million-dollar checks, friend. Now, I'm proud of that, but it also means I need folks like you chipping in what you can, when you can, to power our campaign to victory.

Unfortunately, a recent poll shows me neck and neck with my millionaire GOP opponents. So my team just set an urgent 24-hour goal to raise $100,000** to make sure we have the resources we need to fight back and pull ahead. But if we fail to reach this, we could fall behind, just as the election year ramps up. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sherrod Brown and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Look, winning this race will be anything but easy: Mitch McConnell has personally named me a top target for defeat – and my GOP opponents are writing themselves multimillion-dollar checks to try and buy this seat. My campaign relies on $5 donations, not million-dollar checks, friend. Now, I'm proud of that, but it also means I need folks like you chipping in what you can, when you can, to power our campaign to victory. So if I'm going to surge ahead in the polls, I need everyone reading this email to help me reach my fundraising goal in the next 24 hours. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sherrod Brown and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for chipping in. – Sherrod | | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. name: General Wesley Clark, U.S. Army (Ret.)
subject: NATO
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
NATO is not a suggestion. It is an iron-clad commitment. It has kept western democracies — including our own — safe for 75 years.
#
Derek: This is Wesley Clark, retired U.S. Army General and former Supreme Allied Commander of NATO during the Kosovo War.
NATO is not a suggestion. It is an iron-clad commitment. It has kept western democracies — including our own — safe for 75 years.
After 9/11, every NATO nation mobilized to come to our defense and fought alongside us to crush al-Qaeda. They didn’t ask for money or put conditionals on their help. They supported us in our time of need.
Yesterday, Donald Trump publicly signaled that he would not come to the aid of NATO member states if Putin attacked. In fact, he said he would encourage the Russians to do “whatever the hell they want.”
That isn’t just breaking a promise we have made to our allies, and it isn’t just a threat to European nations. It encourages global destabilization and World War III.
A conflict like that won’t be limited to Europe. It will hit our shores and cost American lives.
It’s an appalling statement that could only come from a deranged and twisted mind. I do not say this lightly: A second Trump presidency would put the lives of every American, both in uniform and civilian, at severe risk.
That’s why I’m asking you to make a donation to VoteVets. We have to do whatever it takes to defeat Donald Trump, and VoteVets will spend millions of dollars achieving that goal. We beat him once, and we will do it again.
**[Please, make a donation to VoteVets today and do your part to end Trump's march back to the White House.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-feb24.ZR8EG7&refcode=em240211-2-30&t=1&akid=24894%2E3013755%2Eo6q18c)

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

Groundbreaking studies have revealed a brand-new remedy to the root cause of swollen feet ... Your top drawer is full of compression socks... You’ve tried the dietary changes recommended by a friend or doctor... Yet you look down... And you STILL see swollen, puffy, deformed feet and ankles. You feel defeated. You’re ready to give up. Just accept that this is a part of aging and something you must learn to ignore... But I’ve got GREAT NEWS... name: Candace Owens, BLEXIT
subject: Thanking police officers
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDYzNzkifQ/fo2NjR_bUlbb5EqEh6i75w)
---
Fellow American, **I am so grateful for our police officers. ** As an American who believes in law and order, truth, and justice, I have always stood with the public servants who protect our communities. **[Please join me in thanking uniformed men and women by signing our ‘Back the Blue Petition’ and letting brave officers know that we are grateful for their service and sacrifice.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDYzNzkifQ/3mk6oBkKRajGYa4Q0JVZEQ)**
---
[**Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDYzNzkifQ/PQMcQPPnAhcXAqGjtcZUFQ)
---
Unfortunately, a few years ago, radicals began propelling criminals into heroes overnight and campaigning to “ _defund the police_.” I refuse to accept that we must cater to the bottom denominator of our society and that the black community must fight and scream and demand support for the people in our community who are up to no good. That’s one of the reasons I founded BLEXIT — an organization focused on shifting the culture in Black America as well as educating and uplifting minorities through educational programs and acts of community service. **Around the nation, our BLEXIT chapters have supported local officers, while so many others have turned their backs on those who serve our communities. ** **[To join these chapters and stand with police officers, please sign the national petition today.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDYzNzkifQ/G4_ItxgnMM__wSw06ITqOg)**
---
[**Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDYzNzkifQ/5xAdQUZ4U10UQ-wTzu-taA)
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDYzNzkifQ/tNWFaIaL3_C8xmFLqta3gQ)
---
_This summer, BLEXIT Maryland spent the day giving back to the Baltimore Police Department and learned some history about the city’s police force._
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDYzNzkifQ/8H1cvAbCh_9ykf1bp7rDrA)
---
_The first state chapter — BLEXIT North Carolina — paid a visit to local officers in July. Our State Director showered them with thank-you notes and delicious food as a token of BLEXIT’s appreciation._
---
**[If you ‘Back the Blue’ — and believe that we must support local heroes — please sign the national petition right away.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDYzNzkifQ/sl7P_33UCLITG6t7oJ9x3w)** While the ‘defund the police’ crowd wants us to think minorities stand with them — polls show that the vast majority of black voters (more than 80%) want police funding to stay the same or even increase. We’ve been sold a lot of lies by anti-police radicals — those lies have been a detriment to Black American culture, the country as a whole, and the police officers who fight for justice every day. **We must stop the deception that is harming urban communities and demeaning police around the nation. ** If you are an American, no matter what color you are, you should want law and you should want order. That is the way forward. **[Join me in letting our police officers know that you support law and order, justice, and their valiant efforts to keep our communities safe.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDYzNzkifQ/52HEOqnbgedUIP7p8XIAaQ)**
---
[**Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDYzNzkifQ/4Reh8C53mxOI7DgONn_GmA)
---
Candace OwensChair of BLEXITPowered by Turning Point USA
---
Freedom First Project P.O. Box 523692 Springfield, VA 22152 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDQzLTVmNjViODI4ZGFmYzQzZDc5MDU5NjliNjM2YmMyZDg5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/7VMyAa4dG2NobJY-p1qtFg) to unsubscribe.
---
clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | Fellow American, I am so grateful for our police officers. As an American who believes in law and order, truth, and justice, I have always stood with the public servants who protect our communities. Unfortunately, a few years ago, radicals began propelling criminals into heroes overnight and campaigning to “ defund the police.” I refuse to accept that we must cater to the bottom denominator of our society and that the black community must fight and scream and demand support for the people in our community who are up to no good. That’s one of the reasons I founded BLEXIT — an organization focused on shifting the culture in Black America as well as educating and uplifting minorities through educational programs and acts of community service. Around the nation, our BLEXIT chapters have supported local officers, while so many others have turned their backs on those who serve our communities. This summer, BLEXIT Maryland spent the day giving back to the Baltimore Police Department and learned some history about the city’s police force. The first state chapter — BLEXIT North Carolina — paid a visit to local officers in July. Our State Director showered them with thank-you notes and delicious food as a token of BLEXIT’s appreciation. While the ‘defund the police’ crowd wants us to think minorities stand with them — polls show that the vast majority of black voters (more than 80%) want police funding to stay the same or even increase. We’ve been sold a lot of lies by anti-police radicals — those lies have been a detriment to Black American culture, the country as a whole, and the police officers who fight for justice every day. We must stop the deception that is harming urban communities and demeaning police around the nation. If you are an American, no matter what color you are, you should want law and you should want order. That is the way forward. Candace OwensChair of BLEXITPowered by Turning Point USA Freedom First Project P.O. Box 523692 Springfield, VA 22152 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

Democrat-run Washington D.C. receives more 911 calls than any U.S. state, according to research by the Schiller Kessler Group (SKG). name: Robertson For Congress
subject: How We Win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robertson for Congress](https://r20
body:
We proved we can beat Titus. We beat Titus in Henderson. We beat Titus in Boulder City. We beat Titus by 20 points with in-person voters.
| | | |
---
# How We Win in 2024
---
By Mark Robertson, Candidate for Nevada's First Congressional District
In the 2022 election, Dina Titus squeaked by with just 51.6% of the vote - the lowest percentage of all other Democrats who won Congressional elections in Nevada.
We proved we can beat Titus. We beat Titus in Henderson. We beat Titus in Boulder City. We beat Titus by 20 points with in-person voters. Her very narrow victory was only because of Democrat ballot harvesting and mail-in voting. A [recent study by Heartland/Rasmussen](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bvruBHNSqjARiLxxe_XqXwxwq23h_Oz6oa7dffrgC8OzAm-o65jLeX9xLD_gX1UFsMSfN5ycC_d0JC4tNbEPg4HkG8SmGkU2f_GRHBNOUjZb80P7_kGZlOKr5CzYM1HzxisSpBp6wVJT6tqVDRzyDszzTj8rAsyyU8vug8neEfJAjPMz_IN2FNZxmA8auL3nW9jCmu0Zho2yaPC-sNuGEIx24gC_iUq6srZtrSNuGJEle5AJTcNTetITWfGS5hfCVF0G1095nV35qNJX4MP9pjuzt0XDSSSdIHrrsiIThfoTxX2Uoadon4kzNXfHOnJujDBEVXmONpE=&c=TAQBid0Q1jdWfvR5udIk5kE8I7c3GlpuWs1Ip_kjtqWrkwGaUq-CWg==&ch=0pz8wxDpPEcKa5W9jowY8w5MVz4qRPE1hcC20NWBn9pgfNTjCIrOtA==) reports that at least 20% of mail-in ballots were cast illegally. Without mail-in ballots, we would have coasted to a big victory. That would have been consistent with polls that had me up by as much as 12% in the last week of the election.
Like Ronald Reagan and Abraham Lincoln, who also lost their first elections, I will use the lessons learned in 2022 to win in 2024. Here's how...
* Republicans must embrace early voting, mail-in voting, and voter assistance. Until we can change the laws, we will use them to our advantage. Republican leaders, at all levels, are encouraging us to "bank our vote" by voting early.
* Personal contact with Republicans who didn't vote. Titus' margin of victory over me and the Libertarian candidate was just over 7,000 votes, yet 46,000 registered Republicans did not vote. We have their contact information and an army of volunteers to encourage them to vote in '24.
* Capitalize on our momentum. Democrats are not excited about a dazed and confused Joe Biden or his strongest supporter, Dina Titus. Republicans are excited and energized to support President Donald Trump and expand our majority in Congress. We will capitalize on this enthusiasm and momentum by getting more people involved in our Get Out the Vote (GOTV) efforts.
* Expand our base. In 2022, we spent a lot of time in our Hispanic communities. A large percentage of the votes I received came from independent and non-partisan voters. We will double our outreach efforts to bring voters into our coalition.
The last election was the first time I've run for public office. Voters now know who I am. We will capitalize on the goodwill, name recognition, and lessons learned in 2022 to win in 2024.
Please reply to this email to join our Army of Volunteers to put America first and take back our country!

[Click here to compare two Republicans running for Congress in Nevada.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bvruBHNSqjARiLxxe_XqXwxwq23h_Oz6oa7dffrgC8OzAm-o65jLeX9xLD_gX1UFqjE4aaaTlY17tC18SjFqF5ZCM_oefSiDbP0vrv5T1_PEGYQ4tw1Y0HBpv9KNVfIvnF55HpFWYkhH_ZMgjdyktw==&c=TAQBid0Q1jdWfvR5udIk5kE8I7c3GlpuWs1Ip_kjtqWrkwGaUq-CWg==&ch=0pz8wxDpPEcKa5W9jowY8w5MVz4qRPE1hcC20NWBn9pgfNTjCIrOtA==)

Without mail-in ballots, we would have coasted to a big victory. That would have been consistent with polls that had me up by as much as 12% in the last week of the election. Like Ronald Reagan and Abraham Lincoln, who also lost their first elections, I will use the lessons learned in 2022 to win in 2024. Here's how... Republicans must embrace early voting, mail-in voting, and voter assistance. Until we can change the laws, we will use them to our advantage. Republican leaders, at all levels, are encouraging us to "bank our vote" by voting early. Personal contact with Republicans who didn't vote. Titus' margin of victory over me and the Libertarian candidate was just over 7,000 votes, yet 46,000 registered Republicans did not vote. We have their contact information and an army of volunteers to encourage them to vote in '24. Capitalize on our momentum. Democrats are not excited about a dazed and confused Joe Biden or his strongest supporter, Dina Titus. Republicans are excited and energized to support President Donald Trump and expand our majority in Congress. We will capitalize on this enthusiasm and momentum by getting more people involved in our Get Out the Vote (GOTV) efforts. Expand our base. In 2022, we spent a lot of time in our Hispanic communities. A large percentage of the votes I received came from independent and non-partisan voters. We will double our outreach efforts to bring voters into our coalition. The last election was the first time I've run for public office. Voters now know who I am. We will capitalize on the goodwill, name recognition, and lessons learned in 2022 to win in 2024. Please reply to this email to join our Army of Volunteers to put America first and take back our country! == | == | == | == Mark Robertson retired from the Army. Use of his rank does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Military.* | | | | | | | Robertson For Congress | PO Box 750433, Las Vegas, NV 89136 | | Sent by mailto:mark@robertsonforcongress.com

name: Mazi Pilip
subject: Breaking News: New York special election declared
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazi Pilip for Congress
body:
My name is Mazi Pilip- I’m the GOP candidate in the NY special election
My name is Mazi Pilip- I’m the GOP candidate in the NY special election

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39117%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cqa5SNbD6K9uW4sXJsrCPg&sysid=1)
---

Friend,

I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress.

My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short!

I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared.

If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority.

I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family.

Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed.

They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things.

And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials.

They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative.

And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them.

The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me.

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39118%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=R4q1a0%2bcc9JmSZFal6TxCg&sysid=1)
---

I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39119%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8cwv4uym8aMAfhQHBUfiFw&sysid=1)
---

Early voting begins in just a few days. That makes this the most important race in the nation right now.

I hope you'll step up & stand with me today to defeat the Democrats & hold the House Majority.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39119%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8cwv4uym8aMAfhQHBUfiFw&sysid=1)
---

And if I can ever help you the way you've helped me, please just say the word.

All the best,

Mazi Melesa Pilip
GOP Nominee
Special Election NY-03

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39110%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FNKRaE0qwoncFDWbED8MTw&sysid=1)
---
|
---

---

Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Steve Garvey
subject: Defeat Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vswWBtDiNf

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oswWBtDiNf

Dear
Fellow Patriot,
If you
opened this email because you remember my playing days with the
Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.

Having
you and all of America's baseball fans cheering for me and Davey
Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we
battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees...
...well,
as they say, "Those were the days."
But this
email isn't about baseball. In fact, it's a email I never thought
I'd be writing to you.

Today,
I'm asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a
seat in the United States Senate.
Today,
I'm asking you to help me start a Republican Comeback Rally that
folks will be talking about for generations to come.
Because
when you think about it, those 'good-ol' days of the 1970s
weren't as good as we tend to first remember.
Baseball
was just a welcome distraction from the gloom and malaise that
had settled on our country thanks to one failed Democrat policy
after another.
I'm
running for the United States Senate because 2024 America is
starting to look a lot like 1970s America.
You
remember what it was like:
- Not
only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could
only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license
plate numbers. Remember?
- Eleven
Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in
Munich by terrorists. Remember?
-
Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists
in Iran. Remember??
Democrat
policies had brought America to its knees.
And now,
as Yogi Berra used to say, "It's déjà vu all over again."
There's
fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime,
homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding
and for the first time causing more people to leave California.
Joe
Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one
bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to
say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and
dependent.
And I
wouldn't blame you if you said, "Steve, I'm afraid America's best
days are behind us."
But
listen, here's something I also want you to remember...
We
Republicans pulled our country out of that 1970's Democratic
malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.
We put
classic conservative values at the heart of everything we did.
And
America became a shining city upon a hill once more.
We can do
that again.
It starts
by stunning the Democrats with a Senate win in California.
But
there's no way I can pull it off without you.
That's
why I'm asking you to rush in your $35 donation today
I'm sorry
for the urgency but the primary is in less than three months and
here's where things stand...
In March,
I need to be one of the top 2 vote-getters to get to the November
general election.
Adam
Schiff will probably take the #1 spot. And polls have me hot on
his heels for the #2 spot.
Once
we're passed the primary, I know with your help, I can beat him
in November.
Why?
First...
I've lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can
tell you -- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've
never seen before.
They are
hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters
in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of
California...
I know we
can turn this historic opportunity into a Republican win.
Second...
you know I'm not a career politician.
But I do
have the one thing a Republican needs to get elected in
California...
...name
recognition.
I'm no
Schwarzenegger and I'd certainly never dare compare myself to
President Reagan.
But
California voters know me.
And Adam
Schiff and the Democrats are shaking in their boots seeing how
quickly I rose in the polls after entering the race.
As I'm
writing you this email, there are just a few percentage points
separating us.
We've got
a shot -- a very real shot -- of landing smack behind Schiff in
the primary so we can go on to beat him in the general election.
But there
are just three months left until the primary.
And the
giant Democrat political machine is going to use every second of
that time trying to bury me and our common sense message.
When you
rush back your Garvey for Senate campaign contribution of $35 or
more...
...you're
helping fund ads, appearances, events, fliers, door knockers,
EVERYTHING that blankets California with the message:
You don't
have to accept failed Democrat policies that make all of us less
safe, less prosperous, and less free.
This race
is the toughest in the nation.
But they
say the hardest thing to do in sports is hit a 95-mph fastball.
And you
know I've done that plenty of times.
Now I'm
ready to do the hardest thing in American politics -- win in
California as a common sense Republican.
But I
can't do it without you.
I'm
fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake
-- I'm not just taking the field for Californians.
When we
win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical
Adam Schiff...
...we
start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country
desperately needs.
It all
depends on you!
You can
do nothing and continue to suffer the agony of defeat. Or you can
step up to the plate with me and take a swing for the thrill of
victory. Please join me. Because when we win in California, we're
winning for all of America.
Thank you
and God Bless,

Steve
Garvey

Republican for United States Senate

P.S. It's
the bottom of the 9th and Republicans desperately need a homerun.
We simply can't let another election slip through our fingers
while Democrats go on destroying our country. With your help, I
know we can beat Adam Schiff in California and start the
Republican Comeback Rally America needs. But the primary is in
just three months. So please rush campaign contribution of $35 or
more as soon as you can. Thank you! -Steve

DONATE

PAID FOR
BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 25, 2023.

name: Steve Garvey
subject: Will you help me strike out this liberal lineup?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvp4e1sajojmavjejssii7vfrrvje7eopgl2t9d0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37ctimeoj1cdh2bs)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhivio0p5i7a849vfsss1iu6ovtp1adtfve87aeg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37ctimeoj1cdh2bs)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.**[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3er42samhvc9thp845a0lu7ar1vdn350ivjb8to_rp22sh2s8i6eo37ctimeoj1cdh2bs)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9hsf2hvqtlegcdb5tmddqcssst17isi9emll288_rp22sh2s8i6eo37ctimeoj1cdh2bs)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdrefddrul5p5vdhu2jqi5ncqe05mc6mjbqa9lig_rp22sh2s8i6eo37ctimeoj1cdh2bs)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhk2ep58nv02q49vra6m07odpkg4kjs1uina6mq0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37ctimeoj1cdh2bs)
---
| | |
---
|
---
**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California.I’ve been fortunate to wear many hats in life – from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference.In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It’s time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
---
[**More About Me**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9m12jciunbccooqal6tfjcoe2tkdgr9fubk8cog_rp22sh2s8i6eo37ctimeoj1cdh2bs)
---
[**Join My Campaign**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm0kjaea5rcv1c2dhngd1tg4m34pb3obqin6o15g_rp22sh2s8i6eo37ctimeoj1cdh2bs)
---

---
| | **PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE**
---
PO Box 532389Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389
---

Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day. In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again. | | With deepest appreciation, Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate | | | | | | | MY VISION My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California.I’ve been fortunate to wear many hats in life – from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference.In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It’s time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future. | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389 | | | 1600 Daily PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

subject: Crouch draws 300+ attendees for first 'Women for Crouch' event
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
Suzanne Crouch spoke on her plan to Axe The Tax, protecting Indiana land, mental health, calling for an audit of the FSSA and more.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/crouchforindiana/crouch-draws-300-attendees-for-first-women-for-crouch-event?e=8f9fef7158)
https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-suzanne-crouch/web?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4f5e84876e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_09_03_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4f5e84876e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Feb. 9, 2024

MEDIA CONTACT
Robert Vane
robert@veteranstrategies.com
Suzanne Crouch draws 300+ attendees for first 'Women for Crouch' event

(INDIANAPOLIS, IN)— Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch, a Republican candidate for Governor in Indiana, hosted a successful "Women for Crouch" event on Thursday evening at Meridian Hills Country Club.

More than 300 women representing diverse backgrounds attended the event supporting Crouch's bid to become Indiana's first female governor (https://crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4f5e84876e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_09_03_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4f5e84876e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) . The event showcased the unity and determination of Hoosier women ready for change.

During the event, Elaine Bedel (https://www.in.gov/iddc/executive-staff/elaine-bedel/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4f5e84876e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_09_03_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4f5e84876e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , Secretary and Chief Executive Officer of the Indiana Destination Development Organization, posed questions to Suzanne Crouch, providing attendees with valuable insights into Crouch's vision for the state.

Additionally, Indianapolis-based philanthropist Marianne Glick delivered remarks in support of Suzanne, underscoring the significance of women supporting women in leadership roles (https://crouchforindiana.com/meet-suzanne/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4f5e84876e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_09_03_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4f5e84876e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .
Crouch addressed a myriad of crucial topics during the event, outlining her ambitious plan to eliminate Indiana's individual income tax, aptly named "Axe The Tax (https://crouchforindiana.com/axe-the-tax/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4f5e84876e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_09_03_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4f5e84876e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ," with a strategic focus on driving economic growth and returning financial freedom to Hoosiers burdened by Bidenomics. Furthermore, she articulated her strategies to streamline government operations, emphasizing efficiency and cost-effectiveness.

In her remarks, Crouch underscored the importance of preserving Indiana's agricultural sector, an essential pillar of the state's economy and national security (https://crouchforindiana.com/protect-indiana/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4f5e84876e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_09_03_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4f5e84876e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

"We feed a lot of people, and that is extremely important, not just for the economy, but we want to be a state and a country that is not dependent on foreign countries for our food. It's about food security, and it's also about national security," said Crouch, who serves as Indiana's Secretary of Agriculture
Crouch described a recent instance (https://www.newsnationnow.com/world/china/chinas-us-land-grab-key-issue-elections/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4f5e84876e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_09_03_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4f5e84876e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) where she led the fight to protect critical land (https://www.newsnationnow.com/world/china/chinas-us-land-grab-key-issue-elections/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4f5e84876e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_09_03_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4f5e84876e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) near an Indiana military base.

"3,900 acres were going up for sale next to Crane Navel Warfare Center and near Glendora Lake, one of two deep lakes in the U.S. where they do underwater weapons testing, so being able to put together a deal to purchase that land and put it under DNR, we were able to protect that land and our secrets," Crouch said. "Those foreign countries, they can buy our crops, but we don't want them to buy our farmland."

Crouch is also having a study done (https://crouchforindiana.com/protect-indiana/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4f5e84876e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_09_03_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4f5e84876e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to identify all the lost farmland in the state, who it has been lost to, and if they are foreign adversaries.

Moreover, Crouch shared her deeply personal connection (https://www.indianapolismonthly.com/news-and-opinion/politics/out-of-darkness/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4f5e84876e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_09_03_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4f5e84876e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) with mental illness and addiction, drawing from her family's history, including how her daughter is 16 years sober and bipolar, and advocating for increased accessibility to vital resources for those grappling with similar challenges.

"My daughter has said many times that she is alive today because of us, but what about the parents who can't do that and who don't have the resources to help their kids who are struggling? As governor, making resources affordable and accessible will be a priority for me because mental illness and addiction are truly one of the biggest challenges that face us today," Crouch said.
Crouch also addressed her ongoing fight (https://indianacapitalchronicle.com/briefs/crouch-calls-for-fssa-audit-following-1b-shortfall-medicaid-changes/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4f5e84876e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_09_03_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4f5e84876e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) with the Family and Social Services Administration (FSSA), demanding accountability and transparency in the wake of a $1 billion Medicaid overspend.

She called for a comprehensive audit (https://indianacapitalchronicle.com/briefs/crouch-calls-for-fssa-audit-following-1b-shortfall-medicaid-changes/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4f5e84876e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_09_03_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4f5e84876e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) of FSSA and urged the agency to halt cuts to critical programs, particularly the attendant care program for parents of medically complex children, to ensure uninterrupted care for vulnerable families.

"First of all, how do you make a $1 billion error (https://indianacapitalchronicle.com/briefs/crouch-calls-for-fssa-audit-following-1b-shortfall-medicaid-changes/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4f5e84876e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_09_03_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4f5e84876e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ? I️ recently met with parents who have children who will be adversely affected by these cuts. I'm talking about children who are severely disabled with complex medical needs. Children with tracheotomies, children with feed tubes, children on ventilators. These are kids who need 24/7 care," Crouch said. "These parents want answers to their questions because they said if they're not able to take care of their children and be paid, who is going to take care of them? The last time we checked, there's a shortage of pediatric nurses and health care professionals all over the state of Indiana, so who is going to come in and take care of these kids?"

Suzanne Crouch's gubernatorial campaign continues to gather momentum, with upcoming events and initiatives on the horizon, including her "Community Cares" tour (https://www.greenfieldreporter.com/2024/02/02/crouch-meets-with-hancock-county-officials-to-discuss-policies/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4f5e84876e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_09_03_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4f5e84876e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) aimed at empowering local leaders across the state.

###
To learn more about how Suzanne is the only conservative Republican fighting China, proposing an elimination of Indiana’s individual income tax, and casting the key votes to protect our most vulnerable Hoosiers, please visit her web site at www.crouchforindiana.com.

============================================================
Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com (mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Your America
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39128%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EbSrpk6iQZjbc3NQ0E7G3w&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39129%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PWob1fqdUa9sa3KD6VhwwA&sysid=1) That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39120%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NSwM1M6EwKFIOkpsWKmkzA&sysid=1)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Your America News
---

name: ICYMI News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3mv6p2ia5sl24c7rj6gjia3684ijfhjhv9l7r48_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cthm0o74chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z41p98lierr505pilau1kek1vk2e3mqp52qpj6s8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cthm0o74chh2bs) That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7r161uj9femcl67p3mpoktkm1hirl0ss6kagu8g_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cthm0o74chh2bs)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

subject: Events, Message from RFK, Jr., and Merch
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
We've got exciting news about upcoming events and rallies and a special message from RFK Jr. you won't want to miss.

|
---
| | | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_12_24_nd1&n=1)
---
|
---
Upcoming Events: An Exclusive Invitation to a Memorable Experience!
Don't miss out on an opportunity to embark on an extraordinary journey with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. and connect with our future President. [RSVP now!](https://www.kennedy24.com/events?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_12_24_nd1&n=2)
|
* * *
---
[Upper Saddle River, New Jersey](https://www.kennedy24.com/bergen-county?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_12_24_nd1&n=3) \- Saturday, February 17th at 6:30 PM
Attend an exclusive event in the Metropolitan NYC area, offering a rare opportunity for an intimate Q&A session with RFK, Jr. with hors d’oeuvres, cocktails, and photo opportunities.
[Brooklyn, New York](https://www.kennedy24.com/brooklyn-bhm-event?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_12_24_nd1&n=4) \- Sunday, February 18th at 1:30 PM
Come join us for a Black History Month celebration where Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. will present his plan for Black America. This event will feature a round table, African performers, and an interview with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. followed by Q&A.
[Los Angeles, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/night-of-laughter-la?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_12_24_nd1&n=5) \- Wednesday, February 21rd at 7:30 PM
Experience an unforgettable evening of laughter as Cheryl Hines hosts _A Night of Laughter with RFK, Jr._ Secure your tickets now to enjoy performances by Tim Dillon, Rob Schneider, and more!
[Newport Beach, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/newport-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_12_24_nd1&n=6) \- Saturday, February 24th at 7:30 PM
Join us at a private venue in the heart of Newport Beach for a special event. Experience an intimate Q&A session with RFK, Jr. while enjoying hors d'oeuvres, cocktails, and memorable photo opportunities.
[Las Vegas, Nevada](https://www.kennedy24.com/march-las-vegas-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_12_24_nd1&n=7) \- Friday, March 8th at 6:00 PM
Please join Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. and Cheryl Hines at this in-person fundraising event which includes hors d’ oeuvres and cocktails, remarks from the candidate, Q&A, and a photo opportunity.
[Austin, Texas](https://www.kennedy24.com/austin-private-dinner?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_12_24_nd1&n=8) \- Friday, March 15th at 6:30 PM
Along with a very special dinner with RFK, Jr., this exclusive gathering includes business leaders, entrepreneurs, leading podcast hosts, media personalities, celebrities, and industry influencers.
|
* * *
---
RFK Jr.: The Globalists Must Be Stopped—Now!
The 250+ billionaires and millionaires who gathered at the annual World Economic Forum meeting in Switzerland this month want to commoditize our lands, our waters, our homes, our workers, our public health, and even our children.
The corporate elites’ scheme will drain what’s left in your bank account and strip-mine the beleaguered middle class of its remaining equity. Their plan is insidious—and I plan to stop it.
**My fundraising report to the FEC is due February 29th and we need to show just how strong our movement is every month.** [By donating to my campaign today,](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_12_24_nd1&n=9) **you’re telling the globalists loud and clear: We’re not going to take it anymore.**
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/globalists-stopped-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_12_24_nd1&n=10)
|
* * *
---
| Discover our latest [Kennedy 2024 merchandise](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=92YYov9O17-vE3x_2FgMqY7clOS3V4M0N_bQWU4eY8DgZmNXgu4AttV9MFg0k6JcR2JpbU0SSSY73_ba7eAF81VBGDm_EG8iBpER_1eW0Ik5ag5GQ5A2g3b60ZgoTu_b1kzAoQ1D2o2OIfYbyzYf8Q&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_12_24_nd1&n=11), suitable for any occasion. Delve into the unique appeal of limited edition items that reflect the essence of this historic campaign. Immerse yourself in the spirit of change and progress, and join a movement that holds the power to shape the future.
---
---

Thank you for your continued support. Every dollar you give moves us one step closer to the White House.

name: American Briefing
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zocahuvup3a9m2b0pulb0rd00a162761qjg5hb60_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cthm0o74cth2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zg1qqa14ie77pmkijrf10ndrubg5p9v3k4ssn9o0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cthm0o74cth2bs) That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z150o9l3i9lfj2dlnqg6u5rdfu5jn44g0hs4p4po_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cthm0o74cth2bs)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc053qm114b58it5r8867rmrv14q78hv7dbo6t5g_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cthm0o74c9h2bs)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Why Congress Must Pass Strong Border Security
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kdKThNlee0yX-LhDKe0S3QXIrvX276CcpmhbJ4dGxDvPnbPsMm7eRF3RjqsgpvbHsV0NCkWwOw8QsC62DS1KAKLml-Gvd5nKoH7MouqmGl3ddmgCsdMxwOB0ZI16A7sjuFD8XF-eY19Qsd6iojax3fPxapbg1TwuOACTLAQIBy4EVpqxJXuURLfEGxjHtAZ_LvHwkN5U8Kbxt52jZ7XsEw45xErtU9-ZSfJ4cSMJ0BEqBnMwdWppmkBxcZQ5e5N1yWvhflclt4Ncwjc6sDoabjTTvri4mPRYX9i6RUzexAGFEDmeFX2j1jbn8OvZPBjMz6e4rFJIu84QCZF9PGBEhWPeHJj8Gf4Z&c=ycTX90fLboc8f2vhKY6iS6J8hWcQzj8dc-2BI9DaebntAfqJP2qgrw==&ch=FZKcjQaA5H4bMVBIC27fECW0Dnnn9nLe3h4PjVo7Uq_f5jQxgOlhUg==)
---
|
Peter –
Last week, I called on Congress to pass the House border security bill - H.R. 2 - in tandem with the supplemental spending bill the Senate passed that did not include any money for border security. I also explained why I voted to impeach Alejandro Mayorkas and called on the Biden Administration to combat threats from TikTok.
We have our primaries in Texas next month, and I need your help to win re-election. I'm running for re-election because I believe this country is still worth fighting for even in our toxic political environment. Any donation to my campaign - even a small amount - will go a long way to help ensure I can continue fighting on the issues that matter to you. You can donate at the following link, and I am forever grateful for your support:
---
| | | [SUPPORT MY 2024 RE-ELECTION CAMPAIGN](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kdKThNlee0yX-LhDKe0S3QXIrvX276CcpmhbJ4dGxDvPnbPsMm7eRF3RjqsgpvbHsV0NCkWwOw8QsC62DS1KAKLml-Gvd5nKoH7MouqmGl3ddmgCsdMxwOB0ZI16A7sjuFD8XF-eY19Qsd6iojax3fPxapbg1TwuOACTLAQIBy4EVpqxJXuURLfEGxjHtAZ_LvHwkN5U8Kbxt52jZ7XsEw45xErtU9-ZSfJ4cSMJ0BEqBnMwdWppmkBxcZQ5e5N1yWvhflclt4Ncwjc6sDoabjTTvri4mPRYX9i6RUzexAGFEDmeFX2j1jbn8OvZPBjMz6e4rFJIu84QCZF9PGBEhXJh7VfdUwUA&c=ycTX90fLboc8f2vhKY6iS6J8hWcQzj8dc-2BI9DaebntAfqJP2qgrw==&ch=FZKcjQaA5H4bMVBIC27fECW0Dnnn9nLe3h4PjVo7Uq_f5jQxgOlhUg==)
---
| Thank you for your continued support. Now, here's your brief.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| CONGRESS MUST NOT ABANDON BORDER SECURITY
---
|
---
| |
---
| The Senate border bill is dead, but that does not mean we can abandon border security.
After the Senate defeated the border legislation that failed to address the severity of the crisis we're facing, they passed a supplemental aid package without any border security attached to it.
Now, the House should send back that aid package with the House-passed border bill - H.R. 2. Our legislation passed last year will actually address the root causes of the border crisis and combat illegal immigration. That should be the place where we start negotiations and demand the White House and Senate Democrats come to the negotiating table if they want to pass a supplemental aid package.
Congress cannot abandon efforts to secure the border. We need strong measures now and the House border bill is what we must send back to the Senate to start these negotiations again.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| WHY I VOTED TO IMPEACH MAYORKAS
---
|
---
| [CLICK HERE TO READ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kdKThNlee0yX-LhDKe0S3QXIrvX276CcpmhbJ4dGxDvPnbPsMm7eRF3RjqsgpvbHpBcpQrIG1QR2YRMOTU_H6_RftKdR_auO3EYYdy-hgJEBBugc_Nbu6ZPltmq6tua7ddSrjLwXmai33KHcfQD0NvR187YU_aMr8jcDRt54TGKnuA2ji9qF1wuZk82WlvOJNOhFc0x52fsmpkiqRk_KKif-5eYOdZJ8&c=ycTX90fLboc8f2vhKY6iS6J8hWcQzj8dc-2BI9DaebntAfqJP2qgrw==&ch=FZKcjQaA5H4bMVBIC27fECW0Dnnn9nLe3h4PjVo7Uq_f5jQxgOlhUg==)
---
| Last week, I voted to impeach DHS Secretary Mayorkas. Unfortunately that vote failed.
Impeachment is a political act, not a judicial one. We aren't a court. Impeachment is our sole recourse for the people to remove a President or an official who has overwhelmingly lost the trust of the people. A lot of people claim there aren't grounds to impeach Mayorkas because, technically, no crimes have been committed. But the Founders enshrined impeachment as a recourse for the Legislative Branch to remove those in the Executive Branch who aren't doing their jobs -- even if there's no crime. It's a feature of the checks and balances principle. That's my interpretation of the impeachment authority. Other smart people disagree, and believe a provable crime must be committed. But if that's the case - and there's a crime committed - then wouldn't we rely on the courts to enforce?
Mayorkas has abandoned his position as DHS Secretary. He has refused to execute his basic duties under the law and refused to enforce immigration law. Mayorkas will be impeached. This isn't finished.
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| THE BIDEN ADMINISTRATION MUST COMBAT TIKTOK
---
|
---
| [CLICK HERE TO READ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kdKThNlee0yX-LhDKe0S3QXIrvX276CcpmhbJ4dGxDvPnbPsMm7eRF3RjqsgpvbHAWiDHKIbnK9GAI8JP0ece9G0GK7hU1-bk9_g4bhDRPbrhi4vueFbjs2pQ9rMn3PVE8iRE0CWhAwJ7Bo70EBQwVoMG0lkNWFstfyHrIPJgx31t2cCZqO7KD1S9JfcV84r0ZXcimGaf3-EPr-u6OmLL76rgEpVZQ3uL8YlUCoThE4CTYC5Cj5iiUOAID7lUFClNspUsQA-Cyw9Odedd-bpKSEMupC-dZdLC_Vtte3j0u0vsXhSdpgcWbvht87AdjM7Leb6cShHVrY=&c=ycTX90fLboc8f2vhKY6iS6J8hWcQzj8dc-2BI9DaebntAfqJP2qgrw==&ch=FZKcjQaA5H4bMVBIC27fECW0Dnnn9nLe3h4PjVo7Uq_f5jQxgOlhUg==)
---
| China continues to infiltrate our private lives and poison the minds of our youth. Our threats to shut down TikTok have not stopped them from continuing to prey on the American people and collect our data.
I support legislation to ban TikTok -- full stop. But I'm also calling on the Biden Administration to take immediate action by blocking the transfer of U.S. software to this Chinese Communist Party spy app. This is bipartisan and commonsense.
Read more about my legislation in National Review at the link above.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kdKThNlee0yX-LhDKe0S3QXIrvX276CcpmhbJ4dGxDvPnbPsMm7eRJn6HCBNX9E4gAX7hHzHNBmd7sizSiWx58k3ICwR4oGmq7lW8LKN3oZ3juKe1iDooxLrlJuF5W8uGOcM41C_mBDanjRlH36SjBp5xlXB4YvXgdHcE5WSzR3tdPYozwvjBuS-h79qLVdgm5-_lgCzTzwQtL4t-pYFQtU34alQ4iFJjX1mGhtPM89gsn-7rTbELe_mUUBPtTE5wnDEku8Ndnhx0NHw1AVZUZ1g7Q4TTWk53TJsRJDgxPzdD0JWoavX1grwjCYT6UaLMEFOKTjwptOFU-O3POGi1XRYLDlMhyK3gL2wj1wHLuGNu47MyXOlHg==&c=ycTX90fLboc8f2vhKY6iS6J8hWcQzj8dc-2BI9DaebntAfqJP2qgrw==&ch=FZKcjQaA5H4bMVBIC27fECW0Dnnn9nLe3h4PjVo7Uq_f5jQxgOlhUg==)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter – Last week, I called on Congress to pass the House border security bill - H.R. 2 - in tandem with the supplemental spending bill the Senate passed that did not include any money for border security. I also explained why I voted to impeach Alejandro Mayorkas and called on the Biden Administration to combat threats from TikTok. We have our primaries in Texas next month, and I need your help to win re-election. I'm running for re-election because I believe this country is still worth fighting for even in our toxic political environment. Any donation to my campaign - even a small amount - will go a long way to help ensure I can continue fighting on the issues that matter to you. You can donate at the following link, and I am forever grateful for your support: | | | == | Thank you for your continued support. Now, here's your brief. | | | | | | | | CONGRESS MUST NOT ABANDON BORDER SECURITY | | | | The Senate border bill is dead, but that does not mean we can abandon border security. After the Senate defeated the border legislation that failed to address the severity of the crisis we're facing, they passed a supplemental aid package without any border security attached to it. Now, the House should send back that aid package with the House-passed border bill - H.R. 2. Our legislation passed last year will actually address the root causes of the border crisis and combat illegal immigration. That should be the place where we start negotiations and demand the White House and Senate Democrats come to the negotiating table if they want to pass a supplemental aid package. Congress cannot abandon efforts to secure the border. We need strong measures now and the House border bill is what we must send back to the Senate to start these negotiations again. | | | | | | | | WHY I VOTED TO IMPEACH MAYORKAS | | == | Last week, I voted to impeach DHS Secretary Mayorkas. Unfortunately that vote failed. Impeachment is a political act, not a judicial one. We aren't a court. Impeachment is our sole recourse for the people to remove a President or an official who has overwhelmingly lost the trust of the people. A lot of people claim there aren't grounds to impeach Mayorkas because, technically, no crimes have been committed. But the Founders enshrined impeachment as a recourse for the Legislative Branch to remove those in the Executive Branch who aren't doing their jobs -- even if there's no crime. It's a feature of the checks and balances principle. That's my interpretation of the impeachment authority. Other smart people disagree, and believe a provable crime must be committed. But if that's the case - and there's a crime committed - then wouldn't we rely on the courts to enforce? Mayorkas has abandoned his position as DHS Secretary. He has refused to execute his basic duties under the law and refused to enforce immigration law. Mayorkas will be impeached. This isn't finished. | | | | | | THE BIDEN ADMINISTRATION MUST COMBAT TIKTOK | | == | China continues to infiltrate our private lives and poison the minds of our youth. Our threats to shut down TikTok have not stopped them from continuing to prey on the American people and collect our data. I support legislation to ban TikTok -- full stop. But I'm also calling on the Biden Administration to take immediate action by blocking the transfer of U.S. software to this Chinese Communist Party spy app. This is bipartisan and commonsense. Read more about my legislation in National Review at the link above. | | | | | | | | == | | | == | My custom eyepatch is back in stock - with options for left or right eye. Durable, strong, and comfortable. It's the same eyepatch I wear everyday. | | | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | == | == | == | | | | | | | | NEWS | HOUSTON CHRONICLE: == WSJ: == FOX NEWS: == | That's it for the campaign brief. Thank you for reading and staying informed. | In Service, | | Dan Crenshaw | | | | | | | | | | | | == | Was this email forwarded to you? == to get the latest updates on the fight in Washington direct from me. body:
The significance of public education cannot be emphasized enough, as it plays a vital role in shaping our nation's future. | | | | | [](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=f77716c656&e=a2a46ff12c)
---
# The Diverse Educational Pathways

Peter:
The significance of public education cannot be emphasized enough, as it plays a vital role in shaping our nation's future.
For my husband and me, hybrid schooling emerged as an excellent option, offering a blend of traditional classroom learning and personalized instruction. We recognized the importance of **providing children with diverse educational opportunities, acknowledging that each child learns differently.**
Utilizing the varied educational pathways available provided the flexibility and resources necessary for our children to thrive academically and personally.
This approach to education enabled our children to transition into adulthood earlier, with one leaving at 15, another at 16, and the last one at 17.
Their early transition was a testament to the effectiveness of tailored schooling in preparing them for success, instilling the skills and confidence needed to navigate the challenges of adulthood with determination.

[**Peter - Let's empower education. Sending me to Congress will mean one more advocate for educational opportunities and a voice for the importance of accessible schooling. Every contribution matters, and together, we can shape a brighter future for our children and our nation.**](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=58dfd42376&e=a2a46ff12c)

body:
The rule of law in our country is teetering on a knife’s edge

| | | [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683433%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1eJCqDG9sryYQIJiCofmPg&sysid=1)
---
**I’m terrified for my son's future.**

_Because the rule of law in our country is teetering on a knife’s edge._

Police are openly beaten in the streets, illegal immigrants violate our laws freely, and defending yourself is enough to be thrown in **PRISON.**

That’s the #1 reason I’m running for Congress in Alaska’s ONLY House seat - to SAVE our country before it’s too late.

My name is Nick Begich. You likely haven’t heard of me before, but I’m a father, a husband, a faithful Christian, and a conservative pro-Trump Republican.

And my race is the most **HOTLY** contested in the nation.

Why? Because Democrats know it’s where they are most vulnerable. Alaska’s House seat is THE most Republican district in the country to have a Democrat representative, and the D.C. Swamp is doing ANYTHING to keep her in power.

They know that if I flip this seat **RED** , I’ll put the brakes on their RADICAL agenda in Congress.

That’s why Democrats have already raised over **$71,000,000** to destroy my chances in November.

**[I hate to ask, but if we want to flip this CRITICAL seat RED, I’m going to need your help right now.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683434%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aEl%2bEoILd8F%2fG7w3%2f0kh6w&sysid=1)**

Secretary of Defense Lloyd Austin was taken to the hospital again on
Sunday afternoon, Pentagon press secretary Maj. Gen. Pat Ryder said in
a statement, in a change after the secretary’s secret hospitalization
in January triggered a firestorm of criticism.

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Truths from Revelation
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWZfDqDiNh

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWZfDqDiNh

Hello
Friend,
Do you
ever despair that Jesus will never return?
When we
all get to Heaven, what a day of rejoicing that will be!
When we
all see Jesus, we'll sing and shout the victory!
The words
of this old hymn say it perfectly ... Christ's return is going to
be glorious!
But
between now and then, how should we live? What does God's Word
say about end times? As the world grows increasingly sinful ...
what should our response be?

When I
have those kinds of questions, I turn to the book of Revelation,
which I've found helps provide answers and strength in these dark
days.
And
today, I'm pleased to offer you my verse-by-verse study of the
book of Revelation entitled Final Conquest.
Final
Conquest is my first commentary on the book of Revelation. It's
all about the return of Jesus Christ, the most hope-filled event
in human history.
This book
will help you face the future with confidence! God doesn't want
you to live in fear. Final Conquest will unpack God's plan as
never before - you'll be encouraged!

With your
generous donation to Pathway to Victory-- to help keep our
ministry strong, for you and your family, and for listeners and
viewers across the country--I will send you a copy of Final
Conquest for free!
You can
make your most generous donation here:
https://secure.ptv.org/final-conquest-generous-gift-kit-1
One day
soon the darkness will pass...and our long-awaited King of kings
and Lord of lords will return and make His final conquest.
Until
that moment, we are focusing our hope on Christ and working
together to proclaim the gospel and expand His coming kingdom.

Sincerely,
Dr.
Robert Jeffress
Senior
Pastor, First Baptist Dallas

Dear Peter,

We are thrilled to extend to you an exclusive invitation to an evening of grandeur, gourmet dining, and groundbreaking insights with the visionary Mike Lindell, CEO of MyPillow (https://www.mypillow.com/ir?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3e6815414e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) and trusted advisor to President Donald J. Trump (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/01/from-local-to-legendary-trumps-share-catapults-illinois-review-to-national-spotlight.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=823ff06359-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3e6815414e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) . This one-of-a-kind event is designed not just to tantalize your taste buds with a meticulously curated three-course meal and exquisite hand-passed hors d'oeuvres, but also to enrich your intellect with the wisdom and experiences of one of the most influential figures in the business and political realms.

**Why You Can't Miss This:**
- **Gourmet Dining:** Prepare for a culinary journey that promises to be as delightful as it is memorable, with each course crafted to perfection and each hors d'oeuvre a masterpiece.
- **Exclusive Insights:** Engage in an intimate setting with Mike Lindell, as he shares his unparalleled journey, insights into current affairs, and the innovative spirit behind MyPillow.

**Limited Seats Available – Act Fast!**
The opportunity to be part of this exclusive evening is highly limited and is expected to fill up rapidly. We're offering this invitation to a select few before opening it up to the general public, ensuring you have the first chance to secure your spot.

**Special Offer Just for You:**
As a valued member of our community, we are delighted to offer you an additional discount on your ticket. Simply use the promo code IllinoisReview (https://www.lindelltour.com/event-details-registration/mike-lindell-bolingbrook-il?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3e6815414e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) at checkout to unlock your exclusive savings.

**Don’t Let This Opportunity Pass You By!**
This event is not just a dinner; it's a gateway to an evening filled with inspiration, networking, and unforgettable moments. Ensure you're part of this rare gathering by reserving your seat today. Remember, once the seats are gone, they're gone!

We look forward to sharing this exceptional evening with you. Secure your spot now and be ready for an experience that promises to be talked about long after the last course is served.

Warm regards,
Illinois Review
