Friend, **The deadline to register for IN GOP Congress of Counties is 5PM on Monday,****February 19 - which is just ONE WEEK AWAY!** **[Please register HERE before time runs out>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/5915e32773c15b103947229f28c3afba/2e8e5563ebd28a56c3d6b838967d376c/40313)** Congress of Counties 2024 will take place in downtown Indianapolis February 23rd-24th. It’s a can’t-miss chance to get to know fellow Hoosier Republicans and a great training opportunity to equip yourself with the tools you need to help grow your county party and hone your skills to win races in 2024 and beyond. You don’t want to miss out on this year’s Congress of Counties. [Confirm your spot right now >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/5915e32773c15b103947229f28c3afba/fc0060db8f97cbf6c3d6b838967d376c/40313) Thanks, and hope to see you there! -Joe Elsener, Executive Director

[Peter: I’m about to ask you to donate $10 to help Democrats win the Special Election to replace serial fraudster George Santos by splitting a donation between Tom Suozzi and The Collective PAC. This is a make-or-break moment – and the race couldn’t be closer! If National Republicans win this Special Election tomorrow, they’ll get off scot-free for protecting Santos for months. We cannot let that happen. Please, Peter: Will you rush $10 to help us win this special election, have a record fundraising day and build a foundation to reclaim the House? >>](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x7ESlwpd39wyaaM2DOMklJra8LI36Qc5aiv3PZRf8N0cofvpyeX5bkStwsGzUU6MjZjFJg4Bx8GeHcWJyvyNvL_AUtTwUjUB7BIM4zVxB6sRjD6yNaEgY_9CVKuBry4FoZEsd4SeE7MguBxZBRzjTzdKNPylyoidFcUbTzVkmSKEwKQRYXt8VbTYyxLveH0hgn_wK1EgLBZOwP9cYSRSDZKcijT6UJdnWMB-lyihLlRVGr9qliIP_7Oqa4iIXP1S1BQ6_OdUwroomJEdTLNV06U4bJE509tGThf4KePb_5vJv6JM9QzqfyrGE9SfktZpoM2Sx0pMcC29jfU_njhFDl2a1Q-xG4fjglbEjQWgqEbwlZZIDRCoP6EBieVA3wn5c/43s/pUMukUnTTpORuQaKkpWkzA/h2/pNYmy8NLE7KOuGynA1QQwLr8LtHSeAXGXyJt8aetuXM)

For over a year, the American people have faced chaos, crisis and confusion caused by extreme Republicans. Team Extreme spent months protecting serial fraudster George Santos. Now we have a real shot at bringing actual representation to New York’s 3rd Congressional District by electing Tom on February 13.

**Peter, we’re just 1 day away from the special election** and although this is our first big test of 2024, our work doesn’t stop there. We’re off to the races all across the country building the groundwork to take back the House majority.

[Will you stand with me and show the nation that we are ready to defeat extremism once and for all in November by splitting a donation right now between Tom Suozzi and The Collective PAC? >> ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x7ESlwpd39wyaaM2DOMklJra8LI36Qc5aiv3PZRf8N0cofvpyeX5bkStwsGzUU6MjZjFJg4Bx8GeHcWJyvyNvL_AUtTwUjUB7BIM4zVxB6sRjD6yNaEgY_9CVKuBry4FoZEsd4SeE7MguBxZBRzjTzdKNPylyoidFcUbTzVkmSKE0p6pEJWQObQ_KNRVCTkv_HRvkvxhSAAk-pPxf5itxAMgKKDgupPi1jUlMUQlXucEZxS56cFZv81slp0hXQIU-yHzXnICiXpBiSqVMriaNLzQmGmTGa9XVENKrnJ41RJlnt7S3t0Me2CCEiKs0Rj-9mJ1ktfhFSBRnLOhku4WceXFg7JVkxmFwhzN--s1PM1ZPwaW2zg48rtaV3qW89NzQ/43s/pUMukUnTTpORuQaKkpWkzA/h3/0uVM9q4q8mrTSlybtBkLdMqGx9MzenOA5JUoot2aDOI)

**We only need to win five more seats to take back The People’s House** and helping Tom in NY-03’s special election can get us one closer. I’m counting on your support.

[We can’t do this without you. Can you chip in right now with a split donation between Tom Suozzi and The Collective PAC? >> ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x7ESlwpd39wyaaM2DOMklJra8LI36Qc5aiv3PZRf8N0cofvpyeX5bkStwsGzUU6MjZjFJg4Bx8GeHcWJyvyNvL_AUtTwUjUB7BIM4zVxB6sRjD6yNaEgY_9CVKuBry4FoZEsd4SeE7MguBxZBRzjTzdKNPylyoidFcUbTzVkmSKKhLynDVEdnXBvqXaEnE4GghHmU5J4XpXihI6iw1BgsSwfHYOVTtXFYiTolIAIZYTvS5yKDFRzEKotj7ahjt1Sv7J3KBIt8MA2uAwQbSvjNEGF1nIPsftKlpwRREnL7N39UC8nn_4fYMzcgdxbCfkrIPjME1dt0YdaAL2IW2euw1HqA_efm_kJ7FIRCDxUNTFSOx4xa7eRT3tti8gh1WJs4/43s/pUMukUnTTpORuQaKkpWkzA/h4/UYTwl4NIvI5XXhocIXAXi_f1Ovvrldw2DRc3uF3Wr3k) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Tom Suozzi and The Collective PAC.

Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

clean_body: we have no time to waste | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | For over a year, the American people have faced chaos, crisis and confusion caused by extreme Republicans. Team Extreme spent months protecting serial fraudster George Santos. Now we have a real shot at bringing actual representation to New York’s 3rd Congressional District by electing Tom on February 13. Peter, we’re just 1 day away from the special election and although this is our first big test of 2024, our work doesn’t stop there. We’re off to the races all across the country building the groundwork to take back the House majority. We only need to win five more seats to take back The People’s House and helping Tom in NY-03’s special election can get us one closer. I’m counting on your support. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Tom Suozzi and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Keep the faith, Hakeem The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from The Collective PAC, please .

subject: Join the Movement: Experience the Growing Momentum!
body:
Discover the Vision: Alfonso for Congress Michigan's 4th District - Be Part of the Momentum! | | | | |
---
# We are just getting started!
Dear Friend,
I hope this email finds you well and filled with the same excitement and energy that's propelling our campaign forward. We have some incredible news to share: our momentum is growing stronger by the day!
Just this past weekend, we gained another 45 signatures, all thanks to the amazing support of our community members, both familiar faces and new friends. Their enthusiasm and dedication are truly inspiring, and we couldn't have achieved this milestone without them. Additionally, our local partners have been instrumental in amplifying our reach and impact.
But our journey is far from over. As we continue to build momentum, we're setting our sights on an ambitious goal: reaching the maximum allowed of 2,000 signatures by the filing deadline on April 23rd. With your help, we're confident we can make it happen.
We're already nearly halfway there, but every signature counts. Whether it's donating to our cause or volunteering your time to help gather signatures, your support is crucial in ensuring our voices are heard in Michigan's 4th District.
Together, we can bring about real change and make a difference in our community. Let's work hand in hand to turn our vision into reality.
Thank you for your unwavering support,

Sincerely,Team Alfonso
| [SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS: DONATE TODAY!](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=19f87f0ff2&e=16d812e81c)

name: Team Gallego
subject: [RESPONSE REQUESTED] Add your name and endorse Ruben!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
It’s going to take a massive, people-powered team to win in Arizona this year, and we’re well on our way.
#

Peter:
It’s going to take a massive, people-powered team to win in Arizona this year, and we’re well on our way.
We’ve built one of the strongest campaigns in the country, and Ruben’s very proud of that. You should be, too.
But we have to keep up the momentum. We can’t take our foot off the gas, or Kari Lake and Kyrsten Sinema might get the edge on us.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nancy=20Dahlstrom=20for=20Alaska?=
subject: House Majority Leader Steve Scalise Endorses Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom for U.S. Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Dahlstrom for Alaska]()
body:
Dahlstrom builds momentum as key Republicans back her bid for Congress | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/nancyforalaska/stefanikendorsesdahlstrom-10228949?e=a20d8ad2ed)
---
[](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=6f695ce877&e=a20d8ad2ed)
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Contact: [press@nancyforalaska.com](mailto:press@nancyforalaska.com)

**House Majority Leader Steve Scalise Endorses Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom for U.S. Congress** _Dahlstrom builds momentum as key Republicans back her bid for Congress_
**Anchorage, AK** \- House Majority Leader Steve Scalise has endorsed Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom in her campaign for Congress. Scalise joins a growing list of top level Republicans in backing Dahlstrom, including Alaska Governor Mike Dunleavy, Speaker Mike Johnson, and Conference Chair Elise Stefanik.
In his announcement, Majority Leader Scalise stated, **"I'm excited to endorse Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom for Congress. Nancy has always put Alaska first and she is the exact type of principled conservative we need in Congress. Nancy has what it takes to defeat Mary Peltola and grow our Republican Majority in 2024."**
Since announcing at the end of the year, Dahlstrom has [consolidated](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=f4bc4929c2&e=a20d8ad2ed) key conservative support and her entrance [shifted](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=3f34c76b07&e=a20d8ad2ed) the race towards Republicans. The race for the at-large seat is set to be one of the most competitive in the country and one of the Republicans’ top pick-up opportunities.
**“Leader Scalise embodies what it means to be a principled conservative and I’m proud to have his support,”** stated Lt. Governor Dahlstrom. **“There is so much work to be done - from ending Biden’s countless executive actions crushing our state to stopping the flood of illegal immigrants and drugs into our country. We need a fresh, conservative Alaskan voice in Congress, and I’m honored to have the trust of leadership to be that person.”**
_Nancy Dahlstrom currently serves as the Lt. Governor for the state of Alaska. Nancy was first appointed to serve as a State Representative in 2003 and then served as a Senior Advisor for Military Affairs. In 2018, Nancy took on the role to serve as the Commissioner of Corrections and was a leader in cracking down on crime and ensuring criminals serve their time. As Lieutenant Governor, Nancy has prioritized public safety, energy security, and emergency preparedness._
# # #

Peter, I'm stressed.

Our February mid-month deadline is in 3 days and my finance team just let me know that we’re not on track to meet our fundraising goal.

This is bad news because, if we don’t stockpile the resources we need for November now, we’ll be stuck playing a dangerous game of catch-up later on.

name: Katie Porter
subject: Urgent: Super PAC spends millions against us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Schiff’s super PAC is airing ads on Fox News to help our GOP opponent.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=37528%2E3422442%2EhlSjYz)
🚨Adam Schiff’s super PAC just spent millions of dollars on TV ads to boost Republican Steve Garvey and push us out of the top-two general election.🚨
**The new ad from the Schiff super PAC is airing exclusively on Fox News.** It never even mentions Schiff—it’s a clear play to consolidate conservative support behind Steve Garvey and launch him into second place. **[Can you pitch in right now to help us fight back?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240212-1?refcode=em20240212-37528&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37528_3422442_hlSjYz&akid=37528%2E3422442%2EhlSjYz)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240212-1?refcode=em20240212-37528&refcode2=37528_3422442_hlSjYz&akid=37528%2E3422442%2EhlSjYz)
I’m just not one for BS, and that’s what this ad is. **It falsely tells voters that Steve Garvey could win the race entirely and tilt the balance of the Senate.** But a Republican hasn’t won a US Senate election in California since 1988.
The LA Times reports that the Schiff super PAC is funded by “wealthy individuals” who can give unlimited donations. And Adam Schiff himself has taken corporate PAC and lobbyist money for decades, stockpiling more cash than any other Democrat.
We can’t just give up because he has more money and more power. Polls still show an incredibly close race that will be decided by just a few percentage points. **[Is there anything you can give today to help me pull ahead?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240212-1?refcode=em20240212-37528&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37528_3422442_hlSjYz&akid=37528%2E3422442%2EhlSjYz)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240212-1?refcode=em20240212-37528&refcode2=37528_3422442_hlSjYz&akid=37528%2E3422442%2EhlSjYz)
Thanks so much,
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240212-37528&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=37528_3422442_hlSjYz&akid=37528%2E3422442%2EhlSjYz)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=37528%2E3422442%2EhlSjYz)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=37528%2E3422442%2EhlSjYz)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Richard=20Grenell?=
subject: America First endorsement 🇺🇸
body:
Peter, this is President Trump's former Cabinet Official Richard Grenell.

If there's one thing I learned while serving in Donald Trump's cabinet, it's that we need more America First patriots serving in Washington. It's crucial.

That's why I am proudly endorsing my friend Republican Max Ukropina for Congress in Orange County's 47th District ... and I'm writing to urge you to do the same. (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/vote-pledge?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=Grenell_21224)
https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/vote-pledge?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=Grenell_21224
Max isn't a career politician who's run for office for decades. He's a political outsider. He's been working hard as a business owner creating jobs. He understands what's at stake for our great country.

Most importantly, I've watched Max out-campaigning, out-organizing, and out-energizing his opponent Scott Baugh in this primary.

It's the same fighting spirit he'll bring to the Democrats in November.

As someone who's seen his fair share of political battles, believe me: Max is our best chance to flip this seat into Republican hands and send a badly-needed America First leader to Washington.

Whether it's securing Biden's wide open border, getting our mind-boggling spending and debt under control, or rooting out corrupt government bureaucrats, Max will be on the frontlines every day fighting for our country and for Orange County.

I hope you'll join me in ENDORSING Max today to help send him to Washington and let him know you have his back. (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/vote-pledge?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=Grenell_21224)

Thank you,

Richard Grenell
Former Trump Cabinet Official

DONATE (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/gotv-fund?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=Grenell_21224)

============================================================
Copyright © 2024 Max Ukropina for Congress, All rights reserved.
You are receiving this email because you signed up for updates from Max Ukropina for Congress.

Our mailing address is:
Max Ukropina for Congress
PO Box 5780
Newport Beach, CA 92662-5780
You can ** update your preferences (https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=77339c80b8&e=86e91e802d&c=ae3c5c504f)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=77339c80b8&t=b&e=86e91e802d&c=ae3c5c504f)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dan=20Cox?=
subject: TONIGHT - Candidate Forum - Full Steam Ahead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAN COX FOR CONGRESS, INC
body:
Join me tonight or at another upcoming event! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/coxforcongress/tonight-candidate-forum-full-steam-ahead?e=5bb5efcda7)
---
| |
---
| [CONTRIBUTE TO DAN COX FOR CONGRESS>>](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=da3de89765&e=5bb5efcda7 "CONTRIBUTE TO DAN COX FOR CONGRESS>>")
---
| |
# Full Steam Ahead: Upcoming Campaign Events.
Friend,
This election is a choice between putting your families and our nation first without fear of or control by the DC swamp, or entrusting the office to another official who lets us down and exposes us to danger.

I will keep my word. I am honored to ask for your support and vote.

No one else in this race has consistently raised their voice for you in the most important matters that impact us, such as standing with President Trump and against the globalists who want to destroy our constitution. That is why we decided to run to represent you.

But this election is your choice for your voice. So join me these next two weeks at the following forums and candidate events. You know the issues - they haven't changed. But maybe you have new concerns. Come and make your voices known.
* Feb 12 -6pm FCCC Candidate forum, Frederick
* Feb 13, 7pm - Asian-Republican Candidate Dinner, Gaithersburg
* Feb 15, 7pm - MoCo LD15 Candidate Forum, Poolesville
* Feb 16, 7pm - Civil Society Candidate Dinner, Frederick
* Feb 17, 1pm - Garrett County GOP Candidate Forum, Garrett College
* Feb 19, 10am- Allegany County GOP Cand. Meet & Greet, Fairgrounds
* Feb 20, 10am - in Annapolis MD - MD Homeschool Youth
* Feb 21, 7pm - We the People of Maryland, Harford Vineyard & Winery

After two years of at times five events a day across this beautiful State of ours, it's been a few months since I've spoken face to face with you. So come on out to one of these events. I look forward to speaking with you or just catching up again.

Together we can and will win and make a difference for our land.

Freedom and victory,

Candidate for Congress (R-MD-CD6)

P.S. To serve as your Member of Congress, I need your financial backing. body:
My name is Mazi Pilip- I’m the GOP candidate in the NY special election

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f298a0de7b5e475bb15755a65182cc20&_e=R8rlNzc8LD5ehRnQNZwfKb2nQG3JqeZf4R5mTTcPoPR4s5eOaMCOjlyVqePGSTxQr0IpOu3Q4zA3-R16Fo2Cn2Sp1Dujrusq_BzP2spXpkevDlDkKMl-fK-CIB8_WRUdJMyJLY4P151m4XrnUmb1j-MLtiAbFOXPrj93OFreT_Eslbgk7BcWEygdjf_ESMZeXxC4qSXpFPm-5SFk5AjQafHim_TQ8YWFkQ6FeefYceRRL6WWSoZVOGEAHcukx74vXvC2J1mE68nQ_v7oiDSbe_pZbtzIInCwh3jEOaQgD9whMrRUHz1D_KDJz_1mNIWxDThuD_qeUg8VhSxlYUUU_DhOLoFvCevnBg0UsTwjjn2BItanY3KMpoATx_2p_0qlW_yIVWO_7ngIwuaSHbp9mZP3S-7H0hTqhw0OTK48oUrmEwyl9G573x8SFTc29Q8WwrAdGRTeVOGUDZIkCl2-_wPsKiyTL-Wossg3IRtAHBkiDWVEJzLpx5eUplW-Cvw_OUXajYBNvq32EYpH5toUZA%3D%3D)
---

Friend,

I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress.

My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short!

I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared.

If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority.

I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family.

Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed.

They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things.

And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials.

They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative.

And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them.

The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me.

---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f298a0de7b5e475bb15755a65182cc20&_e=R8rlNzc8LD5ehRnQNZwfKb2nQG3JqeZf4R5mTTcPoPR4s5eOaMCOjlyVqePGSTxQr0IpOu3Q4zA3-R16Fo2Cn2Sp1Dujrusq_BzP2spXpkevDlDkKMl-fK-CIB8_WRUdJMyJLY4P151m4XrnUmb1j-MLtiAbFOXPrj93OFreT_Eslbgk7BcWEygdjf_ESMZeXxC4qSXpFPm-5SFk5AjQafHim_TQ8YWFkQ6FeefYceRRL6WWSoZVOGEAHcukx74vXvC2J1mE68nQ_v7oiDSbe_pZbtzIInCwh3jEOaQgD9whMrRUHz1D_KDJz_1mNIWxDThuD_qeUg8VhSxlYUUU_DhOLoFvCevnBg0UsTwjjn2BItanY3KMpoATx_2p_0qlfGW8R1R_AxDs0TLaYQ6HKq2DlwaBJSDXjUKrcVh5JEDrmUsZc5KNzt33miqCBa7N52KJmLsTOk2EJr5NGDV28QKKuuVQKUHhNiQy4Ppo7j0F9sxTg5AzQldYinOP3aerN4JV3-AioLM2stC3i-06DA%3D%3D)
---

I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f298a0de7b5e475bb15755a65182cc20&_e=R8rlNzc8LD5ehRnQNZwfKb2nQG3JqeZf4R5mTTcPoPR4s5eOaMCOjlyVqePGSTxQr0IpOu3Q4zA3-R16Fo2Cn2Sp1Dujrusq_BzP2spXpkevDlDkKMl-fK-CIB8_WRUdJMyJLY4P151m4XrnUmb1j-MLtiAbFOXPrj93OFreT_Eslbgk7BcWEygdjf_ESMZeXxC4qSXpFPm-5SFk5AjQafHim_TQ8YWFkQ6FeefYceRRL6WWSoZVOGEAHcukx74vXvC2J1mE68nQ_v7oiDSbe_pZbtzIInCwh3jEOaQgD9whMrRUHz1D_KDJz_1mNIWxDThuD_qeUg8VhSxlYUUU_DhOLoFvCevnBg0UsTwjjn2BItanY3KMpoATx_2p_0qlrAJJp4zk60S96dnOMEtojQfvSWbLRaGVquc1Gj6dgeKLvZb73OJfrpt_rIGMSDKc02tnowrWmLtBschTvARYs2lr5cIl4d80R8Dm7AAXh0CoZq-aFku8nAqbxoyL3UucxiEpMBVJJWYvb94XVe2EiA%3D%3D)
---

Early voting begins in just a few days. That makes this the most important race in the nation right now.

I hope you'll step up & stand with me today to defeat the Democrats & hold the House Majority.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f298a0de7b5e475bb15755a65182cc20&_e=R8rlNzc8LD5ehRnQNZwfKb2nQG3JqeZf4R5mTTcPoPR4s5eOaMCOjlyVqePGSTxQr0IpOu3Q4zA3-R16Fo2Cn2Sp1Dujrusq_BzP2spXpkevDlDkKMl-fK-CIB8_WRUdJMyJLY4P151m4XrnUmb1j-MLtiAbFOXPrj93OFreT_Eslbgk7BcWEygdjf_ESMZeXxC4qSXpFPm-5SFk5AjQafHim_TQ8YWFkQ6FeefYceRRL6WWSoZVOGEAHcukx74vXvC2J1mE68nQ_v7oiDSbe_pZbtzIInCwh3jEOaQgD9whMrRUHz1D_KDJz_1mNIWxDThuD_qeUg8VhSxlYUUU_DhOLoFvCevnBg0UsTwjjn2BItanY3KMpoATx_2p_0qligNZgRxDzr9ezA59VEZgl8Clh7MOwL9vLFuLOZ9qabIdTq22chOhvGZIObEJ94zM7EhMt5YmRn4d6Uaj3KjHus2cknJgldhU9725msLKoY4ZjfpyXK2ORdp2rlVdHgSEt8a_UNYNXHThEpR2KEPY8A%3D%3D)
---

And if I can ever help you the way you've helped me, please just say the word.

All the best,

Mazi Melesa Pilip
GOP Nominee
Special Election NY-03

| | I’ll be frank with you. — I watched Don Bacon vote for one of the most extreme Speakers in our country’s history. — I watched him admit on Fox News that he voted for President Biden’s impeachment inquiry only for political gain. — I watched extreme MAGA Republicans like Mike Johnson and Kari Lake jet into Nebraska to buy him another two years in power. [**_I’ll be honest: If we let Bacon’s extremist allies outraise us in this critical moment, we could lose this election. We can’t let that happen. That’s why I’m calling on grassroots supporters everywhere to band together with a massive fundraising surge to outraise Bacon’s MAGA Republican friends, help Democrats take back the House, and win this election for Nebraskans. If just 600 grassroots supporters step up and chip in $15 to my 2024 Membership Drive before midnight, we’ll usher in a historic wave of support and hand Don Bacon a humiliating defeat. Will you join the fight in these next 14 hours before midnight? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78866052/454705410/1698357921?refcode=20240212_em_fr_b1_tony_30_op_rs&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWE0NjBmNS1jM2M5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B853C07skyBrE5q4623OF78GX9kdFurpbRBlzMiDl3Q=) | [**2024 MEMBERSHIP DRIVE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78866053/454705411/1698357921?refcode=20240212_em_fr_b1_tony_30_op_rs&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWE0NjBmNS1jM2M5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B853C07skyBrE5q4623OF78GX9kdFurpbRBlzMiDl3Q=)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: How do you uphold your religious liberty in today's climate?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39137%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6IUS6s60tRgEC3mvX4MOsw&sysid=1)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39138%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=joW2jtaqskmeZkTDGn5O6Q&sysid=1) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39139%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3E%2f4vk3bh8gtIbhbGI3GIw&sysid=1)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39130%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=b9NT1OWMi%2b9KMdqAs7aZMw&sysid=1)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---

body:

Friend,

This is the most important email you will receive all year. Keep reading. This is proof the Deep State exists.

I was getting anxious, so recently, I released an entire recording of the time a Deep State agent tried to bribe me and get me to step away from politics. I wanted you to know that I'm not sitting cozy in a comfy job because I f****** care about this country so much.

Considering everything that's happened means we must tell the country our story, and we need to keep fighting no matter what. We've come too far to give up now.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: We’re in this for the long haul
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Winning Texas is a matter of time and effort. The more effort we put in,
the less time it will take to get there.

That’s why I founded Powered by People in late 2019 — to bring Texans
together toward the common goal of speeding up this process and stopping
this state’s slide toward cruelty, corruption, and authoritarianism.

During the 2020 election, we saw clear returns on this work. We organized
20,000 volunteers who registered over 200,000 new voters and helped drive
the highest turnout that Texas had seen in nearly three decades.

And while President Biden didn’t win in Texas that year, he lost our state
by just 5.6 points — a narrow margin considering that Hilary Clinton lost
Texas by 9 points in 2016, and that Barack Obama lost it by 16 points just
four years prior.

While the progress is evident, it’s understandable how voters and
volunteers alike can come out of these elections wondering if all the hard
work is worth it.

But it’s important to remember: Texas last voted for the Democratic
nominee for president in 1976; last sent a Democrat to the Senate in 1988;
last elected a Democrat to statewide office in 1994.

We’re bound to get knocked down a few times (maybe a lot of times) before
we finally win. The question for all of us is: are we willing to get up
again?

clean_body: [1]Powered By People Winning Texas is a matter of time and effort. The more effort we put in, the less time it will take to get there. That’s why I founded Powered by People in late 2019 — to bring Texans together toward the common goal of speeding up this process and stopping this state’s slide toward cruelty, corruption, and authoritarianism. During the 2020 election, we saw clear returns on this work. We organized 20,000 volunteers who registered over 200,000 new voters and helped drive the highest turnout that Texas had seen in nearly three decades. And while President Biden didn’t win in Texas that year, he lost our state by just 5.6 points — a narrow margin considering that Hilary Clinton lost Texas by 9 points in 2016, and that Barack Obama lost it by 16 points just four years prior. While the progress is evident, it’s understandable how voters and volunteers alike can come out of these elections wondering if all the hard work is worth it. But it’s important to remember: Texas last voted for the Democratic nominee for president in 1976; last sent a Democrat to the Senate in 1988; last elected a Democrat to statewide office in 1994. We’re bound to get knocked down a few times (maybe a lot of times) before we finally win. The question for all of us is: are we willing to get up again? For Powered by People, the answer will always be yes. We keep our eyes on the prize, knowing that the steps we take today and over the coming years will ensure we ultimately come through for our state and our country. Fellow Patriot,

I don’t know where else to turn, so I’m reaching out to you in a pinch. **[I’m under heavy fire, and I desperately need cover now.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=b8ec2c2bdb434f70aed93b118a72a06e&_e=2lEmnQkacNqLI4DTKrVLhaJ20JO2r0HDP4vUm0UTauS7KKJgW6i3Ub-0iR1DDOXMq1PSbFIa-5jvj2sq54jDtXZdqsNSEdKdW_E7BgwbJFJcyioefsWZp0Wppd2Wa7XKy4mtCeqJl7hi1yrvC22wXzKY38JusLgRmV5jlCbrh5yLbkrbENBTlSJEI7g0bUGVqKplGj0qKhpCUdWhlvI_kFbeJ8CR6_Ya_HHNrLymMPw49bzWkyic8RF4GhUPrrm_BxeDujWBCE8gmvtVU8NqecEjH4OaSwv0oEhHquuZJzqB0STY73ApbOtBy1oax6Q7WCAUEtdt4CUyEq4TLh6jZIb-QBT_gnbu9AGj8IlCLzqrsBef7AklMLW470zBu-TW0D8G3LyU3LnjwiHdWiJ_kw%3D%3D)**

Democrats are waging war against me.

As a U.S. Army veteran, I know what it’s like to go up against a dangerous enemy.

I used to fight foreign threats, like radical Islamic terrorists. Now, I fight to protect our country here at home.

What’s perhaps most alarming: there is growing support for radical Islamic terrorists in Congress from the Radical Left.

My top priority: _stopping them from destroying our country from within._

But **I am under heavy fire** for supporting Israel and speaking out against the radical Democrats.

**[With help from my fellow soldiers, I survived getting blown up by a Taliban bomb. With your help, I can survive enemy attacks from the Radical Left. As a U.S. Army veteran, I know what it’s like to go up against a dangerous enemy. I used to fight foreign threats, like radical Islamic terrorists. Now, I fight to protect our country here at home. What’s perhaps most alarming: there is growing support for radical Islamic terrorists in Congress from the Radical Left. My top priority: stopping them from destroying our country from within. But I am under heavy fire for supporting Israel and speaking out against the radical Democrats. | Please, don’t leave me exposed. Thank you, SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.) | | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS Hon. Brian Mast is a retired member of the U.S. Army. name: National Alerts
subject: Trump’s Tax Loophole to the Rescue?
body:
| | |
---
*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|*
| |
TRUMP'S SECRET TAX REFORM
---
|
---
[](http://email.myamericanpatriot.org/c/eJxckUGPmz4UxD_N4xYED7DDgcN__yw9tJHaPVSrXqyHMY6ztqHGgWY_fUWaVlUvPoxHo5nfIzdbM94a4E-AeDbDAohQ_AeI-ut6ub7g-yke6m_89fB8cZ-y_Rf_B8R4m9Uf6yMlVY6M3VXeJkPTV0fJ6kQ1Oc84r3ielcm5GYlz3vfVWI8lz6jgI-dSYq1qwlpVQ2IazLDMMMecVUfMU5VXuUQ5Ki5zXvcZlJm7kVPBSPIzxWCmmE5BJ7Y5xzgv904dYLdtW0r9Zc1jeEvl5AC76vjhy-kFsEP2xE4fd1_RyaAomlUJM0DRMgbIrtEJpwZzdVC0j1l3cZmuQSoo2r_weGnFA8HDJcnNZLSHov015bA_Qk5ebBSc8Vo4moWnaCZPVtCwko-kldCTHcQyWxMF_Q6bfFQ-QtF6aQ-fg3798TwObAVkwtt753_E-x2L9u32Hcf3rdVJaIZ5M9aahXEoM70P2on8DAAA__8ZCaOj)
---
Biden and the left are determined to raise taxes to fund their huge government spending agenda. Their reckless spending could lead to market instability and global uncertainty – in addition to the unprecedented rise in national debt. These dangerous policies continue to fuel inflation and threaten the US Dollar. And it's your retirement savings that could ultimately pay the price. But thanks to President Donald Trump's foresight, there are steps you can take to legally shield your nest egg. The same IRS-approved loopholes that the ultrawealthy exploit. With "Bailout Biden" in the White House, it may only be a matter of time until our savings become worthless. That's why it's so important to take action now and keep the government's grubby hands off your money. And you can do it with one simple strategy, revealed inside this free IRS Loophole Report.

---
[](http://email.myamericanpatriot.org/c/eJxckUGPmzAUhH_N4xaEn8FODhy6S9lDu4du1VXVi_WwDXHWNhScoOyvr0jTqurFh_FoNPM9CpN3_bUG-QCIR2cWQAT-ARCH18vp_ILvz2l3-CG_7z6ewudi-8VHQEzXyf613lNyG8j5TZVNZuqu2mtxyGzNZCFlJVlRZscae9FpqliPxMTBMiuwKztdVntZdSR45mossCyQIRPVHlluWcU06t5KzeShK6AswpWCnZ2mOFGa3ZjycR4yXx9TmpZbpxawXdc1p-50YWl-y_UYANtq__Tl-QWwRfEgnj9tPt7q2VJyF6ucAd4IASjOKahgjTsH4M191k1cxvOsLfDmHzxRe3VHcHdpChO5IQJvfk_ZbY_SY1QrzcHFQQWaVKTkxkhekblQTDRYNYzeqGXyLin6EzbGZGMC3kTtd2S6r4_fXo14AhQq-lvn_8TbHXnzdv2J_fvaDNlcm2l13rtFSCiLYRu0EfkVAAD__23mono)
---
Use this simple tax loophole to instantly safeguard your retirement portfolio and turn it into potentially your single strongest asset. Explained in your FREE guide:
* How to position your retirement accounts to work for you and easily secure your IRA or 401(k) with no crazy IRS fees or taxes.
* How one specific asset protects your money against risk of inflation and can act as a safeguard against stock market volatility and soaring interest rates.
* How to diversify your portfolio with a secret investment tax loophole that millionaires have been using for years.

And much, much more... And it's 100% free. [**> > Get the details here**](http://email.myamericanpatriot.org/c/eJxckTHvmzAUxD-N2YLwM9gwMPRfSod_MzRDVXWxHrZDnNjGBSco-fQVaVpVXTycT6e730MfnT3eWyLeCMDJ6oUAEPaBAIzfbufrAR77tGt-iO-7T2f_pdh-4SMBSPdo_lpfKbnxaN2mii7T7VDVijeZaakohKgELcrs1FZNqUUNOPCKARf1wAowDS8HqirUQme2hQLKAihQXtVAc0MrqkAdjVBUNENBysLf0ZvZKgwR02ynlE_zmLn2lFJcnp16Av26rjkO5xtN8yVXkyfQV_Xnr_sDgR74G9-_bz7Wq9lgsjcjrSas45wAvyYvvdH26gnrXrOe4jJdZ2UI6_7BE5STLwQvl0If0Y6BsO73lN32SDUFueLsbRilxygDJjsFdBL1DUPC0chxclou0dkk8U_YFJIJibAuKLd7RHWsDsyIdwJcBvfs_J_4vCPrLvefcHys3ZjNrY6rdc4uXJCyGLdBG5FfAQAA__-qbqIP) Stay Vigilant, **_Advantage Gold_**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Thierry=20Tchenko?=
subject: I’m a capitalist… but this is ridiculous
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tchenko for Texas
body:
Our system isn’t working for too many | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e88382c02145/a-new-way-forward-for-texas-12679572?e=b8ba94fd9b)
---
In 1965, average CEO pay was 21 times employee pay.
Today, it’s 344 times.
[](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=a0de0bfd63&e=b8ba94fd9b)
Did CEOs get 1500% more productive or valuable over the 60 years?
Of course not!
**While 40% of Texas workers are making under $15 an hour, big corporation CEOs are doing great.**
But they’re doing great on the back of everyday Texans.
Something has to change.
I’m proposing we level the playing field.
When I get to the Senate, I’m going to put forward legislation to ensure that CEO pay doesn’t go beyond 100x what their lowest-paid employees get.
If a CEO wants to give themselves a raise, that’s fine. But they also need to give pay raises to their team.
That’s the kind of capitalism I can get behind.
[**If you’re with me, kick in $100 today and help fund this grassroots campaign. Or even $7.25.**](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=5319dab71a&e=b8ba94fd9b)
**Every dollar helps keep us going as we build A New Way Forward together.**
Thank you,Thierry

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e3b0c7a4b1804e738f29a40ab5f29d21&_e=Npq5q7GrkaXxZ-0t32QqwH8TMGDcai8a9dQcqzjgR1VS2TP2V3dna19iggqEGg-0eKZHSE1zWoQeSyttsFUTxR8qYSMkBZGTeK5Qyuqp6ytRtrMWGRRJrE84-ix078xrFODxsPdUF0ZlkT4FGxT2M5yZyHXu5i2Spgu4cowmbNAF9_x5vcQpSQEmR-MEyEZeJRaCYgT1u-q0JQ2D4pBujlXp4q2YF13X8P0WjVHaTAd_USHbgz2Vq_JeUVCCa0ofyUTQt2sEmUo8NqIuaTt7xOw0V8wDsd7lPF4ZtdYlX8F6SmSuaxjeX0ZH0zZf8AyXpnkqOdDZ9i7BqmBOlHuXM2lCkbBTE5WCfPFsm2B9SEsX4oiypwnGdaGxYQjERHw2PiS2sm0X44sHhhx7WhIg_cBDolRdeD3zaO_O3s3Xd9o%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e3b0c7a4b1804e738f29a40ab5f29d21&_e=Npq5q7GrkaXxZ-0t32QqwH8TMGDcai8a9dQcqzjgR1VS2TP2V3dna19iggqEGg-0eKZHSE1zWoQeSyttsFUTxR8qYSMkBZGTeK5Qyuqp6ytRtrMWGRRJrE84-ix078xrFODxsPdUF0ZlkT4FGxT2M5yZyHXu5i2Spgu4cowmbNAF9_x5vcQpSQEmR-MEyEZeJRaCYgT1u-q0JQ2D4pBujlXp4q2YF13X8P0WjVHaTAd_USHbgz2Vq_JeUVCCa0ofyUTQt2sEmUo8NqIuaTt7xOHq5pSWt42XWnAI8L5fJ6ouaYe7zUr2cn06RFhx7FX60Usi_Nt6WnmFHboO-dcCK8PC0oaXowV89wK20yXjeoiNCB0q_o_YohiAk9eH4JMNYnN6aBjo_EdVDjNLT5ExSu2avA46gYYfP1lqxdzAM9g%3D) That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e3b0c7a4b1804e738f29a40ab5f29d21&_e=Npq5q7GrkaXxZ-0t32QqwH8TMGDcai8a9dQcqzjgR1VS2TP2V3dna19iggqEGg-0eKZHSE1zWoQeSyttsFUTxR8qYSMkBZGTeK5Qyuqp6ytRtrMWGRRJrE84-ix078xrFODxsPdUF0ZlkT4FGxT2M5yZyHXu5i2Spgu4cowmbNAF9_x5vcQpSQEmR-MEyEZeJRaCYgT1u-q0JQ2D4pBujlXp4q2YF13X8P0WjVHaTAd_USHbgz2Vq_JeUVCCa0ofyUTQt2sEmUo8NqIuaTt7xHgWLHP3_zF0xO5E69VWffwmzIV7qxFHulbf_KDLozb0qBm0tm72XmW0t_OJbH6hyx1CU6RAtv3dpMp3IjPrAW8aKD4WaPAowgdRYQq2K3tk7VtM3xyqbX9kMV1TkF7knPO1d2jBnlUYURo40oYVlAY%3D)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Defend the Constitution
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

body:
My name is Mazi Pilip- I'm the GOP candidate in the NY special election

| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d80ccf148b78487f8d9c70f385662068&_e=ZZuPPVRua1vd7cUSGw6KM3wle7oerghJSE4G1-6WrlcFLT5vO6dc_ftQ65OFnL0UyoD2BSDuKNkBjG4-COiFvSKPUSb4qGY_y230Euy14IwhIMQNqm_E9p14eoV8qO46j0dPr3G7lq4aoH49CcQzur8IrCTmwuKLy05fv3vm6AuwrEG1DadV6wQN5dMZv0kcsPT2GOt0uuVmBBeeYr701w8sga9d1JJ39o1TjWuSaOsgI-k2XYm2frkrrRixWXHdV3csTuV0dwqMo-z0NdBDJApYQlb9WIHEyvZw6tsGNt-bU5SsOwMug4gwzpm7XUagGynxVQG5kdivAr9UA04QLNQY2XVOldfQDRqtCclakouCXKTDFCpim60PyLA9Uqa4DCiYhHlF07XGwRH3AyIO4YKg9EUbMfUmJhanaQoa20a7VQ6S566vi1cYx-kErS811_orWoX9xkrTuXqpKN4_U8KDiaBgmhSB--c_L59UdS1_wKdmEd9e_M0SiHLr4uBjyusfqKzSG9eStmo0-QAbLg%3D%3D)
---

Friend,

I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress.

My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short!

I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared.

If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority.

I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family.

Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed.

They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things.

And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials.

They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative.

And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them.

The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me.

---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d80ccf148b78487f8d9c70f385662068&_e=ZZuPPVRua1vd7cUSGw6KM3wle7oerghJSE4G1-6WrlcFLT5vO6dc_ftQ65OFnL0UyoD2BSDuKNkBjG4-COiFvSKPUSb4qGY_y230Euy14IwhIMQNqm_E9p14eoV8qO46j0dPr3G7lq4aoH49CcQzur8IrCTmwuKLy05fv3vm6AuwrEG1DadV6wQN5dMZv0kcsPT2GOt0uuVmBBeeYr701w8sga9d1JJ39o1TjWuSaOsgI-k2XYm2frkrrRixWXHdV3csTuV0dwqMo-z0NdBDJApYQlb9WIHEyvZw6tsGNt-bU5SsOwMug4gwzpm7XUagGynxVQG5kdivAr9UA04QLNQY2XVOldfQDRqtCclakouCXKTDFCpim60PyLA9Uqa477W19-Q50AMYo52NulX9Vq-uzF59ehgDTWSF-IklZaH0-KlDTAJT17piwOn1K1Xk5pX7rHeDOidcm3PZxFGUjtW40aY-tSF_5Xcb5h1f4OBEAJ0d0cWJIhz1yY51yxbWF-NzbNw5zhVb8fBToI8PcA%3D%3D)
---

I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d80ccf148b78487f8d9c70f385662068&_e=ZZuPPVRua1vd7cUSGw6KM3wle7oerghJSE4G1-6WrlcFLT5vO6dc_ftQ65OFnL0UyoD2BSDuKNkBjG4-COiFvSKPUSb4qGY_y230Euy14IwhIMQNqm_E9p14eoV8qO46j0dPr3G7lq4aoH49CcQzur8IrCTmwuKLy05fv3vm6AuwrEG1DadV6wQN5dMZv0kcsPT2GOt0uuVmBBeeYr701w8sga9d1JJ39o1TjWuSaOsgI-k2XYm2frkrrRixWXHdV3csTuV0dwqMo-z0NdBDJApYQlb9WIHEyvZw6tsGNt-bU5SsOwMug4gwzpm7XUagGynxVQG5kdivAr9UA04QLNQY2XVOldfQDRqtCclakouCXKTDFCpim60PyLA9Uqa4vmrSt8dlPs7BLyv3uwqUIV898519UiDoOKcgej4G1kAVW6p5SItY7FXv7Zdrd9DXQrL5pUlBUGv-R0__YLcQ6iAkvY0P0P9q6cZ88Td8EHi_eNsdYGiC9WLW-wMSq-MuZ5Opq4ltSw5DNkXw5aMk9A%3D%3D)
---

Early voting begins in just a few days. That makes this the most important race in the nation right now.

I hope you'll step up & stand with me today to defeat the Democrats & hold the House Majority.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d80ccf148b78487f8d9c70f385662068&_e=ZZuPPVRua1vd7cUSGw6KM3wle7oerghJSE4G1-6WrlcFLT5vO6dc_ftQ65OFnL0UyoD2BSDuKNkBjG4-COiFvSKPUSb4qGY_y230Euy14IwhIMQNqm_E9p14eoV8qO46j0dPr3G7lq4aoH49CcQzur8IrCTmwuKLy05fv3vm6AuwrEG1DadV6wQN5dMZv0kcsPT2GOt0uuVmBBeeYr701w8sga9d1JJ39o1TjWuSaOsgI-k2XYm2frkrrRixWXHdV3csTuV0dwqMo-z0NdBDJApYQlb9WIHEyvZw6tsGNt-bU5SsOwMug4gwzpm7XUagGynxVQG5kdivAr9UA04QLNQY2XVOldfQDRqtCclakouCXKTDFCpim60PyLA9Uqa4NKcZ0ZmGbSoHqMTw01Lz3ur4F5LnFVFrXQg51c8gI3R1iPSchHk0HiEkKIVB3TxuCoKQ2czkPQc-EMn4610Tf4ygR0fjrhArlJeY115jlKDTC_VxHBZzT-_jrM1fRs7501aq2y2N4VsGXl3fZRpQIQ%3D%3D)

Mazi Melesa Pilip

My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short! I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared. If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority. I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family. Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed. They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things. And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials. They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative. And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them. The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me. | I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line. | | Early voting begins in just a few days. That makes this the most important race in the nation right now. I hope you'll step up & stand with me today to defeat the Democrats & hold the House Majority. | | And if I can ever help you the way you've helped me, please just say the word. All the best, Mazi Melesa Pilip GOP Nominee Special Election NY-03 | | | Paid for by Mazi Pilip for Congress 228 S Washington St STE 115 Alexandria, VA 22314 Reclaiming American Freedom PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dfbb6083b6cc4693996da02b604ed55a&_e=0P7DXWCo5Ry9u2KajUcToe1iYu8akcj5PYRVAXPbHChTfRNr0hzxL5PZWCKejav9xlvHqw1upF04VPe2P0UdIKGd5KismGdg2nOH3BdiElXIeuW5pEAvKDGnVKn3SZTOFuPk-ZgqUjcrlHs1Sgr3IwIMDinezgGWfCXdgL1G4LlexUBaAASFxvtpgeznLjWGZ8LSwzItmaw8kmgyI_-AxW7XBJFs0gClR4EO92i0nPQURikhBvbdSNRo5PiPOgOnPPHW9Wvjp_AwOUXyvI1n-icGGp6MiqVD6RLnYMOJ7-lQcrzZrfVWhq9RDvHprlXbE70K9iypSjgkxHWbXMbCyEiuiXNwVtPMYPDqkrlBSiDkS_nid4SCxzszudMEbkJIMCqxH_KHsv4dh9mubW3f2g%3D%3D)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dfbb6083b6cc4693996da02b604ed55a&_e=0P7DXWCo5Ry9u2KajUcToe1iYu8akcj5PYRVAXPbHChTfRNr0hzxL5PZWCKejav9xlvHqw1upF04VPe2P0UdIKGd5KismGdg2nOH3BdiElXIeuW5pEAvKDGnVKn3SZTOFuPk-ZgqUjcrlHs1Sgr3IwIMDinezgGWfCXdgL1G4LlexUBaAASFxvtpgeznLjWGZ8LSwzItmaw8kmgyI_-AxW7XBJFs0gClR4EO92i0nPS9srbvyWxOsgbmYD3kqgHnkqJeoWyfK3ufd4mr7-QrYjUgxhYX5xQCj_1YH8cnkuacu5RfDzYehfSCFNaERaQ_OwGX8n7CKL7VmMbGNchfxUfPCQcTEsC_tRYxI7zOPAVdNm-oew1Xce6ktyCl16Ni-bnAFNazb3pkECq0J6qAHQ%3D%3D)** That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dfbb6083b6cc4693996da02b604ed55a&_e=0P7DXWCo5Ry9u2KajUcToe1iYu8akcj5PYRVAXPbHChTfRNr0hzxL5PZWCKejav9xlvHqw1upF04VPe2P0UdIKGd5KismGdg2nOH3BdiElXIeuW5pEAvKDGnVKn3SZTOFuPk-ZgqUjcrlHs1Sgr3IwIMDinezgGWfCXdgL1G4LlexUBaAASFxvtpgeznLjWGZ8LSwzItmaw8kmgyI_-AxW7XBJFs0gClR4EO92i0nPQ2k8ZRTP_PpD7E7dXvJ4XoRIr8H76Xcn0lPf9F23VBjGWnPCQfOUOhK90wVUMF4v-6PzYxDODhpMTYdHadjklNOfcUAQuiEi0lPImZRMHjcJ3KawOm4q34CjiV31RIh0jspZ9s-_vklvj7ZqAQxWh5rdxmOOVLTLOdRSJvi_a0cg%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dfbb6083b6cc4693996da02b604ed55a&_e=0P7DXWCo5Ry9u2KajUcToe1iYu8akcj5PYRVAXPbHChTfRNr0hzxL5PZWCKejav9xlvHqw1upF04VPe2P0UdIKGd5KismGdg2nOH3BdiElXIeuW5pEAvKDGnVKn3SZTOFuPk-ZgqUjcrlHs1Sgr3IwIMDinezgGWfCXdgL1G4LlexUBaAASFxvtpgeznLjWGZ8LSwzItmaw8kmgyI_-AxW7XBJFs0gClR4EO92i0nPT8QjjG7xFPn3X9jphDdUt_rX_Kmn6BEBWyBL3Lvj7Azp5OpykP-okOwUAvyva_PhnO6WfpvYrC4XST1n7f6DA0v9sIiQ2Q3IcxmDvrMIu6stThsYzqp6ACGc-Zza8kiFn3--rXDvp_xb3uPYxiRI43unSRNa3FdqPWwKKzaS8JAA%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dfbb6083b6cc4693996da02b604ed55a&_e=0P7DXWCo5Ry9u2KajUcToe1iYu8akcj5PYRVAXPbHChTfRNr0hzxL5PZWCKejav9xlvHqw1upF04VPe2P0UdIKGd5KismGdg2nOH3BdiElXIeuW5pEAvKDGnVKn3SZTOFuPk-ZgqUjcrlHs1Sgr3IwIMDinezgGWfCXdgL1G4LlexUBaAASFxvtpgeznLjWGZ8LSwzItmaw8kmgyI_-AxW7XBJFs0gClR4EO92i0nPSezmsoGVBXyitt1jxb5ZDXJKCZncXSy2PYqXyNSp1Xe3A4k5t3Qo4SW2g1_arw1I2bl_YCedrSsdoHY8q9P6X-m8aO-M8_fRmBLBbcyRr8W1MC7ROMGvPkvZ0WaQc3gs2vVwlyx8n4USk5qxpjo00xG55IEYncKpa08bBYU4vsQQ%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate

**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.

clean_body: Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th? | | | | | | Friend, That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of: • Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction. If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, Winning this election requires a one-two punch: 1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day. In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again. | | With deepest appreciation, Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate | | | | | | | MY VISION My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future. | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389 Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389 | | | Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

clean_body: (Spoiler alert: It’s Marsha.) | She’s an anti-democracy extremist who tried to help Donald Trump steal the presidency from the people after he lost the election in 2020. She’s a danger to women and LGBTQ+ Tennsseeans — she’s determined to strip away our rights and freedoms. She’s been in Washington for 20 years, but has REFUSED to face her constituents at a town hall since 2017. Who is she? Marsha Blackburn. Peter, Marsha Blackburn has GOT to go, and Gloria is the leader who can defeat her — but ONLY with your help. We recently learned that Marsha has over $7 million in her campaign’s bank account. We had to raise our own goals to match. Gloria still needs another 750 donations before midnight Wednesday to hit her 1,000-donation mid-month goal, so there’s no time to lose! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let’s do this! Team Gloria | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. body:
Is George Soros winning?

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c684571%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A3Gxgqjy0KLvEaLIOk8jyw&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriot, **_Is George Soros winning?_** **_Absolutely not._** And here’s how I know: Since 2022, the American people have booted 15 Soros prosecutors out of office. It’s a great start -- but there are still 70+ Soros-funded prosecutors left to go. **_[>>> LET’S KEEP GOING <<<](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c684572%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=81lSN4qqn5Ogxi10fPo3Rw&sysid=1)_** Here’s the good news: Now that the word is out about what these radical activists are doing to our judicial system, the American people are desperate to kick them out of office. How desperate? **One of these radicals blew $1.1 MILLION on her race trying to cover up her record--and then lost to a guy who only spent $70K. 😲** _Yes, Soros prosecutors are THAT unpopular. But we need to put in the work to ACTUALLY remove them._ A few dollars can go SUCH a long way in these key local races. George Soros figured that out and uses this tactic to control prosecutorial elections --and now, so do we. **We’re _[Fair Courts America.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c684573%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xjXkKn624kEq%2bmd1JC6w1g&sysid=1)_ We are the ONLY organization taking a direct stand against Soros prosecutors. And it’s WORKING. It’s clear that the momentum is on our side.** But tracking these prosecutorial races across the country is a massive undertaking -- which is why there has not yet been a concerted effort to fight back against the network of dark money influence... _until now._ We’re taking Soros on head-to-head, but we can't do it without the support of patriots like you. __[**_Will you donate to our STOP SOROS FUND today?_**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c684574%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WZcsUXZD%2fH%2fqFhFulFu7Zg&sysid=1)

clean_body: After 2020 — when Donald Trump and Republicans tried to overturn the election results — we all know how important it is to protect our right to vote. | = | Hi there! After 2020 — when Donald Trump and Republicans tried to overturn the election results — we all know how important it is to protect our right to vote. That’s why our team at the California Democratic Party is investing in our Voter Protection Hotline. This hotline ensures that voters have a direct line to ask questions or report any irregularities that might prevent EVERY vote from being counted. But now we want to promote this hotline by launching stickers and flyers for organizers on the ground. This will help us get the word out far-and-wide about this resource for voters. = = = = = = We are so proud that the California Democratic Party leads the nation’s largest Voter Protection Team. This includes a team of volunteers and attorneys who work through election day to ensure that voters in all corners of the state have the ability to fairly and equally exercise their right to vote. And they are constantly waiting by the phones to answer any questions or address irregularities. But this tremendous resource isn’t living up to its full potential if California voters don’t know about it. = = Thank you! \- CADEM P.S. Don’t forget to share the CADEM Voter Protection Hotline with your friends and family! Call us with any voting related questions at 1-877-321-VOTE (8683)! | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. Congratulations, Friend. As a true patriot and reliable conservative, we have specifically chosen you because _we know you would make our 13x Match worth it._

Take this opportunity to have an impact seriously. You have to **act fast** because the deadline is **11:59 tonight** and meeting these deadlines is the only way to keep the majority.

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Fights to Keep Elections Honest
body:
For more than a decade, Judicial Watch has been fighting to keep elections free and fair. One of the key weapons in this battle is the National Voter Registration Act.

| | |
---
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Feb 12, 2024
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67032&L=31372&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcva2VlcC1lbGVjdGlvbnMtaG9uZXN0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=083cab9da3480809d8525c5990403168f5fb35488b0293b8ed3067c71729a51c) | **[Judicial Watch Fights to Keep Elections Honest](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67032&L=31372&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcva2VlcC1lbGVjdGlvbnMtaG9uZXN0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=083cab9da3480809d8525c5990403168f5fb35488b0293b8ed3067c71729a51c)** For more than a decade, Judicial Watch has been fighting to keep elections free and fair. One of the key weapons in this battle is the National Voter Registration Act. The NVRA directs the states to make “a reasonable effort” to remove from voting rolls “the names of ineligible voters” who have been disqualified from voting due to death or change of residence. States—red and blue, Republican and Democrat—often dodge this responsibility, creating opportunities for election fraud and opening the door to illegal votes swinging close contests. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67032&L=31372&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcva2VlcC1lbGVjdGlvbnMtaG9uZXN0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=083cab9da3480809d8525c5990403168f5fb35488b0293b8ed3067c71729a51c)

clean_body: For more than a decade, Judicial Watch has been fighting to keep elections free and fair. One of the key weapons in this battle is the National Voter Registration Act. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Feb 12, 2024 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | For more than a decade, Judicial Watch has been fighting to keep elections free and fair. One of the key weapons in this battle is the National Voter Registration Act. The NVRA directs the states to make “a reasonable effort” to remove from voting rolls “the names of ineligible voters” who have been disqualified from voting due to death or change of residence. States—red and blue, Republican and Democrat—often dodge this responsibility, creating opportunities for election fraud and opening the door to illegal votes swinging close contests. ---|--- | | | | | “These documents confirm the bureaucratic and political runaround the Biden administration went through to ultimately deny Robert F. Kennedy Jr. the requested Secret Service protection,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “The Biden administration’s refusal to provide Secret Service protection to Mr. Kennedy is dangerous and vindictive. Congress would do well to follow up on these disturbing documents uncovered by Judicial Watch’s FOIA investigation and lawsuit.” ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently it filed a public records lawsuit in the Superior Court for Suffolk County, Massachusetts, against the City of Boston after the city failed to produce records related to the “Electeds of Color Holiday Party” hosted by Boston Mayor Michelle Wu in December 2023. ---|--- | | | | | The Biden administration’s scandal-plagued initiative to combat misinformation has grown into a dynamic global effort run by handpicked “U.S. subject matter experts” and embedded with a mandate of Diversity, Equity, Inclusion, and Accessibility (DEIA). In the latest ploy to counter disinformation the administration is investing $50,000 to train journalists in the Islamic Republic of Pakistan. “The project will implement a program to build the capacity of 30 mid-to senior level Pakistani journalists/reporters from relatively new print, broadcast, and digital media outlets, to counter misinformation and disinformation in media reporting,” according to a grant announcement posted this week. ---|--- | | | Washington Examiner The new emails obtained by the legal watchdog Judicial Watch indicate that the decision to provide or deny protection is in the hands of Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas and congressional leaders, not the Secret Service. Newsmax Judicial Watch, claiming the FBI is engaged in a “cover-up” in the death of Ashli Babbitt, the U.S. Air Force veteran who was shot and killed during the Jan. 6, 2021, breach at the Capitol, has filed a lawsuit demanding the agency turn over any files it has about her and her husband Aaron. Judicial Watch “The law requires an ‘Election Day,’ not an ‘Election Week.’ Mississippi’s five-day extension of Election Day beyond the date set by Congress is illegal, violates the civil rights of voters, and encourages fraud,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2024, All Rights Reserved |

This Reddy to Listen event is the first of many to come, and I hope to see you at one of them. **[In the meantime, if you haven’t chipped in to support the campaign yet, I hope you’ll do so here. ** __Meet Dr. Prasanth Reddy:__** Dr. Reddy is a cancer physician and immigrant who's lived the American Dream. In the aftermath of 9/11, he answered his country's call. He became a citizen, joined the U.S. Air Force Reserve, and still serves as Lt. Colonel today. Dr. Reddy is running for Congress against a Democrat who votes with Joe Biden 100% of the time, in one of the most competitive House districts in the country. Dr. Reddy is a different kind of candidate. He's an outsider, a problem solver, and someone who's spent his career taking action. Let's flip Kansas' 3rd District and send an independent voice to Congress. **[Chip in here or below.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/f42eea1d87c298383947229f28c3afba/09449da94c9c7e48c3d6b838967d376c/43823)**

name: Full Mag News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6b7f3067e131431caef3fe156423d261&_e=r5QINvTRgpOnmgY2Hw9kwQJaGxiM5qt6viSHhvlEKwF4nIQn04Xbvh8Ss163SjL1dtZFHxVllzLkqO2shPDtT-9zYVOQU4q5tWbmjtT4fhQA2Ls8acpK5LBZFpAGodW8aqS1mxYmUptRHImhTM6DgNqwU7iXcGnllA9Nn2zU8VdnseXJcCnmGefgF_2yRahCmHbkMUT0Gsq0bckMggfBodDlbvky2CD-XhcMlmMIN0uhYlFrwz2GfT8iz0fJU2_YMTMJs7-1sN5bkY6VSXvC3zyRQtTJ0R5SN-YCcq1tuHpZrb5pRF1S5i-hAmRIDiXsg4j4oRYABcSzK220Jwq1jM8DUj69XJHUdJ331M209s2bFOUh2Az36xiMBwI9G5rYKSS7WmWF0MmFXF8loKf9uy1MuWlbx_SDx_c_iDNUlLU%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [ ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6b7f3067e131431caef3fe156423d261&_e=r5QINvTRgpOnmgY2Hw9kwQJaGxiM5qt6viSHhvlEKwF4nIQn04Xbvh8Ss163SjL1dtZFHxVllzLkqO2shPDtT-9zYVOQU4q5tWbmjtT4fhQA2Ls8acpK5LBZFpAGodW8aqS1mxYmUptRHImhTM6DgNqwU7iXcGnllA9Nn2zU8VdnseXJcCnmGefgF_2yRahCmHbkMUT0Gsq0bckMggfBodDlbvky2CD-XhcMlmMIN0uhYlFrwz2GfT8iz0fJU2_YMTMJs7-1sN5bkY6VSXvC3z-3Q97PPLIfxqTG7noNoFpQhUAVv8tone_Rxp6r4Owt7sIqmgIfrtcL5y8162tnud_hpOfcngzAa7sPQRgMGl8l_kx3t1ba_XCcR6Qpzrpz_w-rpdt7Xcd-M2Z0xfBsjbjr8eUeElU0u_twjWNkZEI%3D) That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6b7f3067e131431caef3fe156423d261&_e=r5QINvTRgpOnmgY2Hw9kwQJaGxiM5qt6viSHhvlEKwF4nIQn04Xbvh8Ss163SjL1dtZFHxVllzLkqO2shPDtT-9zYVOQU4q5tWbmjtT4fhQA2Ls8acpK5LBZFpAGodW8aqS1mxYmUptRHImhTM6DgNqwU7iXcGnllA9Nn2zU8VdnseXJcCnmGefgF_2yRahCmHbkMUT0Gsq0bckMggfBodDlbvky2CD-XhcMlmMIN0uhYlFrwz2GfT8iz0fJU2_YMTMJs7-1sN5bkY6VSXvC353nvt1nZhgZKn1zebFcFzY_VnaGxQlSpZMlYqBXReZA6OgD50aTXtsstn8tAmie-JjMlHXrKR3-Lchum0x2PzgoGvGZaFCEzeSm34_shPtEgbXyHura72NDWLAq9KGWKpAGGs378T2Kt6etJJZ--p8%3D)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

subject: This is what momentum looks like

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78872911/454722531/-531765509?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWI2NzM1OC1jY2M5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A18M0qdhJraAQH5c0qQe44BnPTENM-wvTjuNR8h144s=&emci=cd8d9483-7ac7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=f9b67358-ccc9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=10203249) Team — Eugene DePasquale is running for Attorney General to defend our democracy, protect access to abortion, and stand up for the rights of every Pennslvanian.

If you'd like to change your subscription status [follow this link.](https://saveamerica.nucleusemail.com/amplify/subscriptions/unsubscribe?hids=%recipient.hids%)

name: Team GIFFORDS
subject: We won’t rest
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It’s up to all of us to change the direction our country is headed.
#

Nearly every American will personally know at least one victim of gun violence in their lifetime.
**Let that sink in.**
Many of us in this movement already know someone. One is too many, yet some of us know far more than that. The daily tragedies are what led so many of us to join this movement.
It doesn’t have to be this way. But it’s up to all of us to change the direction our country is headed.
Gabby and all of us here at GIFFORDS won’t rest until we achieve a future where everyone can thrive without worrying about the daily threat of gun violence.
[**If you’re with us, will you please make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today? Your donation—no matter how big or small—goes right towards our work to end our nation’s gun violence epidemic.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb24.CYoP11&refcode=em240212-1-30&t=1&akid=7625%2E3935704%2E8PWYWc)
