name: =?utf-8?Q?Brady=20Batt=2C=20WAGOP?=
subject: WAGOP State Convention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
All Republicans can join us in Spokane from April 18 - 20 for a fun, engaging, and informative week as we build unity for the 2024 elections.

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=029814e44bc04d66aa081ee4f8a7824b&_e=pnBA2eujCaiTZPE5LNPdwT9bOaLFDiSEqq5Xq8t3rYqbR4xicw2lb_1FNOUFOLEeUBfOdzZ9fFdXe7cNcOSVuYysM_A2PBxCAbCgvdOgND1N1pyeMpUoXQ7ynT9Xr0Tif_oXgRKtohm4eM18HvXnXMHE3S1MDTPy5QPeEbfIcfMNnW4ucEY4zT446wChXbH0lVbjZqbSXi6URzz2QxnLkixCV4R3Jkj8IobwMtlYyTFx3A23g5lheFSEJ5cVVaTsrV5g80RxwMJ1hU1YpqV5YD9IgFkXzlpDNaJ8inrnMLG989SW565mpkhAYpC8iI8MEJyR9BaExDvvPmSgIqnES9JAYw2mBaaX5igfaB4gYFd6CNzHMzL3Do3Vuc8N6uN_b-m2kf-dttIzMjKroJ9lVqYeqW00qgdQn8VRSmlh320%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=029814e44bc04d66aa081ee4f8a7824b&_e=pnBA2eujCaiTZPE5LNPdwT9bOaLFDiSEqq5Xq8t3rYqbR4xicw2lb_1FNOUFOLEeUBfOdzZ9fFdXe7cNcOSVuYysM_A2PBxCAbCgvdOgND1N1pyeMpUoXQ7ynT9Xr0Tif_oXgRKtohm4eM18HvXnXMHE3S1MDTPy5QPeEbfIcfMNnW4ucEY4zT446wChXbH0lVbjZqbSXi6URzz2QxnLkixCV4R3Jkj8IobwMtlYyTFx3A23g5lheFSEJ5cVVaTsrV5g80RxwMJ1hU1YpqV5YPdiQuqXDQLRmUnD1sdJwBS_xhTZSPyLzSdsmuuSIULf3p8OmhssOilUDO0pAauQvQYslucnXMg2gRBbAoyaM7sP04t3f07NmlAPuts-Wy3ZTC7qs-4d7FQC8-KBvQ46HzmxrDJ5BYoj6z1b20PJAg4%3D) That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=029814e44bc04d66aa081ee4f8a7824b&_e=pnBA2eujCaiTZPE5LNPdwT9bOaLFDiSEqq5Xq8t3rYqbR4xicw2lb_1FNOUFOLEeUBfOdzZ9fFdXe7cNcOSVuYysM_A2PBxCAbCgvdOgND1N1pyeMpUoXQ7ynT9Xr0Tif_oXgRKtohm4eM18HvXnXMHE3S1MDTPy5QPeEbfIcfMNnW4ucEY4zT446wChXbH0lVbjZqbSXi6URzz2QxnLkixCV4R3Jkj8IobwMtlYyTFx3A23g5lheFSEJ5cVVaTsrV5g80RxwMJ1hU1YpqV5YDKXAlRLGr46llgXbc4GWGiWoQDy0H7NusIjIQ-HRUyjXaToCjcKVoMShGqAN1HBrxBxdZ_GzaO81BthkEgbllpg_E1VNsvW1V7K7mEt7uw5IYcCb3HFdkMioP-HezDHG_vckj96mMnfNOEQwP_dLs0%3D)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Taking the Hill
subject: Happy Monday - 3 Quick Things
body:
https://www.takingthehillpac.com/ [https://www.takingthehillpac.com/]
Happy Monday - what an awesome Super Bowl! Was with the 49ers #1 fan - Speaker Emeritus Nancy Pelosi in Las Vegas - what a game. Three quick things for you this morning:
First, will be on Fox News Outnumbered today 12-1 to chat about the ‘Civics Initiative’ to launch civics initiatives in our middle schools. I’m partnering with my friend & former West Point Constitutional Law professor/congressman Tom Rooney in launching this. See more information on my LinkedIn post & please share it;
Secondly, really hoping you can join us in Washington DC as we honor two Army Veterans who are current Members of Congress during ‘Black History Month.’ See more information here with our Taking the Hill PAC;
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takingthehill_24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takingthehill_24]
Lastly, appreciate all you do as part of our family & guided by our Constitution’s preamble helping make our country a ‘More Perfect Union.’ We have the greatest country in the world because of citizens like you who care to make it better every day for our next generation. Thank you!
Have an awesome week!
Honorable Patrick J. Murphy
32nd Under Secretary of the Army
@PatrickMurphyPA
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/106220/images/IMG_6082.jpg]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takingthehill]

subject: A View from the Campaign Trail 🌟
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
It's been another dynamic week on the campaign trail, marked by significant events and an interview with WIBC's Kendall & Casey.

https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a216400a02-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_12_02_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a216400a02-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Friends and fellow Hoosiers,

It's been another dynamic week filled with purpose and progress on the campaign trail, marked by significant strides and meaningful engagements, including an interview with WIBC's Kendall & Casey and a day touring Madison.

Read on for the highlights!

** IN THE NEWS: I (https://wibc.com/256335/suzanne-crouch-talks-taxes-fallout-from-covid-and-more/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a216400a02-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_12_02_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a216400a02-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) nterview with WIBC's Kendall & Casey (https://wibc.com/256335/suzanne-crouch-talks-taxes-fallout-from-covid-and-more/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a216400a02-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_12_02_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a216400a02-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------

COVID-19 showed us the cracks in our system, but I refuse to let history repeat itself. No more government overreach, no more mandates. It's time for Indiana to take back control.

Listen to my interview with 93.1 WIBC-FM (https://www.facebook.com/93wibc?__cft__[0]=AZVfEQE_CnA1Uow0C6sZt_CuZc74o-j1ox7wpcpiKmjyHyEgiHNx0q_v3dMfh-8dxQTle8D6Vw4tI367zawFZuEmAnufHN5atMtZkShDyEMJCiJw0cF1aQSFt2KO-vggAvrLK9Ua24L2JntEtSsBYWR0leF0e8mH4V3zpuuIWYdXSjmWOf2aAlz0_LoIWjHDqrI&__tn__=-]K-R&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a216400a02-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_12_02_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a216400a02-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ’s Kendall & Casey (https://www.facebook.com/KendallandCasey?__cft__[0]=AZVfEQE_CnA1Uow0C6sZt_CuZc74o-j1ox7wpcpiKmjyHyEgiHNx0q_v3dMfh-8dxQTle8D6Vw4tI367zawFZuEmAnufHN5atMtZkShDyEMJCiJw0cF1aQSFt2KO-vggAvrLK9Ua24L2JntEtSsBYWR0leF0e8mH4V3zpuuIWYdXSjmWOf2aAlz0_LoIWjHDqrI&__tn__=-]K-R&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a216400a02-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_12_02_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a216400a02-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) for the full scoop.
https://wibc.com/256335/suzanne-crouch-talks-taxes-fallout-from-covid-and-more/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a216400a02-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_12_02_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a216400a02-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
TAP TO LISTEN IN (https://wibc.com/256335/suzanne-crouch-talks-taxes-fallout-from-covid-and-more/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a216400a02-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_12_02_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a216400a02-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** IN THE NEWS: I called for an independent audit of FSSA (https://indianacapitalchronicle.com/briefs/crouch-calls-for-fssa-audit-following-1b-shortfall-medicaid-changes/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a216400a02-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_12_02_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a216400a02-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------

Last Tuesday, I called for an independent audit of FSSA to ensure accountability and transparency following the $1 billion Medicaid overspend.

Hoosier families deserve answers, and we must ensure that critical programs for medically complex children remain intact.
https://indianacapitalchronicle.com/briefs/crouch-calls-for-fssa-audit-following-1b-shortfall-medicaid-changes/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a216400a02-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_12_02_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a216400a02-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
READ THE ARTICLE (https://indianacapitalchronicle.com/briefs/crouch-calls-for-fssa-audit-following-1b-shortfall-medicaid-changes/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a216400a02-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_12_02_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a216400a02-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Meeting with the Miami County Republican Party
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/reel/1055010348901326?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a216400a02-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_12_02_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a216400a02-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Last week kicked off with a productive meeting with the Miami County Republican Party.

It was wonderful to connect with fellow party members and discuss my bold vision for the future of Indiana.

** 'Women for Crouch' Event
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/reel/1055010348901326?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a216400a02-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_12_02_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a216400a02-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

My first 'Women for Crouch' event was an incredible success, with over 300 women in attendance.

It was a powerful gathering of strong, passionate women from diverse backgrounds and perspectives, all united and ready for change!

** Touring Madison, Indiana
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.wrtv.com/news/state-news/newborn-surrendered-in-southern-indiana-safe-haven-baby-box?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a216400a02-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_12_02_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a216400a02-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

I️ spent Friday in Madison, Indiana, visiting several facilities and local businesses and meeting with members of the community.

The day included stops at Madison Precision Products and the global headquarters of Grote Industries, as well as a visit with residents at River Terrance Assisted Living.

** Visiting Hanover College's Science Center
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.wrtv.com/news/state-news/newborn-surrendered-in-southern-indiana-safe-haven-baby-box?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a216400a02-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_12_02_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a216400a02-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

I had the pleasure of meeting with students and faculty at Hanover College's Science Center, discussing the importance of education and innovation in driving Indiana forward.

** Children's Advocacy Center of Southeastern Indiana Mardi Gras fundraiser
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.wrtv.com/news/state-news/newborn-surrendered-in-southern-indiana-safe-haven-baby-box?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a216400a02-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_12_02_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a216400a02-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Additionally, I had the honor of attending the Children’s Advocacy Center of South Indiana’s Mardi Gras fundraiser, where over 600 Hoosiers came together to support the invaluable work of the Center.

** ICYMI: Endorsements (https://crouchforindiana.com/endorsements/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a216400a02-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_12_02_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a216400a02-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------
Suzanne Crouch is the only gubernatorial candidate who has been endorsed by more than 100 past and present elected officials in Indiana. A full list of those endorsements can be found here. (https://crouchforindiana.com/endorsements/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a216400a02-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_12_02_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a216400a02-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Last but not least...
------------------------------------------------------------
Your steadfast support remains the cornerstone of this campaign's success.

With each interaction and every shared moment, we are one step closer to realizing our collective vision of a stronger, more prosperous Indiana.

Onward and upward,

Let's keep the conversation going! Follow me on social to keep up with the campaign. Have questions, comments or concerns? Send me an email!

clean_body: It's been another dynamic week on the campaign trail, marked by significant events and an interview with WIBC's Kendall & Casey. Friends and fellow Hoosiers, It's been another dynamic week filled with purpose and progress on the campaign trail, marked by significant strides and meaningful engagements, including an interview with WIBC's Kendall & Casey and a day touring Madison. Read on for the highlights! IN THE NEWS: I () nterview with WIBC's Kendall & Casey () COVID-19 showed us the cracks in our system, but I refuse to let history repeat itself. No more government overreach, no more mandates. It's time for Indiana to take back control. Listen to my interview with 93.1 WIBC-FM () ’s Kendall & Casey () for the full scoop. TAP TO LISTEN IN () IN THE NEWS: I called for an independent audit of FSSA () Last Tuesday, I called for an independent audit of FSSA to ensure accountability and transparency following the $1 billion Medicaid overspend. Hoosier families deserve answers, and we must ensure that critical programs for medically complex children remain intact. READ THE ARTICLE () Meeting with the Miami County Republican Party Last week kicked off with a productive meeting with the Miami County Republican Party. It was wonderful to connect with fellow party members and discuss my bold vision for the future of Indiana. 'Women for Crouch' Event My first 'Women for Crouch' event was an incredible success, with over 300 women in attendance. It was a powerful gathering of strong, passionate women from diverse backgrounds and perspectives, all united and ready for change! Touring Madison, Indiana I️ spent Friday in Madison, Indiana, visiting several facilities and local businesses and meeting with members of the community. The day included stops at Madison Precision Products and the global headquarters of Grote Industries, as well as a visit with residents at River Terrance Assisted Living. Visiting Hanover College's Science Center I had the pleasure of meeting with students and faculty at Hanover College's Science Center, discussing the importance of education and innovation in driving Indiana forward. Children's Advocacy Center of Southeastern Indiana Mardi Gras fundraiser Additionally, I had the honor of attending the Children’s Advocacy Center of South Indiana’s Mardi Gras fundraiser, where over 600 Hoosiers came together to support the invaluable work of the Center. ICYMI: Endorsements () Suzanne Crouch is the only gubernatorial candidate who has been endorsed by more than 100 past and present elected officials in Indiana. A full list of those endorsements can be found here. () Last but not least... Your steadfast support remains the cornerstone of this campaign's success. With each interaction and every shared moment, we are one step closer to realizing our collective vision of a stronger, more prosperous Indiana. Onward and upward, Let's keep the conversation going! Follow me on social to keep up with the campaign. Have questions, comments or concerns? Send me an email! Facebook () Twitter () Instagram () Website () mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com Email (mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com) Get Involved! Ready to make an impact? By joining my campaign, there are several ways that YOU can be a catalyst for change! Tap the "Get Involved" button below to get hands-on with the campaign, request yard signs, host an event and more. GET INVOLVED () Attend one of my upcoming fundraisers! Your support plays a pivotal role in our mission to connect with Hoosiers across the state and convey our vision for Indiana's future. If you'd like to be a part of our journey and attend one of our upcoming fundraisers, here's the list of events: For more information or to RSVP, contact Heather at: heather@crouchforindiana.com (mailto:heather@crouchforindiana.com) or 615-438-3531 (tel:6154383531) . DONATE () Show Your Support - Get Suzanne Crouch Merchandise! As our campaign gains momentum, I'm excited to introduce a way for you to show your support and wear your pride for Indiana on your sleeve (literally)! SHOP () DONATE () ============================================================ Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch Copyright © 2024 Suzanne Crouch for Indiana, All rights reserved.

Friend,
---
Here are some troubling facts about Biden’s Border Crisis:
---
1. In December, more than 302,000 illegal immigrants were documented attempting to cross our southern border.

---
**That’s larger than the populations of Kenosha, Racine, Janesville, and Beloit combined.**
---
1. If these numbers remain steady, over 600,000 illegal immigrants will attempt to cross our southern border every 2 months.

---
**That’s more than the entire population of Milwaukee.**
---
Joe Biden and the Democrats have facilitated a complete crisis at our southern border.
---
The Biden Administration refuses to adopt common-sense policies to secure our border, which **emboldens drug cartels** and **makes our communities less safe.**
---
We have a big opportunity coming this November to rid ourselves of the far-left open border policies that caused this mess to begin with.
---
Until then, I’m going to continue doing everything in my power to SECURE the southern border and put an end to this humanitarian disaster.
---
But **dark money** liberal groups are continuing to target me for supporting these common-sense policies and standing up to the Biden-Harris immigration agenda.
---
I need your support so I can keep fighting to secure our southern border.
---

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=eda999050e134d80a2cdc92479bcf599&_e=Pq2p98lacecbkbr5rhuD5YWyINS5sovfaaw0FTfCdVioI0SoE_qJXuUrVA833kN1qFC7khR625z94RQ5KBDLIltbYaC6adpTXAMabSot_fgAm81Ciqj4U0b2Xw6Vd3vY8SVWhYV7Mk0xEgkZ9LEvmbzfbYe9yvJnsoAtOSgcs5cuYMdPPUYcilIlaD1c0upXogfLHRsMWQ3lZ8VWSHTflJo_7jJMQM-XGlhCR3ILqq17R6ijmWn9IEK6Mx4chiJ2ZtAgk6FzkqToxFhwk0OZNC9JjzXwthTlN7i8axR9A_UG75xo0gAIeOgdA5v5Jrr1vkjBjnMLCMfiHMkJHvikWBJWzQZ1IqXdmUK4lMhiesW4tomFiuEVBdMXfbXKjnjBImEWwKpPWEXLSMUL1LACV9sGRoduLVtuNVGStCxXcfU%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=eda999050e134d80a2cdc92479bcf599&_e=Pq2p98lacecbkbr5rhuD5YWyINS5sovfaaw0FTfCdVioI0SoE_qJXuUrVA833kN1qFC7khR625z94RQ5KBDLIltbYaC6adpTXAMabSot_fgAm81Ciqj4U0b2Xw6Vd3vY8SVWhYV7Mk0xEgkZ9LEvmbzfbYe9yvJnsoAtOSgcs5cuYMdPPUYcilIlaD1c0upXogfLHRsMWQ3lZ8VWSHTflJo_7jJMQM-XGlhCR3ILqq17R6ijmWn9IEK6Mx4chiJ2ZtAgk6FzkqToxFhwk0OZNMB3CfWJPeJxyNv7q-YAoTLBwFyAYPvC0cNOVg404HKoEm8G2ArQKNyyxiS2fwy-52mHZv-5SE8036xzILCw-sP6k-HNvgK3ZQeAyJ03imTvymfepNt4vuqXHCaB97utXPnbBaRrIEmXi9YHSi2q0Xk%3D) That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=eda999050e134d80a2cdc92479bcf599&_e=Pq2p98lacecbkbr5rhuD5YWyINS5sovfaaw0FTfCdVioI0SoE_qJXuUrVA833kN1qFC7khR625z94RQ5KBDLIltbYaC6adpTXAMabSot_fgAm81Ciqj4U0b2Xw6Vd3vY8SVWhYV7Mk0xEgkZ9LEvmbzfbYe9yvJnsoAtOSgcs5cuYMdPPUYcilIlaD1c0upXogfLHRsMWQ3lZ8VWSHTflJo_7jJMQM-XGlhCR3ILqq17R6ijmWn9IEK6Mx4chiJ2ZtAgk6FzkqToxFhwk0OZNBaj13iRWRqH-7xrFWAl4vHQpHEcghlPTQXNRjzTgkI80i0ybVZVbmu0QxPfvcFGp1-JUGEjYDq84JzKuNHKtaFV4NxjoJoer7_4znnDBE1D5DAwpz5ychTrn3PAuT0nfEBkG6H9sST9zLZPqKX9cy8%3D)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. Hi friend,
Today we kick off the 2024 legislative session and get back to the task we were elected to do: build a Minnesota that works better for everyone. Our House DFL majority will be focused on strong public education, affordable health care, economic security, and investing in our state’s infrastructure.
I am looking forward to working with our partners in the Senate and Governor Walz to pass legislation that improves the lives of Minnesotans, but we need to protect this good work. If extreme MAGA Republicans are able to take the Minnesota House, they will undo the progress we’ve made. We can’t let that happen.
Friend, we’re going to be working hard for Minnesotans this session, but we need your help to keep it up. Will you help protect our House DFL majority by making a donation today?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-feb24?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=021224]

Melissa Hortman

body:
The rule of law in our country is teetering on a knife’s edge

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z84flg3v7rn4jq1vj871afp8hrnrduiuq9vjcgg8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37ctjm1o72cph2bs)

**I’m terrified for my son's future.**

_Because the rule of law in our country is teetering on a knife’s edge._

Police are openly beaten in the streets, illegal immigrants violate our laws freely, and defending yourself is enough to be thrown in **PRISON.**

That’s the #1 reason I’m running for Congress in Alaska’s ONLY House seat - to SAVE our country before it’s too late.

My name is Nick Begich. You likely haven’t heard of me before, but I’m a father, a husband, a faithful Christian, and a conservative pro-Trump Republican.

And my race is the most **HOTLY** contested in the nation.

Why? Because Democrats know it’s where they are most vulnerable. Alaska’s House seat is THE most Republican district in the country to have a Democrat representative, and the D.C. Swamp is doing ANYTHING to keep her in power.

They know that if I flip this seat **RED** , I’ll put the brakes on their RADICAL agenda in Congress.

That’s why Democrats have already raised over **$71,000,000** to destroy my chances in November.

In these difficult times for our country, Democrats are yet again trying to destroy the trust in our elections.
I am determined in my commitment to support election integrity and safeguard our elections. We need to stop election fraud and pass legislation that will restore trust in our elections for voters. Peter,

In a recent interview with _The Hill,_ Sen. Rick Scott (R-FL) attacked his challenger, EMILYs List-endorsed candidate **Debbie Mucarsel-Powell** , after she rightfully called out his support for a national abortion ban.

Sen. Scott can run for reelection, but he can't hide from his voting record.

While in the Senate, Scott co-sponsored a 15-week ban that would have mandated _prison sentences_ for doctors performing abortions. Last April, Scott stated that he would have proudly signed Florida's 6-week abortion ban into law if he were still governor.

It's simple, Peter: _If Sen. Rick Scott wins his reelection campaign, he _will_ use his vote in the Senate to pass a national abortion ban._

That's why EMILYs List is proud to endorse **Debbie Mucarsel-Powell** to flip this seat in November and send Scott and his anti-choice agenda packing. The _overwhelming majority_ of Floridians and Americans support abortion rights, and they deserve a leader who reflects those values on the Senate floor.
**Debbie is going to need the full support of this pro-choice community to DEFEAT Sen. Scott in November, Peter. Donate now to help Senate challengers like Debbie send anti-choice extremists packing >>**

subject: Big News from Mandela and The Long Run:
body:
Mandela Barnes and The Long Run are proud to endorse:

Rudy Salas, CA-22

Rudy is running to flip CA-22 and defeat his extremist opponent. He ran the closest Democratic challenger race last November despite having $16 million spent against him. The Central Valley deserves better and Rudy is running to deliver that for all working families in his district.

Lanon Baccam, IA-03

Lanon is running for Congress because he believes all Iowans should have the opportunities afforded to him and his family: access to good-paying jobs, affordable health care, the ability to retire with dignity, and protection of women’s reproductive freedoms. As a Veteran, public servant, and father, Lanon will go to Washington to get things done for Iowans – regardless of party and background.

Michelle Vallejo, TX-15

Michelle is running to defeat far-right Republican Monica De La Cruz and represent TX-15 in Congress. She plans to advocate for all South Texans, bring down healthcare costs, help small businesses grow, defend our seniors, stand up for our veterans, and make quality education affordable for all.

Adam Hollier, MI-13
Veteran Adam Hollier is running to represent Michigan's 13th district in Congress. Born and raised in Detroit, Adam has fought tirelessly to uplift his community through initiatives like removing lead pipes, supporting literacy in Detroit schools, and establishing a Black equity fund. With his commitment to service, he is the right candidate to represent Michigan’s 13th District in Congress.

Janelle Bynum, OR-05

Janelle Bynum is a State Representative, small business owner, and mother of four running for Congress in Oregon’s 5th Congressional District – one of the most competitive, Republican-held seats in the country. She is running to unseat extremist Republican Rep. Lori Chavez-Deremer in Oregon’s 5th Congressional District.

Mandela and The Long Run are excited to endorse their newest round of pro-democracy changemakers in critical House races nationwide.

These candidates are the key to regaining the Democratic House majority and these endorsements are the beginning of the change we will fight for this November.

If you support our mission, please contribute to The Long Run to fuel our movement to elect and support changemaking candidates across the country.

CONTRIBUTE: https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/3523?akid=5207%2E196590%2EX00eIH

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.mandelabarnes.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=5207%2E196590%2EX00eIH

name: Rick Larsen
subject: You see buses? I see a generational promise kept by Democrats.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
Another victory for Northwest Washington.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78875709/454731864/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWU3ZmE0MS1kMmM5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ln6YoRsOG2Q8iv8Q34hKBWOQzTDskw87oYL5eqvgY38=&emci=2bcc6b2b-87c7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=d5e7fa41-d2c9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **I cannot stress just how important it is that Democrats led the passage of the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law back in 2021.** Another example of how it helps Northwest Washington: **earlier this month, the Environmental Protection Agency shipped out over $11 million that will fund 33 electric buses across 17 school districts here at home.** This is part of the EPA's Clean School Bus Program, which will do two critical things right off the bat: get kids safely to school while reducing our dependence on fossil fuels. And that does not even begin to get into the benefits for public health, the jobs created, the transportation efficiencies... **The point is that when looked at alongside every other project like this funded by the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, you know what I see? A generational promise kept by Democrats.** When someone grouses about the state of politics, or says it does not matter who wins or who loses in elections anymore, remember good laws like this — and then consider the circus Republicans continue to run in Washington D.C. **It does matter who wins in November. It matters a lot.** _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: Another victory for Northwest Washington. | | | | I cannot stress just how important it is that Democrats led the passage of the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law back in 2021. Another example of how it helps Northwest Washington: earlier this month, the Environmental Protection Agency shipped out over $11 million that will fund 33 electric buses across 17 school districts here at home. This is part of the EPA's Clean School Bus Program, which will do two critical things right off the bat: get kids safely to school while reducing our dependence on fossil fuels. And that does not even begin to get into the benefits for public health, the jobs created, the transportation efficiencies... The point is that when looked at alongside every other project like this funded by the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, you know what I see? A generational promise kept by Democrats. When someone grouses about the state of politics, or says it does not matter who wins or who loses in elections anymore, remember good laws like this — and then consider the circus Republicans continue to run in Washington D.C. It does matter who wins in November. It matters a lot. * * *
**Late last month, I was proud to stand alongside hundreds of Arizonans in Phoenix at the Women’s March.** I’m fired up to protect abortion rights and keep GOP bans off of our bodies.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78876488/454735044/-401216107?refcode=em-2.12.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzE2YjEwZDItZDNjOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c-YD5I2EHoKt9xExaliVlu2XNPPBx44bhB8kn9i7rqY=)
I’m making it a priority to speak with voters across AZ-01. **I attended the LD 2 Democrats meeting and Optimists Resist meeting where it was great to hear from people in the district about the issues most important to them!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78876489/454735045/-401216107?refcode=em-2.12.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzE2YjEwZDItZDNjOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c-YD5I2EHoKt9xExaliVlu2XNPPBx44bhB8kn9i7rqY=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78876490/454735046/-401216107?refcode=em-2.12.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzE2YjEwZDItZDNjOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c-YD5I2EHoKt9xExaliVlu2XNPPBx44bhB8kn9i7rqY=)
**I also had the opportunity to speak at the Northwest Democratic Breakfast Club CD1 Candidate Forum.** It was wonderful to talk to voters about my vision for this district-but more important is hearing from smart caring voters what they’re worried about.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78876491/454735047/-401216107?refcode=em-2.12.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzE2YjEwZDItZDNjOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c-YD5I2EHoKt9xExaliVlu2XNPPBx44bhB8kn9i7rqY=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78876494/454735048/-401216107?refcode=em-2.12.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzE2YjEwZDItZDNjOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c-YD5I2EHoKt9xExaliVlu2XNPPBx44bhB8kn9i7rqY=)

Your support means the world to me. clean_body: | = Hi there, I wanted to share a few highlights from the campaign trail these past few weeks. We’re working tirelessly in this race to unseat David Schweikert. He’s got to go! Thanks to your help, momentum in our campaign is building every day. = | **= Late last month, I was proud to stand alongside hundreds of Arizonans in Phoenix at the Women’s March. I’m fired up to protect abortion rights and keep GOP bans off of our bodies. = I’m making it a priority to speak with voters across AZ-01. I attended the LD 2 Democrats meeting and Optimists Resist meeting where it was great to hear from people in the district about the issues most important to them! = = I also had the opportunity to speak at the Northwest Democratic Breakfast Club CD1 Candidate Forum. It was wonderful to talk to voters about my vision for this district-but more important is hearing from smart caring voters what they’re worried about. = Here’s what’s clear to me: the more voters I meet the more I feel support grow and momentum build. And here’s the evidence: We received the results from our quarterly fundraising report, and I’m so proud to say that we outraised David Schweikert thanks to overwhelming commitment from Arizonans. = = Thank you, Marlene **=** | Marlene's campaign to flip AZ-01 is being built from the ground up with grassroots support! = To learn more about Marlene and how she's fighting for Arizona families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS Marlene for Congress 7904 E. Chaparral Road, Suite A110-472 Scottsdale, AZ 85250 United States

| Peter,
We wanted to remind you why Russell is running for Congress.
Russell knows that Chris Pappas is no longer the right choice to represent the values and people of the Granite State.
Chris has forgotten the Live Free or Die values that the people of New Hampshire pride themselves on.
Chris is more worried about the issues in the DC beltway rather than the issues that are affecting New Hampshire.
Russell himself said in his campaign announcement speech that:
"Granite Staters are ready for a change in our representation in Congress, whether it's rising energy costs or the opioid epidemic. The broken southern border or a lack of support for our men and women in law enforcement. The rising debt and daily attempts to infringe on our personal liberties.
Chris Pappas has failed New Hampshire - But Russell needs YOUR help to make a change!
[Please contribute any amount to help Russell reach his February mid-month goal to ensure he keeps the momentum to defeat Chris Pappas in November!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VAjor8MwAmu1ruafOlX5GQEyAVh7y5MfXXRi3cwq5nnV8uVRWc_RSQ_XoWjyxrTaqlT-QKz7dodGQbFUQXRDK08EdECCw1jnQ6FI2xRi73C6CZeUjYL4vCQzH2CT7yr0Ayryltx7DGNdvCSlO4Y8czd6zrDuLNY1R4uLX0qtpLdYVPjM3LJdfIP_57A_4Sx5wRts3jFfLho4F-_QkehoSeR0IBoPFCuU1e1mxeGt5YTzRFG-Ajh2INc3rWAbgFY9y84jRU0H1bZnqAcXC-H3z7_5eRvU1VmTb4vYp2nXw4_vou-cYsXSdQ==&c=X5hVOHtgJ7Rbev9LN4T7en5lYtWu62PKE1AyxVA-eZYszDCUGdaKaA==&ch=Ti0pOQyt6O_8fL7PltbLfk07f7cPWXL039rTpdBglYgo9QQbv-aEKQ==)

| A note from Russell...
The people of New Hampshire are ready for a change in our representation in Congress, whether it's rising energy costs, the broken southern border, or a lack of support for our men and women in law enforcement. New Hampshire families know that our current leadership in Washington is failing us and have forgotten the 'Live Free or Die' values that we all pride ourselves on in New Hampshire. We need a fresh voice who has the business and elected experience to change the status quo. United, we can defeat Chris Pappas and bring real change to Washington.
Thank you.
-Russell

**Elizabeth Warren stunned us:** []() We’re launching another URGENT ad campaign to abolish the Electoral College and protect our Democracy.

[**Listen, we need $3,941 by midnight tomorrow to make our first payment on the next round of ads. If we can’t keep our ads running, the Electoral College will hand the GOP another Trump presidency! Chip in $7 now »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/37357?t=7&akid=20785%2E4449941%2E1VBYMq) | [Please, chip in $7 to fund our ads »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/37357?t=8&akid=20785%2E4449941%2E1VBYMq)

* * *
Look, Elizabeth Warren is 100% right — _every vote does matter!_

The Electoral College has handed Republicans the presidency THREE times since 1988 despite the fact that they’ve only won the popular vote ONCE since then.

The Electoral College is a scam that makes YOUR vote worth less – _it’s SO UNFAIR and COMPLETELY undemocratic!!_

That’s why we’re rushing to raise $3,941 to make our next ad payment by midnight tomorrow and keep our ads running!
[**Please, our proven effective ads are the best way to spread the word about the dangers of the Electoral College. Please, chip in $7 now to help fund our ads »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/37357?t=9&akid=20785%2E4449941%2E1VBYMq)

body:
Hey! I’m rushing to you with three urgent updates about my Special Election in New York:

| |

---
| | | Hey!

Thanks for opening this email. It's Mazi Melesa Pilip - I'm rushing to you with three urgent updates about my Special Election in New York:
1. Election Day is 2/13 and early voting **JUST STARTED**
2. Democrats are unloading **~$10,000,000 to destroy me**
3. The latest polls have this race **TOO CLOSE TO CALL**

Please do not forget this -

Our Conservative House Majority is hanging on by a thread. _If we lose this Special Election, the odds of Democrats taking _complete control_ of our country will skyrocket. _

_**[The first votes are already being cast in this race so I'm respectfully asking you to pitch in ONE LAST TIME to keep our ads on the airwaves, win my Special Election, and save our Conservative House Majority.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=378c59d49c7e48138f0efb1c46405aa1&_e=2nLE6b6AppvamhNBMFtHvRSrBXlGW_18VPIjABt4cXqmsVKn-K0fGv3Fdy63weolnawxiXFSSHuW76DhGD1LeP6nCKgqqJN-ShGliIusan61hXnbaRfCwqUPkumxVQ7a5RS_P_u011hwTtOihIUcBfQlK9-4Aqs3iWshsnb7MHHzqfTcbmEiCPEiA2THBX4stvk9b-wP2XW2nfKMwKGyz4GopyHS8t5uh-TLGLet2wzAhWQd3JL5srCxxizNjoRbnhRZmSsYDqy11hnbxmlvjPxDzyDT1WP0FLOYYJaHrpJIBKrBOunHSOsb0P2hrhrGUm45no4f_2UU32lPUi1kloZOTS1DD9eJwRXavSb0hh1_p5n_KL5WlfJeSfj7acCbwiBQQlHM7ULKaTvjAUaW8yDzBLOePiad68KJFSOUnzKSlCnPtBGzN3OQrNEWfT6Gmng0pr_HY3dFM5J0liHCfw%3D%3D "The first votes are already being cast in this race so I’m respectfully asking you to pitch in ONE LAST TIME to keep our ads on the airwaves, win my Special Election, and save our Conservative House Majority. body:
| The facts are indisputable:

**Kansans are strong, determined, and tough — and now, we’re once again Super Bowl champions!**

Whether it’s at the Super Bowl or in our elections, Kansans always get the job done, because we’re willing to work harder, earlier, and be more resourceful than our opponents.

**_[To celebrate this massive victory for KC, my team wants to have 1,000 supporters sign an e-card today. Will you sign today to show your Kansas City pride?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78877048/454737137/1892175961?source=EM_NBI_SD_20240212_PT_1.1_0_1MO_candidate_NA_NA_superbowl&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTQxNzIxYS1kNmM5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-L_0UlNC-paQzdM-KxLScclI8hqaCBSIxs8UChItnD0=&emci=4ef509c9-cdc9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=1941721a-d6c9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=22117458)_** | **[Sign today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78877049/454737139/1892175961?source=EM_NBI_SD_20240212_PT_1.1_0_1MO_candidate_NA_NA_superbowl&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTQxNzIxYS1kNmM5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-L_0UlNC-paQzdM-KxLScclI8hqaCBSIxs8UChItnD0=&emci=4ef509c9-cdc9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=1941721a-d6c9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=22117458)**
---

name: Clarence Blalock
subject: Help us get rid of Majorie Taylor Greene
body:
Marjorie Taylor Greene needs to go

| | |
### Clarence for Ga
---
# Help us get rid of Marjorie Taylor Greene!
---
---
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KFEv4H-c5rU
---
Dear Friend, I hope this message finds you well. I am thrilled to officially announce my candidacy for Congress in Georgia's 14th Congressional District. My name is Clarence Blalock, and I am eager to represent our community with integrity, reason, and a commitment to unity. Now, more than ever, we need leaders who can bridge the divides that have fractured our political discourse. I am running to replace extremism with common sense, intolerance with understanding, and division with unity. It's time for a change from the divisive and extreme rhetoric that has characterized our representation in Congress. We cannot afford to be represented by someone like Marjorie Taylor Greene, whose actions and words have only deepened the divides within our community. Together, we can move beyond the partisan gridlock and work towards solutions that benefit everyone in our community. I invite you to join me on this journey. Together, we can build a brighter future for Georgia's 14th Congressional District. Visit my campaign website at [[https://clarenceforga.com/](https://clarenceforga.nationbuilder.com/r?u=-vEucXVDv74T9_-YlcW5Pq4MsL4XYWtiVceKH6qkNC0&e=6f1c74e2a45eca17656082602fe177d4&utm_source=clarenceforga&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=videoblast1&n=1&v=6)] to learn more about my platform and how you can get involved. Thank you for considering me as your candidate for Congress. Let's stand together for progress, unity, and a better tomorrow. Warm regards, Clarence Blalock
---

body:
Is George Soros winning?

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e6acf5cf03e4b988781dc037d8c1e42&_e=AwTGx72izTvv2JX9k8g_FIksSIdorzHVo6nLTffVuqs8ljh9SA8UuxxxMDyE-YZj9Ay1iMPgvXP1astLiQ2CA6SKooj9-mCA9eFG7jFZQkAC5ou24sN9hduPVUjwLuFiX79xTXdY13HW8epORTzyoQHAZi-jhYsFgmJkXzo1mCSF5yVyFjUna-CjYouD8nHC6ueVqLu39Vcm5d_7qSkQKaLM3a-WSFNQbOZo3USO1dfhHyRuWOobm3exn53Qe7Pcq1GQ6v8hRvtXhDx_crunNNg-VcLfJlQQGRAaB5DZqS_Q0ESWBGwNLpDf5IcmIHvOBq5GnHpTg9k_SL3oh78kNXtQzS_j9b3uE1F4Km3oAzDBcfBzMnqe0LPEpulqmjLT-n1bQ5MkS1MxgG6GZZ7kjQ%3D%3D)

Fellow Patriot, **_Is George Soros winning?_** **_Absolutely not._** And here’s how I know: Since 2022, the American people have booted 15 Soros prosecutors out of office. It’s a great start — but there are still 70+ Soros-funded prosecutors left to go. **_[>>> LET’S KEEP GOING <<<](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e6acf5cf03e4b988781dc037d8c1e42&_e=AwTGx72izTvv2JX9k8g_FIksSIdorzHVo6nLTffVuqs8ljh9SA8UuxxxMDyE-YZj9Ay1iMPgvXP1astLiQ2CA6SKooj9-mCA9eFG7jFZQkAC5ou24sN9hduPVUjwLuFiX79xTXdY13HW8epORTzyoQHAZi-jhYsFgmJkXzo1mCSF5yVyFjUna-CjYouD8nHC6ueVqLu39Vcm5d_7qSkQKaLM3a-WSFNQbOZo3USO1dfhHyRuWOobm3exn53Qe7PcCD_bKVBTaGvKushFUMUPo8azHOTmPS98SZY_XO_ZBed_4NP2Rg_XFr3nMUIncaiKz73B-uhwqdXoS0tMMBIWg7BKpUNn8ZRm_FiX1VjVORfZmxvAilKKDOwpBzUUiUK9Qp6bpDAJwKJqt40i-kHoMw%3D%3D)_** Here’s the good news: Now that the word is out about what these radical activists are doing to our judicial system, the American people are desperate to kick them out of office. How desperate? **One of these radicals blew $1.1 MILLION on her race trying to cover up her record—and then lost to a guy who only spent $70K. 😲** _Yes, Soros prosecutors are THAT unpopular. But we need to put in the work to ACTUALLY remove them._ A few dollars can go SUCH a long way in these key local races. George Soros figured that out and uses this tactic to control prosecutorial elections —and now, so do we. **We’re _[Fair Courts America.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e6acf5cf03e4b988781dc037d8c1e42&_e=AwTGx72izTvv2JX9k8g_FIksSIdorzHVo6nLTffVuqs8ljh9SA8UuxxxMDyE-YZj9Ay1iMPgvXP1astLiQ2CA6SKooj9-mCA9eFG7jFZQkAC5ou24sN9hduPVUjwLuFiX79xTXdY13HW8epORTzyoQHAZi-jhYsFgmJkXzo1mCSF5yVyFjUna-CjYouD8nHC6ueVqLu39Vcm5d_7qSkQKaLM3a-WSFNQbOZo3USO1dfhHyRuWOobm3exn53Qe7PcqcDQEFGf8TKuctfCRY7hSNqCbLXRvn-58ati9B2QzTMp0ulV_eCIrackNstSZW2gnxjY20KFFwPmTjQBzsESbsxadeVGwqag0LbbKg-Fad1wVN94NYt7_2-vsV5314VKhDX2hT3xSokpU-42HcBAJw%3D%3D)_ We are the ONLY organization taking a direct stand against Soros prosecutors. And it’s WORKING. clean_body: Is George Soros winning? | | | Fellow Patriot, Is George Soros winning? Absolutely not. And here’s how I know: Since 2022, the American people have booted 15 Soros prosecutors out of office. It’s a great start — but there are still 70+ Soros-funded prosecutors left to go. Here’s the good news: Now that the word is out about what these radical activists are doing to our judicial system, the American people are desperate to kick them out of office. How desperate? One of these radicals blew $1.1 MILLION on her race trying to cover up her record—and then lost to a guy who only spent $70K. 😲 Yes, Soros prosecutors are THAT unpopular. But we need to put in the work to ACTUALLY remove them. A few dollars can go SUCH a long way in these key local races. George Soros figured that out and uses this tactic to control prosecutorial elections —and now, so do we. We’re We are the ONLY organization taking a direct stand against Soros prosecutors. And it’s WORKING. It’s clear that the momentum is on our side. But tracking these prosecutorial races across the country is a massive undertaking — which is why there has not yet been a concerted effort to fight back against the network of dark money influence... until now. We’re taking Soros on head-to-head, but we can't do it without the support of patriots like you. | | Thank you, Andrew WynneExecutive Director | Fair Courts America | | | | | | | Paid for by Fair Courts America | | | | | Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

Fellow Patriot,Have you seen the latest polls?Approval polls show that Joe Biden has a historically low 39% approval.But you and I know that polls like this will mean nothing if the radical left is allowed to cheat and steal their way into office. That’s why we need to stand up and act now to restore and protect the integrity of our elections. **_NO mass, unverified voting from home..._**** _ _****_No remote drop boxes...._****_No vote harvesting..._**** _No manipulation of the vulnerable elderly voters in nursing homes...._****_NO extended registration deadlines..._**** _ _****_And NO counting late ballots AFTER the polls have closed. _****_ _** **[If you stand with me, I need you to make a special contribution of $24 to secure our elections immediately. ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1a1fb559b78343a8991beb35b6ab573f&_e=E8QZq8T9pxrXbz9UZQ4i7sLIhN5WlApK6rbyDCNY7p2jppTV2ET1PsubAPwHCxhEt8oU5TqAA3_lGQo6eN50ubTsOUL3E8K6MvDf_7cGt5aqmjes9lzj57cNWNB-Qiuyva4MvbGHW69PxSn6mNd9kjvNEljOmIzfMYuyMUP0PWyGeQy8fpNo0Ud47TU753ifzZg1rac3x9GS40UeTeQvPmRRmA4MRYmuFV5OP7Wy5k2ia37ZgFZrIIGrOt1dC97eA5DDNK9rKss1AolHXkLz_sAipVq3bce1FalLDDJFuabUHfVB8RFgyDpmUsI0B-LwU63QY4xWuwOxCD-2SLqNaImy6OczN1Z4WH5_0iYYI40%3D)** {\var:first_name Friend}, my name is Bob Carlstrom – President of AMAC Action. You may have heard of AMAC Action before – we’re the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. If you’ve ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we’ve been fighting AGAINST “Obamacare”, AGAINST “Medicare for All,” and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to “transform” America. That’s why we have 71 chapters, nearly 300 delegates, and over 358,000 volunteer advocates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage. AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you. {\var:first_name Friend}, I’m reaching out to you today because we only have 10 months to make sure our elections are secure for the 2024 presidential election. As you know, the 2024 presidential election is shaping up to be one of the most important elections of our lifetime.If we don’t secure our elections now, we might have to suffer through a fourth term of Obama-Biden that could be even worse than the first three.That’s why AMAC Action needs your help. The only way we can help ensure that our country’s future elections are free, fair, and honest is with the help of generous, patriotic Americans like you. [**That’s why today, I’m asking you to make a contribution of $24 or more to AMAC Action.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1a1fb559b78343a8991beb35b6ab573f&_e=E8QZq8T9pxrXbz9UZQ4i7sLIhN5WlApK6rbyDCNY7p2jppTV2ET1PsubAPwHCxhEt8oU5TqAA3_lGQo6eN50ubTsOUL3E8K6MvDf_7cGt5aqmjes9lzj57cNWNB-Qiuyva4MvbGHW69PxSn6mNd9kjvNEljOmIzfMYuyMUP0PWyGeQy8fpNo0Ud47TU753ifzZg1rac3x9GS40UeTeQvPjaaAxPFg8-ZoHLDmcyUkkSRv4CQ-lBRfiXCtrloXsGREP2TBnZQeMVS6aQhImDTz-UBfQzvStPdaqjFqdxFGGvRaveDDQWY6RUqoOIhH8l0lNTcN20uvC0yya1XmW6IuaUcAgWCe-s9m3hMhi4H6gM%3D)**_We the People_** , should decide the **outcomes** of our elections – NOT the “Fake News” media; **_We the People_** , should decide the **rules** of our elections – NOT the Democrats who love to change the rules to suit their needs; **_We the People_** , govern ourselves and won’t surrender our freedom to 3rd-world style Socialist banana-republic tyranny. And if** _We the People, you and I, {\var:first_name Friend},_** don’t step up right now – our children and grandchildren simply won’t get to experience the same country you and I grew up in. **[Please, make your best possible contribution to AMAC Action today to defend the integrity of our elections.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1a1fb559b78343a8991beb35b6ab573f&_e=E8QZq8T9pxrXbz9UZQ4i7sLIhN5WlApK6rbyDCNY7p2jppTV2ET1PsubAPwHCxhEt8oU5TqAA3_lGQo6eN50ubTsOUL3E8K6MvDf_7cGt5aqmjes9lzj57cNWNB-Qiuyva4MvbGHW69PxSn6mNd9kjvNEljOmIzfMYuyMUP0PWyGeQy8fpNo0Ud47TU753ifzZg1rac3x9GS40UeTeQvPqDiB9yc7AeijFKhV5wbYziDbiRfeXkKhBkJnbjfqXm3ZrGnvdT3rm1GLb59k4C2t0TJkoh0vPg9ywV_L2yVUSSNEd27h4jK5ptL4MIGAHdhti94hrrHQN3c-rRLM4Uacf-qPY0YxWaFix7GDWmONeE%3D)**Thank you in advance for your generous support.

clean_body: Approval polls show that Joe Biden has a historically low 39% approval. | | | | Fellow Patriot,Have you seen the latest polls?Approval polls show that Joe Biden has a historically low 39% approval.But you and I know that polls like this will mean nothing if the radical left is allowed to cheat and steal their way into office. That’s why we need to stand up and act now to restore and protect the integrity of our elections. NO mass, unverified voting from home... No remote drop boxes....No vote harvesting... No manipulation of the vulnerable elderly voters in nursing homes....NO extended registration deadlines... And NO counting late ballots AFTER the polls have closed. {\var:firstname Friend}, my name is Bob Carlstrom – President of AMAC Action. You may have heard of AMAC Action before – we’re the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. If you’ve ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we’ve been fighting AGAINST “Obamacare”, AGAINST “Medicare for All,” and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to “transform” America. That’s why we have 71 chapters, nearly 300 delegates, and over 358,000 volunteer advocates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage. AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you. {\var:firstname Friend}, I’m reaching out to you today because we only have 10 months to make sure our elections are secure for the 2024 presidential election. As you know, the 2024 presidential election is shaping up to be one of the most important elections of our lifetime.If we don’t secure our elections now, we might have to suffer through a fourth term of Obama-Biden that could be even worse than the first three.That’s why AMAC Action needs your help. The only way we can help ensure that our country’s future elections are free, fair, and honest is with the help of generous, patriotic Americans like you. the People , should decide the outcomes of our elections – NOT the “Fake News” media; We the People , should decide the rules of our elections – NOT the Democrats who love to change the rules to suit their needs; We the People , govern ourselves and won’t surrender our freedom to 3rd-world style Socialist banana-republic tyranny. And if We the People, you and I, {\var:firstname Friend}, don’t step up right now – our children and grandchildren simply won’t get to experience the same country you and I grew up in. you in advance for your generous support. | | Sincerely, Bob Carlstrom, PresidentAMAC Action | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. 1904 Thomas Avenue, Suite 103,Leesburg, FL 34748 | Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Brandon Herrera
subject: Watch: Tony Gonzales refused to defend our border.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Committee
body:
Dear Supporter,
I just released my latest campaign video that tells the truth about Tony Gonzales and his failure to defend our border. He blocked common-sense reforms to detain and deport illegal immigrants. He even called border security legislation "anti-American" and "not Christian."
You can watch it here: [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/VrVQE763sUcnwMNABmS763f3eA/2YhXmssLPwNNAOpiwyOEsQ).
We need leaders who will stand up for our sovereignty and fight the Biden administration's open border policies. I support building the wall, reinstating the "Remain in Mexico" policy, and introducing the death penalty for fentanyl traffickers.
The Biden administration's open borders agenda is endangering Americans, and Tony Gonzales cannot be counted on to fight for Texas' sovereignty.
Learn the truth about Tony Gonzales here: [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/VrVQE763sUcnwMNABmS763f3eA/2YhXmssLPwNNAOpiwyOEsQ).
Tony Gonzales has failed to stand up for Texans, but I will always fight to prioritize border security. I need your help to spread the message about Tony's record to Republican primary voters.
Please check out my latest campaign video today: [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/VrVQE763sUcnwMNABmS763f3eA/2YhXmssLPwNNAOpiwyOEsQ).
On March 5th, we have the opportunity to replace Tony with a real conservative who will prioritize securing the southern border.
Thanks for all your help.
Respectfully,
Brandon Herrera

Friend,

The American people want ACTION on urgent and important issues. No one votes for a politician and says “I hope that person can get on Fox News and _talk_ about fighting for us!”

But inaction and empty talk is all we ever get from Jim Jordan.

Jordan rolls up sleeves, yells on TV, and bullies witnesses in committee hearings: but he NEVER votes to make anyone’s life better or works to solve a single problem.

The people of my district want Congress to act on border security and immigration reform. **Jim Jordan screams about how we need to address the border—and then twists himself into pretzels OPPOSING the very thing he demanded:** [](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTMwMDA1NTc1MTQzMjc2NjAsXCJyXCI6MTEzMDAwNTkyODg5MDg3MzA0fSIsInMiOiJjOGFkNWFiNTE5YzQzYmMyIn0)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Sierra Club and Center for Biological Diversity Endorse Dave Min
body:
Min Makes A Clean Sweep Of Environmental Advocates | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a1a05dfbefcb/sierra-club-and-center-for-biological-diversity-endorse-dave-min-15670368?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** February 12, 2024
**Contact:**[press@davemin.com](mailto:press@davemin.com)
**Sierra Club and Center for Biological Diversity Endorse Dave Min**
_Min Makes A Clean Sweep Of Environmental Advocates_
**IRVINE, CA** — Today, the environmental groups Sierra Club and the Center for Biological Diversity announced their endorsements of Dave Min for Congress in California’s 47th Congressional District, joining California Environmental Voters, which had endorsed State Senator Min several weeks ago. Sen. Min, who chairs the Natural Resources and Water Committee in Sacramento, has been a climate champion during his time in the State Senate, and that is now reflected by the fact that he has made a clean sweep of the major environmental groups that endorse political campaigns. Min is the candidate backed by the Democratic Party, Congresswoman Katie Porter (who is vacating the seat), enviros, teachers, police, and nurses.

**“The work that Sierra Club and other environmental organizations do is vitally important for the future of this country,”** said Dave Min.**“I’ve said it many times: climate change is the existential issue of our time. It will take a directed and concerted effort by government at every level to reverse the accelerating trends of global warming and to adapt to the changes that are coming. I hope to continue to be a loud and effective voice on this issue in Washington, DC, just as I’ve been here in Orange County.”**

The Sierra Club is one of the nation's oldest and largest environmental organizations. It was founded in 1892 by a group of Californians, including John Muir, who valued the state's wilderness areas. Today, the Club has chapters in every state and a national membership that exceeds 1 million. California is unique among states in that it has 13 chapters, representing more than 500,000 members and supporters. Their stated mission is to promote the preservation, restoration, and enjoyment of California's environment, and enable chapters and grassroots activists to speak as one voice to promote California conservation.

The Center for Biological Diversity Action Fund cited Min’s enviro bona fides as a state senator for their endorsement. **“Dave Min is a champion for biodiversity, oceans and our climate with a proven track record of results,”** said Kassie Siegel, climate political director at the CBDAF.**“Min authored the law that protects and preserves 30% of California’s land and coastal waters by 2030, and he has taken on the powerful oil and gas industry with crucial legislation to end offshore drilling in state waters. California will be well served by electing climate champion Dave Min to serve in the 47th Congressional District.”**

Min is endorsed by outgoing Rep. Katie Porter, as well as the California Democratic Party, Service Employees International Union (SEIU), the National Education Association, the American Federation of Teachers, California Environmental Voters, and over 150 local, state, and federal officials. Min is the unanimous choice of organized labor in this race, as he is the only candidate to receive support from national, statewide, and local unions, and he is the only candidate endorsed in this race by the California Labor Federation or the AFL-CIO. A full endorsement list is available [here](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=52ffc8d753&e=7017cc100e). ###

_California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15% in this area. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country. _

body:
https://www.perelesformissouri.com/ [https://www.perelesformissouri.com/]
Peter,
Republicans in the Missouri Senate just blocked amendments to legalize abortion in cases of rape or incest.
This is truly despicable, and flies in the face of basic decency, not to mention what the overwhelming majority of people in Missouri (and across the country) think is right.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?refcode=abortionexemptions [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?refcode=abortionexemptions]
Let’s be clear what we are talking about here: Missouri has one of the strictest abortion bans in the entire country. In 2019, Missouri passed a law banning all abortions, even in cases of rape or incest and no matter the age of the patient. That law was shepherded through the legislature by Sen. Andrew Koenig, a key leader of the Chaos Caucus, and the person who I am running to replace in the Senate.
Missouri’s abortion law forces victims who have already gone through trauma to experience more of it—this time at the hands of the government. The Republicans who support total bans without exceptions for rape or incest seem more interested in scoring right-wing political points than in protecting lives.
When Democrats in the Senate brought up some gut-wrenching scenarios that highlight the need for exceptions to the law, such as girls as young as 9 being forced to give birth, their Republicans colleagues were unmoved. “God is perfect,” said Sen. Sandy Crawford. “God does not make mistakes. And for some reason he allows that to happen. Bad things happen.”
God may be perfect, but humans are not. And like it or not, we must make laws grounded in reality, common sense, and consensus—not any individual’s personal version of morality.
This is what’s at stake in our election : whether we will govern with compassion and decency...or whether cruelty and chaos is all that we can expect.
We can change all of this. We can do so much better—and this November, we have a chance to stop the extremists. That’s why I am asking for your support to flip this seat: together, we can break the supermajority that allows Missouri Republicans to pass laws that are both unpopular and unjust. Can I count on your support to restore decency and sanity here in Missouri with a contribution to my campaign of any amount? clean_body: [] Peter, Republicans in the Missouri Senate just blocked amendments to legalize abortion in cases of rape or incest. This is truly despicable, and flies in the face of basic decency, not to mention what the overwhelming majority of people in Missouri (and across the country) think is right. [] Let’s be clear what we are talking about here: Missouri has one of the strictest abortion bans in the entire country. In 2019, Missouri passed a law banning all abortions, even in cases of rape or incest and no matter the age of the patient. That law was shepherded through the legislature by Sen. Andrew Koenig, a key leader of the Chaos Caucus, and the person who I am running to replace in the Senate. Missouri’s abortion law forces victims who have already gone through trauma to experience more of it—this time at the hands of the government. The Republicans who support total bans without exceptions for rape or incest seem more interested in scoring right-wing political points than in protecting lives. When Democrats in the Senate brought up some gut-wrenching scenarios that highlight the need for exceptions to the law, such as girls as young as 9 being forced to give birth, their Republicans colleagues were unmoved. “God is perfect,” said Sen. Sandy Crawford. “God does not make mistakes. And for some reason he allows that to happen. Bad things happen.” God may be perfect, but humans are not. And like it or not, we must make laws grounded in reality, common sense, and consensus—not any individual’s personal version of morality. This is what’s at stake in our election : whether we will govern with compassion and decency...or whether cruelty and chaos is all that we can expect. We can change all of this. We can do so much better—and this November, we have a chance to stop the extremists. That’s why I am asking for your support to flip this seat: together, we can break the supermajority that allows Missouri Republicans to pass laws that are both unpopular and unjust. Can I count on your support to restore decency and sanity here in Missouri with a contribution to my campaign of any amount? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] DONATE $500 [] DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT [] Our campaign relies on donors like you to build the momentum we need to win. Make a lasting impact with a recurring monthly donation. [] I know that we can win and start to turn back the extremism in our state. Thank you so much for your support. - Joe P.S. I need your help to focus on the issues that matter to Missourians and fighting for what they need. Can you contribute $25 or more to help me put an end to the never-ending chaos and dysfunction in Jefferson City? subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e1c65b7897294058a421562399ccb266&_e=qaf9zbAYKXYNefsfbjnU7BxsJ3R3EzrzWhh5H79EikjlRjVqvLhXg760tJc-AR4S7VAkLggdgNnwnKCuZF1IeYQIOuue7Id4KPW56BUrjd4zzyWf_uWfXeeN0tUD8fkARhIKTwjcITztat7rlkL5cGLgqxDC1TIvWARFrwnek-PkylJeO2YU9UrnJ2txWjDupgK5evrmSFSeJvLIT0XhLUws6tUdQc-J6PVY2EJtakGEX2fXYN6uXlCTqjVncqtFUBurnMvFccC3omUEtq44996A1_ErxEVvN13lKpRot34CEH_8lpvSVbI6eV-dOzgiiEJkIFcm0zQD_Y4Ad0vWbOr9fZfHVsg9QHjduFDm7DeIcf71aRg_3ei6kWJSZ7s_UWNCjITyqGFRlvbYRU3P2FNrXni3EPIz8zCUhSMZgyg%3D)

| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [ ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e1c65b7897294058a421562399ccb266&_e=qaf9zbAYKXYNefsfbjnU7BxsJ3R3EzrzWhh5H79EikjlRjVqvLhXg760tJc-AR4S7VAkLggdgNnwnKCuZF1IeYQIOuue7Id4KPW56BUrjd4zzyWf_uWfXeeN0tUD8fkARhIKTwjcITztat7rlkL5cGLgqxDC1TIvWARFrwnek-PkylJeO2YU9UrnJ2txWjDupgK5evrmSFSeJvLIT0XhLUws6tUdQc-J6PVY2EJtakGEX2fXYN6uXlCTqjVncqtFUBurnMvFccC3omUEtq449yHvfDhq3GdVg_hz9ad6Twzj0SK9Ofeea-DKIyTCtMtvy1u2ShSxJYjT2a6q0I7FY2lgRyElvmo8Gdxq2Rh0uLliJBfzEJEU9TkzocsV8r7MZRW5dtJD9LvyZv6GaspkbZFpFBm7rSuDNLaRpu4R0u8%3D) That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e1c65b7897294058a421562399ccb266&_e=qaf9zbAYKXYNefsfbjnU7BxsJ3R3EzrzWhh5H79EikjlRjVqvLhXg760tJc-AR4S7VAkLggdgNnwnKCuZF1IeYQIOuue7Id4KPW56BUrjd4zzyWf_uWfXeeN0tUD8fkARhIKTwjcITztat7rlkL5cGLgqxDC1TIvWARFrwnek-PkylJeO2YU9UrnJ2txWjDupgK5evrmSFSeJvLIT0XhLUws6tUdQc-J6PVY2EJtakGEX2fXYN6uXlCTqjVncqtFUBurnMvFccC3omUEtq4494MHXAWfpMSEr3FspCNBUi3gMBSvqJZveyjrmW2gS6uspWVzNWWkkcwChV6nLB4aJbaBL-1hy2PyiqAQLZF8DSZMbo6qOsi_yGDuLYXMsxb8g_8aRTl2fCNQc2iWvbvVwDdcAUGWE0ms-Hf9cHUU6mM%3D)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

body:
My name is Mazi Pilip- I'm the GOP candidate in the NY special election
My name is Mazi Pilip- I'm the GOP candidate in the NY special election

| |

Friend,

I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress.

My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short!

I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared.

If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority.

I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family.

Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed.

They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things.

And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials.

They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative.

And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them.

The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me.

---
| [](http://links.spiritofpatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f4ae93e67b9c46b8b82f55f95ce220d0&_e=AsmRbbHmTdBNbgh7ThFF6M9wW6Oe96twVddF15ZD3koiekA8iA08XSHND_YvWf4OE_fkLaZNmK39ha82pIWwR2Fi84RPu_fo6psF4HPuvCd8bxFA3O0LNBZukO7ZzuGPChJxdfIcK2RV_OxAHigVGmfx3Sk45qNqn2wH5lFj7Fm5xPfSisPkM0Ivhfc-tQWM5Hj2TZhujWVIzDkrMCP-kDYYktPGawREYQypI5cjxUDcYPhSSIKq125wK2ZiiIoWOdtDK9P9WDz3queuvDBvYl2jsDp7eNJZe5kc0NgvrPjtNfiD4FyM_tvvWylU5hsZHVpb-pdhWfOuVPzRSI_oycVmO-AQ9dT8wr_ZXQHRzInWKVdi08kp4HPBiYblkEwsuTZwbFqTbR6vK0GHLVD8Oxg1KXAe6VChBftZtworpNTMaVnoMbbb8-XSSE8LV2X4dFPmIeReZvyI3DtRPb3e1LMxYOSdPihk_O7LwO20WoE%3D)

I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line.

Early voting begins in just a few days. That makes this the most important race in the nation right now.

I hope you'll step up & stand with me today to defeat the Democrats & hold the House Majority.

Mazi Melesa Pilip
GOP Nominee
