name: John Fetterman
subject: I really need to talk to you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
My senior Senator and friend Bob Casey is running for re-election!!!
| | | Hey, it’s John. I really need to talk to you about my friend Bob Casey.

The 2024 election is here — and **the GOP’s road to winning back the Senate runs right through PA.**

Republicans are zeroing in on 2024’s battleground states as we speak. You can bet Mitch McConnell and the GOP’s shadiest billionaires will spend hundreds of million$ to attack Bob.

This is *seriously* scary stuff, but you know what gives ME hope? This amazing grassroots team!!!

The way we stopped the GOP in 2022 is the same way we fight back and re-elect Bob now: by bringing together an ✨all-star grassroots team✨ that can stand up to the GOP’s money by folks chipping in $5, $10, or more at a time.

Together, we’ll defend PA’s Senate seat, as long as we don’t lose sight of the stakes. **Holding this seat is make-or-break for our Democratic majority.**

**[With that in mind...please, split $5 or more between Bob’s campaign and the DSCC. We need to build a winning campaign between now and Election Day to defend our Senate majority, so I’m asking for yinz guys to dig deep!](https://go.dscc.org/go/12724?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240212-JohnFetterman-FettermanFriendCaseyTadem-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240212-JohnFetterman-FettermanFriendCaseyTadem-ETG-sl1&akid=13517%2E9716520%2EniH1AC)**

If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Bob Casey for Senate and the DSCC.

| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/12724?amount=5&t=5&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240212-JohnFetterman-FettermanFriendCaseyTadem-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240212-JohnFetterman-FettermanFriendCaseyTadem-ETG-sl1&akid=13517%2E9716520%2EniH1AC)

name: =?utf-8?Q?NEGOP=20LEGISLATIVE=20TEAM?=
subject: 🚨[URGENT]: LB1330 DEI Call-to-Action 🚨
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Support Senator Murman; Call or email your Senator to support LB1330 | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4fc758ef3df6/n41kepo7ku-12680285?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=80eca5f77a&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
|
[](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=7d4c5f0178&e=25844e23a8)
Senator Dave Murman of LD38, Chair of the Education Committee, has drafted [LB1330](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=d12ec1755e&e=25844e23a8) with a [Statement of Intent](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=71d9a5412c&e=25844e23a8) as follows:

**The following constitutes the reasons for this bill and the purposes which are sought to be accomplished thereby: LB 1330 prohibits public educational institutions from requiring employees to engage in a DEI program, spending public money on a DEI program, or establishing a DEI office.**

We urge our Republican membership to [CALL](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=bcdad141c9&e=25844e23a8) your Senators, [email](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=99a069427f&e=25844e23a8) your Senators, or attend in person to testify on this critical piece of legislation which will refocus education in Nebraska back to core values.

**Unicameral Standing Committee:** Education
**Hearing Room:** [1525](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=1c260d58b4&e=25844e23a8) (See Map) [State Capitol 1445 K St.](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=943c967aea&e=25844e23a8)
**Hearing Date:** Tuesday, February 13th, 2024
**Hearing Time:** 1:30pm (Approximate to volume of bills slated)
**Bill #/Language:** [LB1330](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=ffa791d70a&e=25844e23a8)
**Testimony Deadline:** 8am - 2/13/2024

We recommend supporting this bill and reference the need to be fiscally responsible with school budgets at all tiers of education. Indicate the support legislation similar to this bill has in Oklahoma, Iowa, Texas, and Florida. Universities and colleges need to return to the purpose and mission of education. Equality teaching has its place but DEI implies priorities based on race and that is the exact opposite of equality.

We urge our Republican membership to your Senators, your Senators, or attend in person to testify on this critical piece of legislation which will refocus education in Nebraska back to core values. # Dear Fellow Republicans,

The MIGOP has launched its Poll Challenger Training Series. We will be holding Election Security Operations Training Programs on the following dates:
* **Monday, February 12, 2024, at 7 pm EST – please use this link to join - _[https://zoom.us/meeting/register/tJAkde2oqjouGNbMUJDE1OWgd46A5p5_Dbsu#/registration](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=396f66f6e8&e=a2af77507c)_**
* **Sunday, February 18, 2024, at 2 pm EST – please use this link to join - [https://zoom.us/meeting/register/tJckcOGrrzkoEtb50efCIuPFlnEOMDrUdy6Z#/registration](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=02c3ee5bc3&e=a2af77507c)**

# If you have any questions, please contact [PollChallenger@migop.org](mailto:PollChallenger@migop.org).

In Liberty,

Communications Team
Michigan Republican Party

Peter, we’ve always known this race was going to be close, but new polls are showing us it really will come down to the wire. **Two new polls just showed this race within the margin of error, with enough undecided voters to swing the race in either direction!**

With the race this tight, we’ve got to give this everything we have over the final day.

name: Matt
subject: You know my wife, Kat
body:
I want to surprise her with this, but I’ll need your help. |
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001btolnu97QCORhV_Vfzw-_xREjreiGuIzdcjdoX6dMYKqv1I8Vb2JJ02XTHSXdw7rGWrYoH841fH-rWIjLSQ6zrJFkEkU0kjVX57XvrpJ85mDQhGARaWYXp-BLMyA9mqUHujTM-ubicaWCsCu8OWY35dyRWN2NDamqwbBg4717j8D5iq-mHZ91oHxcN_rMUoZ7AXnwImgckTaPAk5VEiL2eBAxmWe-DAJpZnpg3e57kqn5SqowbAa9A7shjMN25NEppFa-ki_B3xClL_VFV0ECVwLs8aF-ucKBm-VGWKqtxA=&c=cJ6y5rUM5Z3nNxTIxh2svQQV_FLp8uwz84hkRlhr_EnQIA8T88nuUw==&ch=o5Rdfjpoaq-3n2jumx8ZdAuNvN9mHByFF8-Pz_rUNJ3IT_6m4immWw==)
---
| Friend,
February 16th is my wife, Kat Cammack's birthday.
I see firsthand the long hours she puts in, day in and day out for the American people - so this year I want to give her a little surprise and I was hoping you could help me out.
[Will you take a moment and add your name and a short note to her birthday card?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001btolnu97QCORhV_Vfzw-_xREjreiGuIzdcjdoX6dMYKqv1I8Vb2JJ02XTHSXdw7rGWrYoH841fH-rWIjLSQ6zrJFkEkU0kjVX57XvrpJ85mDQhGARaWYXp-BLMyA9mqUHujTM-ubicaWCsCu8OWY35dyRWN2NDamqwbBg4717j8D5iq-mHZ91oHxcN_rMUoZ7AXnwImgckTaPAk5VEiL2eBAxmWe-DAJpZnpg3e57kqn5SqowbAa9A7shjMN25NEppFa-ki_B3xClL_VFV0ECVwLs8aF-ucKBm-VGWKqtxA=&c=cJ6y5rUM5Z3nNxTIxh2svQQV_FLp8uwz84hkRlhr_EnQIA8T88nuUw==&ch=o5Rdfjpoaq-3n2jumx8ZdAuNvN9mHByFF8-Pz_rUNJ3IT_6m4immWw==)
I know that getting this special card from her supporters will give her the energy she needs to keep fighting the good fight in the House of Representatives.
---

name: Kamala Harris
subject: The Joe that I know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I wanted to take a second to email you about the Special Counsel’s report last week. | | |
---
Peter, I wanted to take a second to email you about the Special Counsel’s report last week. As a former prosecutor, I can tell you firsthand that the comments that were made by the Special Counsel were unnecessary, inaccurate, and inappropriate. On October 7, just hours before the Special Counsel questioned Joe, Israel experienced a horrific attack. The President and I got the calls in the hours after the attack occurred. _It was an intense moment for the Commander in Chief of the United States._ I was in nearly every meeting in the hours and days that followed. What I saw during that time was Joe spending countless hours with the Secretary of Defense, Secretary of State, and the heads of our intelligence community. In every single moment, the President was in front of it all. Joe was coordinating and directing leaders across America’s military, intelligence, and diplomatic communities. Asking questions like, “How many people are dead?” “How many were Americans?” “How many hostages are there?” and “Is the situation stable?” That is why I must say: **_The way that the President’s demeanor was characterized in that report could not be more wrong._It was clearly politically motivated.__** When it comes to the role and responsibility of a prosecutor in a situation like that, we should expect a higher level of integrity than what we saw. Nevertheless, I want you to know the Joe that I know. I’ve been with Joe in the Oval Office when the cameras are there, and when they are not. I’ve watched him bring folks together across the nation and across the world. _He is an incredible leader._ I remember where we started and everything that was happening in our country. Joe got us back on track. He created an economy that works for everyone, and nearly 15 million jobs along the way. He got bipartisan legislation passed to rebuild our nation’s crumbling infrastructure and fight climate change. He nominated the first Black woman in our nation’s history to the U.S. Supreme Court. But it’s not only about what Joe’s done. It’s about who he is. Joe is someone whose first response when things get tough is never to think about himself, but to care for everyone else. He’s someone who never asks “Why is this happening to me?” and instead asks “What can I do to make life better for you?” That is the kind of person that I want leading our country. I hope you agree. Kamala | | | [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE2z9I3KlofRvG7PtPUh-EgHeu4e1NhRU5tcOEkIvmnyXmK6iPAGFiS4VLaEyq4zCGaun6oafR627gJj1nE0lS1WSMBf8srZcnXycu3KImq0NsGfEbr4V9vZG6rKptts4T3frln5Nr8UQFiOfpZWXZu3u3a-2n0zqdyKEd8krDt_cy58nmwbU60FZEv9-w9H2jyzFX_k43Q_zrCeVsRS17kmvD32HFvPhPqRJeKzW9bAYqBhV5CWf2jHQEvxdkRekJYptJ_CwE1SXpDPIczDZuGrhSbxrnRLp4QuTQdmJfVh5zO8u5agu842Cxk3zw8nNzf02dkU3NjGy9_-pefWfC9Xjaf6f6xV1lW3zHnKQ1om1s0zNVBgLbRZ8XNjwPaiXqFTLsSsK4Lm0lyDjrY5xW988QS6DfQMMHJxt0x0GbuSCY8L5GVK4xhVZRIeIIpBlPIYd-vdgK1JAd0Zt_kI050hoxN0rLf5XOQhBHXURxFpq5tPL8Lde1Cs2S_T5Xx1C7s/43s/tBVQ37UsRgSjpXQw2ELdPA/h0/AI2SWAsUNzmO9do_NDKocERtHHTOImEhIe5YAOw4RKo)

clean_body: A new poll from CNN shows that Americans don't trust the Supreme Court in cases related to Trump and the 2024 election. | | | | | We need to confirm these numbers for ourselves, so we’re reaching out to top supporters in 43614 to ask: Do you trust the Supreme Court? | | | | **11:59 P.M. DEADLINE TONIGHT Friend, a new poll shows that most Americans don’t trust the Supreme Court to make the “right decisions” on cases related to the 2024 election! We should hardly be surprised so few Americans trust the far-right radicals in control of the Court. When he was president, Donald Trump teamed up with Mitch McConnell to stack the Supreme Court with three controversial, out-of-touch conservative justices — causing irreparable harm to the institution’s legacy and commitment to nonpartisanship. No wonder people are worried Trump's radical appointees might be biased on his political future! Now that he's about to become the GOP presidential nominee while facing more than 90 criminal charges, the stakes have never been higher. With the Supreme Court hearing arguments about Trump’s eligibility to run for office, we have to confirm this data for ourselves. That’s why we’re looking for grassroots activists in 43614 to respond to our live poll. Will you please respond before midnight? name: Rocky Harrigan
subject: We’re doing this for our daughters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
| | | Fellow American, [](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=0da3a30c2f3e41d1a02c49b9a4228a26&_e=33yA3QoO_NRlthU3Uk2zqMYmF1BCb5j2iBejT--bGaVIO1gBNEf1WcikP4iyh876-cjdSPhTQ_vYFt5tPTj7HoAvk0dJFhOWCQDMUyO8BTqbm6mvgz4239_jeGHvwPURGxAnHxftX6NVsPbr43Hjo9JHhx0OoToIe4IG2TswsRKZIOY3TbfQjLDj1stoR5u8SlzrwgyEHZApxG6KSOjeru-NwtSsKx1WK81GSxu5N7tGQnpElxTV2AfdVtrWDcHcLh77E26ImniFg5SGRXhsMaQTOc1BEqrwOSfOCMoCSzrwEdEEJeVYn2z3Xz5_nKSOW9VvPKgGVNcuHhj5rjvaJ1Wg6h6_P1USOdo4XIpb-nigzyfnG7k9YVh0_WEIttKOJ1JxoUDIfSgF-UNoePWryg%3D%3D) When my husband Pat decided to run for Congress, I’m not going to lie, I was hesitant. I’ve never seen myself as someone who could be a politician’s wife. I run an ammunitions business. I don’t mince words, and I’m certainly not the kind to try and make nice with the swamp. **But when I looked at my daughters, I knew Pat was making the right choice not just for our family, but for families all over America.** My husband is dedicated to building a country where every child can thrive. That means fighting crime in our communities, keeping our border secure to ensure their safety, and providing an education free from socialist indoctrination and hate. I know that Pat will be a tireless advocate for policies that prioritize the wellbeing and prosperity of the next generation because I see the way he loves and fights for our daughters. _But if we’re going to save America for our children, we need your help._ **[**Pat is facing an uphill battle for Congress, and he's facing attacks from the swamp at every turn. Will you help our mission to save the American dream today?**](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=0da3a30c2f3e41d1a02c49b9a4228a26&_e=33yA3QoO_NRlthU3Uk2zqMYmF1BCb5j2iBejT--bGaVIO1gBNEf1WcikP4iyh876huvHNRlMPKL1hL9Mk7IZFnBaCrzStMIuVyjjK2FbORCorAgufoKqE1hP51xbYvKiRAa68t_nWqeOBkzw7tjQe3FNtdyi0B45Zv5dAVwbQGHtsjdqd0WbVk2k3RCbPJ_27JvclehcDbGBKUbohnmCdvnkvpHKndBEupm0e_-x1LHByTyY__0tvEgKybaSxHAdWeSuxEoUoz_73XlBK-Qcm-I6wxd-xomgPs0dfFT1WgSwYzPhKetx34dZYMmic0EdWIPJp7Y8teHlrrv7CFmRSLNy3HxdP1rZIjkLf7dwmq4d9NuaMTaCUfrI242KdxN46WQJqUWAdquOL-moBhIclQ%3D%3D)**

name: Michael Bennet
subject: We’re out of time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_021224_Interviews_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_021224_Interviews_act]
I want to keep you updated about my work in Congress, friend. Congress has a monumental decision to make — to support Ukraine in their defense of democracy, or to abandon them when they need our support the most.
For the last two years, the Ukrainian people have won battle after battle in their fight against Putin’s tyrannical war, and they have astonished the world.
They’ve accomplished incredible feats on the frontline thanks to the resilience, imagination, and sacrifice of their people — and the humanitarian and military aid provided by the United States and our allies.
Ukraine has earned our continued support, but for the last several months, Republicans in Congress have thrown up roadblocks sending them more aid. We don’t have time to delay, and Ukraine doesn’t have time to spare.
In the push to get this bill done, I joined a number of news outlets to stress the urgency of this moment.
Click below to take a look:
>> CNN’s Situation Room with Wolf Blitzer [https://youtu.be/_6xHaKlUFrs]
>> CNBC’s Squawk Box [https://youtu.be/r-RckOoN-qE]
>> MSNBC’s José Díaz-Balart Reports [https://youtu.be/7vxLX7N84-g]
>> Fox News’s Your World Cavuto [https://youtu.be/lCJICM0HV-c]
>> Bloomberg News’s Balance of Power [https://youtu.be/LSMOG9RixYA]
>> NBC News Now’s Hallie Jackson Reports [https://youtu.be/ZlU9N6ZHzZQ]
>> MSNBC’s Andrea Mitchell Reports [https://youtu.be/-N8qUin9-Jg]
Ukraine’s fight is a fight for democracy and for Ukrainians to govern themselves free of Putin’s oppression. The work of our lifetime is to protect our democracy — and stand up for democracies around the world.
My team and I will keep you updated here as things develop, friend.
Thank you,
Michael

From: Ashley Ehasz
Subject: Need your help with this simple to do item:
As you might imagine, the To-Do List when you're running for office is endless, co-pilot.
And we've got a BIG one on our plates for the next 6 days: Finish collecting the 1,000 signatures we need for me to OFFICIALLY get on the ballot.

We quite literally can't afford to take a break from raising money. Not when Fitzpatrick is accepting corporate PAC donations, and I’m not.
_**[My finance team has said we need to raise $4,750 from grassroots donors between now and Feb 13 to keep us on track. name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Teichert=20for=20U.S.=20Senate?=
subject: Teichert on the Trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Teichert for Senate]()
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1763cef4801b/icymi-john-teicherts-vision-for-marylands-senate-on-fox-6692118?e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
Welcome to Teichert on the Trail, our weekly email highlighting the latest news and events from the campaign as retired Air Force Brigadier General John Teichert crisscrosses the state to earn the hearts, minds, and votes of Marylanders in the race to be their next U.S. Senator. He is a leader and not just another politician!
**Teichert in the News**
On Friday, General John Teichert responded to the news that former governor Larry Hogan had jumped into the race for the U.S. Senate. You can read John’s full statement above.
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=18c2e170c8&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
On Sunday, General Teichert joined[ Fox And Friends](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=deb9d4c484&e=1b1fb1ad9f) to discuss the U.S. retaliation strikes in the Middle East over the weekend. Addressing America’s deterrence strategy thus far, the General stated, “If we would have done this after the first attack against American positions instead of the 170th attack, then we would actually be credible in our deterrent posture. It’s far more difficult to regain deterrence in the mind of an adversary than it is to retain it, and now we’re playing catchup after weakness for the last four months or really the last 3 years. And the hope is that finally, they're starting to believe that America will stand up for our positions- but it’s unlikely that they’ll actually believe it until we show consistency.”

[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=3ce7905d32&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
John Teichert joined [O’Connor and Company](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=70232e19dc&e=1b1fb1ad9f) on Friday to discuss developing tensions in the Middle East and his bid for U.S. Senate in Maryland. Explaining how he plans to win the valuable votes of Marylanders, Teichert stated, “I’m running towards conservative solutions, conservative principles, and values. As I talk to people in inner-city Baltimore, or Prince George’s County or Somerset County, or Garrett County, I’m talking about those four big issues that they care about and how they have been struggling because of liberal policies, and that conservatives have the answer to those problems.”
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=724fe8d758&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
General Teichert joined [Fox45](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=eb141ed24b&e=1b1fb1ad9f) on Friday to address Iranian-subsidized drone attacks against U.S. positions in the Middle East. When asked how to effectively deter Iran, the General responded in part, “Three Americans have been killed, and frankly it was inevitable, because we have been absorbing these attacks for the last four months, and only responding with pinprick attacks. And it's time to attack something of relevance and significance to the Iranian military- likely in Syria- that will send them the message that America is back with strength, capability, will, and resolve that can restore deterrence.”
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=f8379c9a03&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
John Teichert joined NewsNation on Monday to discuss the impending threat of China’s rapidly- increasing nuclear arsenal. General Teichert explained in part, “The concern isn't just that they will launch a nuclear strike against the United States, but the phrase ‘intimidate’ is so important. That maybe in our minds, if they conventionally attack Taiwan, we would be dissuaded from engaging or supporting Taiwan because we could be worried that ultimately that would trip a threshold or a red line and would cause the Chinese to attack us with nuclear capability.”
|
---
**Teichert on the Trail**
| | | | | | | | | [](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=4f7541393c&e=1b1fb1ad9f)

---
|
---
# Endorsement Alert!
This week, General Teichert was honored to receive the endorsement of North Dakota’s Senator Kevin Cramer. Read Senator Cramer’s full statement [here](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=fb781f7aae&e=1b1fb1ad9f).
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=94ed8afe6d&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
|
---
**Thoughts by Teichert**
On Groundhog Day, General Teichert connected Bill Murray’s repeated experiences from the 1993 film “Groundhog Day” to the repeated experience that every American must endure- shameful failures of the American government over and over. Watch his video in full [here. ](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=687b3ad79c&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=9dcb99c2ff&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
John Teichert celebrated his wife, PhD Chemist and Chemistry professor, Melonie Teichert, along with all other Maryland scientists on National Periodic Table Day! Watch his full video [here. ](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=928c3b0490&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
John Teichert shared his thoughts on protecting women and girls in sports as a dad of two hard-working female athletes by expressing the importance of preserving the safety and opportunity for female athletes. Watch the full Teichert Talks video [here. ](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=31b72406d6&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=ec2e2a00b0&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
|
---
# Upcoming Events
This coming week, General Teichert will continue to campaign around the state of Maryland and meet with as many voters as he can. Here are some of the places he’ll be in case you’d like to come stop by!
**Women's Republican Club of Kent Island and Queen Anne's County** February 15th at 7 PM El Jefe Mexican Kitchen & Tequila Bar1235 Shopping Center Rd, StevensvilleMD 21666, USA
**Garrett County GOP Candidate Forum** February 17th from 12–5 PM Garrett College Performing Arts Center687 Mosser RoadMcHenry, MD 21541
**Allegany County GOP Candidate Meet and Greet** February 19th from 10AM–7PM Allegany County Fairgrounds11400 Moss AveCumberland, MD 21502, USA
**Leisureworld Republican Club** February 21st at 1:30 PMClubhouse I3700 Rossmoor BlvdSilver Spring, MD 20906, USA

|
---
Thank you for joining John on the trail as he looks to become the next U.S. Senator for the State of Maryland. Make sure to check out [teichertformaryland.com](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=1da27390b2&e=1b1fb1ad9f) and see how you can donate, get involved, and join the mailing list!
| [DONATE](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=24fae655f6&e=1b1fb1ad9f)

Teichert for Senate PO Box 3782 1296 Cronson Blvd Crofton, MD 21114-3782 USA

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/profile?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=68233ac087&e=1b1fb1ad9f&c=4168926234) or [unsubscribe](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=68233ac087&t=b&e=1b1fb1ad9f&c=4168926234)

name: Dawn Moore
subject: I am proud to support the initiative to enshrine the right to an abortion in our state constitution
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78882836/454757050/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjQ5OTUxZS1lM2M5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ni5wM9S6oiBjN9DpmJpyoP4hYAC5ak23RcVP4Vj-qN4=&emci=6e23785d-59c7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=cf49951e-e3c9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=24635485)
Friend, Immediately after the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , many states turned their backs on women. Some states even had trigger laws in place that would immediately ban the right to an abortion as soon as the decision was announced. **This is wrong.** As a strong supporter of a woman’s right to have bodily autonomy, including the right to an abortion, I firmly support the Vote Yes for Reproductive Freedom initiative to protect the right to an abortion and birth control in our state constitution. I recently spoke at an event encouraging Marylanders to vote YES on the upcoming initiative on our ballot this November. The Reproductive Freedom Referendum will protect the right to abortion and birth control in the state constitution. It will protect this right, no matter who is in office in the future. I know that while Wes is in office, he will do what it takes to protect reproductive rights, including getting this initiative passed. This referendum will protect future generations from anyone trying to take away our freedoms. We cannot make the mistake of assuming that the attacks will stop. We must fight to ensure anyone who serves after Wes will not have the power to take away abortion rights. We cannot, and will not, turn back the clock. So let’s get this done, Maryland. Thank you for supporting this fight, Dawn Flythe Moore
First Lady of Maryland
---

• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
That's what led me to enter this race. **[And that's why I'm urging you to join me by rushing me your GARVEY FOR SENATE Campaign R.S.V.P. without delay.](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f62ab544aabd49ed9e164ca445b1c203&_e=clxRH_uWqY3vuqjnRI0xIQP8BfEutglLWKR1exM7ZLkln0LKamDedupnwxllPFsj3cEo2BnON7Wby742bzLwhN1KH8BMW9AgkosZbS2jy8AEvC-AKl9VlsHvt507RbMxYVZ_FbiQAWfMHHYyQaCnkfpmLjgH6rQUoZcLhEbpzr085IM8dMBp5tM6KJ9DkX2qfIgbjOyR8kxZrB6UP8rKdZWU3yWBZZMUoPMloZYjp0mNH9qu5gPGRx-oTRroscD1YjpAvx_7s__YYT-qecBRzQQk7DT6pWrlyEEgiRnF2AKhfbNItAapXps79VbizGXRCuNz1z_F3OuwT-uBApEqy9KH6lFp1xODFFgDVVgQd6Oqih6K2c7pGeDBKh9kDC_a8sOfFUgY7ySC5r8t6V-Whg%3D%3D)** I get up every day and ask God to give me the strength to make a difference in people's lives. This really gets to heart of why I'm running... You see, the same dream and the same opportunity I was given is fading. It's fading all across America. But it's fading at an even faster pace right here in California. I pray you'll stand with me today.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate

**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. Friends, Tuesday at midnight is the deadline for the Virginia Senate to make decisions regarding all Senate bills. For that reason the Virginia Senate will meet at 10am instead of noon on Tuesday and work until they finish all Senate bills on the docket.
You will notice there on no committee meetings as all committees have completed their work and all the bills are now up for a vote on the Senate floor. Any bills that aren't dealt with before midnight die. After Tuesday midnight, the Senate will started working through House bills that passed the House. The committee process begins all over again, but this time with House bills. Beginning on Wednesday, I will begin focusing on House bills.
YOU can participate remotely with your legislators from the comfort of your home.
YOU can watch Senate Committees in action and at the right time, comment to the committee in real time.
This is YOUR opportunity to DO SOMETHING.
Above I have listed the dockets for THIS TUESDAY'S Senate Committee hearings. By clicking each link you can quickly look over which bills are coming up this Tuesday that are of interest to you.
Find a bill that interests you and want to comment remotely?
Then click on the link below to the streaming of the committee meeting and follow the directions to either view the committee in real time or comment remotely to the Senate committee members in real time to state your support or opposition to a particular bill.
It's that easy to express your support or opposition to a bill coming up on this Tuesday's docket.
---
|
---
|

SPECIAL GUEST: SENATOR BILL STANLEY
Legislative Update Overview of bills that passed, failed How to watch committees online

| Thank you to those who have pitched in to help cover my costs to communicate with you each week while the General Assembly is in session. THANK YOU.
Many of you have advised me that you appreciate my instructive and informative emails, regarding important bills coming before the Virginia General Assembly.
I'm delighted to continue to send you these emails and ask for your continued support so that I may continue to communicate with you.
If you haven't done so already, will you please help me offset the cost by pitching in a few dollars?
It costs about $400 per month to send out emails to keep you informed about bills coming before the General Assembly.
Would you please make a donation today to help offset the cost, so that I can continue to bring you the latest on what's going on in the General Assembly?
Thank you in advance for your continued support.
After serving you for 8 years in the Virginia Senate, I know how things really work in Richmond and want to keep you informed.
Please consider donating $25, $50, $100 so that I can continue to communicate with you and help you to engage and interact with your representatives to ensure accountability and transparency.

name: Tina Kotek
subject: My number one priority this session is…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Legislators are in their second week of their short legislative session. My team and I are working hard on the top priority this year: Housing production. I introduced **one bill this year.** That’s how important it is to me to get this done for Oregon. In listening to communities across the state last year, I know how important it is to build more affordable housing for everyone, and to do it as quickly as possible. It’s an essential part of tackling our homelessness crisis and attracting more folks and jobs to our state. The housing production package includes a $500 million investment for new housing production, including support for climate-friendly homes and new directives for affordable housing construction. It’s a bill that will do a lot of good for Oregon, and I’m working hard with the legislature to get it across the finish line. [_**We’ll need a groundswell of support to pass this bill — will you add your name today to show your support and encourage the legislature to approve more housing production ASAP?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78883040/454757736/-643033183?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240212_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODlhMmRkYS1lM2M5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nTlqYtZ6O0lx1gtx6QWZeLAvy4Bcy_gGlEcCHChccYE=&emci=e9db8ff9-d8c9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=889a2dda-e3c9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=15353729) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78883041/454757737/-643033183?contactdata=fMnIUp+o28psXezQ2KF15BCXR3k5huCLf+UIBv6anIEYbMI+VKR/3V5y8rOXqMj3l8aMBHPSVUFvaJoruC3l0NEFldJLCUK0euXf/1gkDyu5f2OIWffsOULgv9fqbDyGCTi/5JakgBXVPG9AnjS3FvcODDHwcr5r6v+vNd5NPDA=&refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240212_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODlhMmRkYS1lM2M5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nTlqYtZ6O0lx1gtx6QWZeLAvy4Bcy_gGlEcCHChccYE=&emci=e9db8ff9-d8c9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=889a2dda-e3c9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=15353729)

It’s essential we get this housing production package to my desk to sign into law. Thanks in advance for your help getting it done.
— Tina

Portland, OR 97242 **[tinafororegon.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78883042/454757738/1133357015?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240212_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODlhMmRkYS1lM2M5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nTlqYtZ6O0lx1gtx6QWZeLAvy4Bcy_gGlEcCHChccYE=&emci=e9db8ff9-d8c9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=889a2dda-e3c9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=15353729) | [info@tinafororegon.com](mailto:info@tinafororegon.com)** | Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

name: Hill Harper
subject: I’m running a different kind of campaign in Michigan, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
And I want to hear from you.
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/130?refcode=BAX_em_HHR_PET_PrioritiesSurvey_021224&t=1&akid=949%2E62735%2ExA5DX_)
I’m running a different kind of campaign in Michigan, Peter.
**When I say I’m unbought, unbossed, and unbullied, I mean it.** I turned down a $20 million donation from one of AIPAC’s biggest donors to run the grassroots, people-powered campaign Michigan deserves. I knew we needed a senator who represents the voice of our people -- NOT the deep pockets of special interests.
**We need leaders who understand our struggles. Peter, I’m running to become one of the _few_ active union members, single parents of a school-aged child, and small business owners in the Senate.**
Michigan is tired of the same old career politicians missing the mark. I know I’m damn tired of watching them break their promises on everything from raising wages to getting money out of politics -- _and I’ll bet you are, too._
All that changes when we win this race and get to work in Washington, but first: I want to hear from you. **We can’t reach everyone on the campaign trail, so I hope you’ll take 30 seconds to share your thoughts with me.**
[**Peter, I’ve put together a brief survey to hear directly from our working supporters. I’d love to hear from you, so please: Take a moment to share your top priorities >>>**](https://act.hillharper.com/survey/em_HHR_PET_PrioritiesSurvey_021224/?source=BAX_em_HHR_PET_PrioritiesSurvey_021224-949&akid=949%2E62735%2ExA5DX_)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY »](https://act.hillharper.com/survey/em_HHR_PET_PrioritiesSurvey_021224/?source=BAX_em_HHR_PET_PrioritiesSurvey_021224-949&akid=949%2E62735%2ExA5DX_)**
It’s time to shake things up in Washington. Let’s get after it, Peter!
– Hill Harper
Democrat for U.S. Senate
* * *
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bax_hh_em_footer?refcode=BAX_em_HHR_PET_PrioritiesSurvey_021224&t=2&refcode2=949_62735_xA5DX_&akid=949%2E62735%2ExA5DX_)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=949%2E62735%2ExA5DX_)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.hillharper.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=949%2E62735%2ExA5DX_)

To give by check:
Hill Harper for Michigan
PO Box 13195
Lansing, MI 48901
Email us: [info@hillharper.com](mailto:info@hillharper.com)

We can’t reach everyone on the campaign trail, so I hope you’ll take 30 seconds to share your thoughts with me. It’s time to shake things up in Washington. Let’s get after it, Peter! – Hill Harper Democrat for U.S. Senate

name: Climate News via NextGen America
subject: 🚨CLIMATE WIN🚨 The EPA just announced new, tougher pollution standards
body:
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78883127/454758175/240436357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjgyNWIxNC1lNGM5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xTFZ8wLoOKvjpnAjzvMq0lOwh1_HLYBD-3iXtPtqScE=&emci=fd30c13f-b6c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=0f825b14-e4c9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=6787172) A major climate win was just announced, folks! To combat deadly air pollution, the EPA is cracking down on soot and smoke production by raising the U.S.’s pollution standards. **Here’s what that means:** Corporate polluters are finally being held accountable for damaging the air we breathe. While Trump was in office, he gutted critical protections that made our air and water cleaner and safer. The EPA was filled to the brim with oil and coal lobbyists who simply didn’t care about the damage they were doing. Black and Brown communities in particular were disproportionately affected by unchecked corporate pollution. Now, we’re getting back on course. But there’s still plenty of work to do before our environment is fully protected. The EPA’s tougher pollution standards are a great first step, but there’s more we can do to make a difference. name: Kirsten Engel
subject: I’m horrified by this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://engelforarizona.com [https://engelforarizona.com]
Peter,
Juan Ciscomani is failing Arizona.
Our border is in crisis. We need our leaders in DC to get serious about finding a solution — but Ciscomani is too busy playing politics.
The Arizona Republic published my new op-ed on the border and my opponent’s inaction. You can read it here >> [https://www.azcentral.com/story/opinion/op-ed/2024/02/09/rep-juan-ciscomani-rejects-border-bill-trump/72499722007/]
Arizona’s border communities have had to shoulder this crisis for too long. We need federal help — but Washington has failed us.
Lawmakers in the Senate finally came together from across the aisle to create a bipartisan deal to fund the border.
It’s not perfect. But it would provide funding for personnel to handle incoming migrants and stop the flow of fentanyl, as well as ensure that border agents aren’t overwhelmed with asylum requests.
Here’s the problem: the border crisis is good for Donald Trump politically. He doesn’t want to see it solved — so he came out against the bipartisan deal. And once Donald Trump opposed the deal, so did his MAGA followers, including Juan Ciscomani.
I won’t let partisan games or political stunts stop me from making progress for Arizona.
This is the most competitive House race in Arizona. Will you support my campaign for AZ-06 by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_021224_Border_act]

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/IWIyAh0lwL2Xa5XtckbsFw~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/IWIyAh0lwL2Xa5XtckbsFw~~/AARclAA~~~) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/IWIyAh0lwL2Xa5XtckbsFw~~/AARclAA~~~)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/IWIyAh0lwL2Xa5XtckbsFw~~/AARclAA~~~)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2024 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

American Freedom Report
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sQSFgQwyd8IUzMoDehtcYw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnrRGsP0S_aHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2VsZWN0b3JhbC1jb2xsZWdlLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA1ODROMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVsZWN0b3JhbF9jb2xsZWdlX3N1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1TVVJWRVlJTUFHRV9QQS1ST04tMjAyNDAyMTJXA3NwY0IKZcPRfcplh1YVUlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [ ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sQSFgQwyd8IUzMoDehtcYw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnrRGsP0S_aHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2VsZWN0b3JhbC1jb2xsZWdlLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA1ODROMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVsZWN0b3JhbF9jb2xsZWdlX3N1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1TVVJWRVlJTUFHRV9QQS1ST04tMjAyNDAyMTJXA3NwY0IKZcPRfcplh1YVUlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sQSFgQwyd8IUzMoDehtcYw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnrRGsP0S_aHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2VsZWN0b3JhbC1jb2xsZWdlLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA1ODROMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVsZWN0b3JhbF9jb2xsZWdlX3N1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1TVVJWRVlJTUFHRV9QQS1ST04tMjAyNDAyMTJXA3NwY0IKZcPRfcplh1YVUlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Everywhere I’ve gone, people have told me personal stories about why they support an assault weapons ban, abortion rights, affordable health care, and so much more.
For me, it’s a powerful reminder that this race isn’t about scoring political points or winning power in DC.
This race is about fighting for real people and the issues that matter to them — and I’m committed to being a leader who delivers for those who call Texas home.
But a true grassroots campaign requires more than just a few thousand miles out on the road, Peter. It also requires steadfast support from folks like you.
That’s why I’m asking for your support tonight. If you’re able to chip in $5, $10, or more right now, I’d be so grateful. It’s going to take all of us working together to defeat Ted Cruz — and I need you on the team. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]

name: Shamaine Daniels
subject: We did it!
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
Dear Friend,
I wanted you to be one of the first to know that we did it! I am officially on the Democratic ballot in PA-10!
For the past three weeks, our campaign has been hard at work gathering signatures for my nominating petitions. In Pennsylvania, Democratic candidates for Congress need to collect the signatures of at least 1,000 registered Democrats. Today, we filed our petitions, and with well over the 1,000 required signatures!
I am especially proud of the diverse team of volunteers who made this possible and the diverse group of voters who signed my nominating petitions. We had over 70 volunteers from all walks of life, and every corner of PA-10. Our petition signatures reflect that same diversity - young and old, English speakers and non-English speakers, and people from a wide array of racial, ethnic, and cultural backgrounds. This is the type of coalition that we need to turn out to beat Scott Perry in November, and I am proud that my campaign is well on its way.
I know that you aren't a resident of PA-10, so you couldn't sign my petition, but you can support the campaign and join our coalition by making a contribution today! Click here to donate now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
This is a crucial step in the electoral process. It was a lot of hard work, and I am so proud of our team. However, it is just the first step, and there is still a lot to be done. That's why I'm asking for your support today!
Thank you in advance and on to victory!
Shamaine
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/99379/images/PaidForByDanielsForCongressB.jpg]
Daniels For Congress
2018 N. 3rd Street
Harrisburg, PA 17102

This is a critical turning point in our race and we’re about to see a flood of outside money and attacks rush into Montana. You can bet far-right groups will spend unprecedented amounts to attack me and mislead voters.

**Mitch McConnell knows Montana is his best shot at taking back the gavel so we need to raise an emergency $1,000,000 this week to fight back ASAP. Outside groups will stop at nothing to defeat me and retake the gavel.**

clean_body: | BREAKING NEWS: Another GOP opponent has launched his campaign to defeat Jon Tester and flip Montana’s Senate seat = | = Peter, Friday, another GOP opponent threw his hat in the ring against me for Montana’s U.S. Senate seat. Experts are saying Montana is a complete toss-up so we have to act ASAP. This is a critical turning point in our race and we’re about to see a flood of outside money and attacks rush into Montana. You can bet far-right groups will spend unprecedented amounts to attack me and mislead voters. Mitch McConnell knows Montana is his best shot at taking back the gavel so we need to raise an emergency $1,000,000 this week to fight back ASAP. Outside groups will stop at nothing to defeat me and retake the gavel. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. = = = = There has never been a more important time for you to step up than right now. — Jon ******** ****** ****** ****** ****** ******** Defeat Republicans | Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www.DefeatRepublicans.org) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. # A Celebration of Unity and Diversity:
---
| |
# The Annual 2024 Orange County Tet Parade & Events!!
---
| |
---
| | Dear Supporters,We are thrilled to share with you the success of our recent participation in the 2024 Annual Tet Parade with The Democratic Party Orange County. This spectacular event brought together people from all walks of life to celebrate our vibrant community and showcase the rich diversity of Orange County, CA.
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | SUPPORTING DEMOCRATS FOR THE VIETNAMESE COMMUNITY IN ORANGE COUNTY, CALIFORNIA
---
| |
---
| | THE DOM JONES TEAM IS CONNECTING ALL ASIAN COMMUNITIES IN ORANGE COUNTY, AND ENCOURAGING ALL TO GET OUT AND VOTE!
---
| |
---
| | STANDING IN SOLIDARITY WITH ALL FELLOW DEMOCRATIC CANDIDATES AND LIFTING UP OUR YOUTH.
---
| |
---
| | WITH A GREAT TEAM THAT POUNDS THE PAVEMENT, AND IS LETTING EVERYONE KNOW THAT THE DOM JONES TEAM IS HERE TO WIN AND FLIP AD72!
---
| |
---
| | INTERVIEWING WITH THE MEDIA AND SPREADING THE MESSAGE OF UNITY & REASON THROUGHOUT THE DISTRICT, CALIFORNIA, AND OUR NATION!
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | DOM JONES' MESSAGE OF UNITY RESONATES WITH ALL WHO LISTEN. FOR IT IS THE MESSAGE OF HARMONY, COLLABORATION, ACCEPTANCE, AND UNDERSTANDING AMONGST ALL NATIONALITIES.
---
| |
---
| | DOM JONES SUPPORTS THE LION'S CLUB COMMUNITY IN ORANGE COUNTY!
---
| |
---
| | SHARING THE JOY OF THE LUNAR NEW YEAR WITH OUR YOUNG CHILDREN. SPREADING PRPOSPERITY AND ABUNDACE TO EVERYONE.
---
| |
---
| | TEACHING AND GUIDING AT EVERY OPPORTUNITY OUR YOUNG ADULTS, WHO NEED EXCELLENT EXAMPLES OF CIVIC LEADERSHIP AND RESPONSIBILITY.
---
| |
---
| | EMBRACING OUR WISER COMMUNITY MEMBERS. REMINDING THEM THAT THEY ARE NEVER FORGOTTEN, AND ALWAYS NEEDED TO HELP OFFER THE WISDOM THAT ONLY LIVED EXPERIENCES BRING.
---
| |
---
| | BUILDING ENTHUSIASM FOR A NOBLE CAUSE!
---
| |
---
| | DOM JONES STANDS WITH THE VIETNAMESE COMMUNITY!
---
| |
---
| | DOM JONES ĐỒNG HÀNH CÙNG CỘNG ĐỒNG NGƯỜI VIỆT!
---
| |
## Proudly Standing with the Vietnamese Community
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| | As the largest Vietnamese community outside of Vietnam in the world, Orange County is home to countless individuals who have contributed immensely to our society. Team Dom Jones proudly supported and marched alongside our Vietnamese neighbors, demonstrating our unwavering commitment to standing with every community in our district.
---
| |
## Upcoming Events
---
| | We have an exciting lineup of events coming up that allow you to engage directly with our campaign and help shape the future of our community. Here are a few highlights:
---
| |
## Legislative Discussion
## with:
## Dom Jones & Immigration Attorney/State Assembly Candidate Jimmy Pham!
## Zoom Event!
---
| | Join Dom Jones and our team on FEBRUARY 13TH aT 6:30 PM ON ZOOM for a community discussion where we will discuss important issues facing our district. This is a valuable opportunity for you to voice your concerns, ask questions, and share your ideas.
---
| | | [**REGISTER HERE FOR THIS EVENT! :-)**](https://www.domjones.org/so/5bOsUox-W/c?w=otHn092iplncNAS7zcAM0LUitpIwDpVl4v8rIRspo9Y.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly91czA2d2ViLnpvb20udXMvbWVldGluZy9yZWdpc3Rlci90WlVsZnUyZ3JUOHFIdFAybzQwT19aekRsMVlqR3l6MUZjcnI_X3hfem1fcnRhaWQ9VFo0WmVYOUVUdHlHank0X2k4ekFIZy4xNzA3NzY4ODI5NDM1LjlkYmEzNTVjODc2NDBhNDZiZjM4OWJjZWE1MzRhMDAyJl94X3ptX3JodGFpZD00MzIjL3JlZ2lzdHJhdGlvbiIsInIiOiJiNDAyZDQ0Ny1kNzYwLTQ1NWItODBhNS1hZDRmYjRkYWQzMmQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI1MWJiMTc0NC0yYTkzLTQzMGMtOGM0Ny0wODA2ODA2ZGQxYzIifQ)

## Volunteer Training
---

## Fundraising Gala
---
| | Our fundraising gala is set to dazzle with an evening of live music, delectable cuisine, and inspiring speeches. The funds raised will be used to amplify our reach and ensure our message resonates throughout the community. Details coming soon!

subject: DELLICKER & SCHUMER TRIVIA TIME...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mackenzie for Congress]()
body:
Mackenzie For Congress | | | | | [](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=c858868be5&e=5ccada9200)
---
|
---
This afternoon, Chuck Schumer, Senate Democrats, and a bunch of warmongering RINOs voted to pass an additional $60 billion in spending for war in Ukraine. They passed this despite opposition from conservatives. The forever war funders have been pushing this for months...instead of SECURING AMERICA’S BORDER.
So, let’s play some trivia on the forever wars advocates...
**WHO SAID IT?**
**FOREVER WARS KEVIN DELLICKER****OR****RADICAL LIBERAL CHUCK SCHUMER**
“Ukraine is dangerously low on supplies, including ammo and air defenses.”
[ ] Kevin Dellicker [ ] Chuck Schumer
“I tell you what, I’m glad we are sending [Ukraine] arms.”
[ ] Kevin Dellicker [ ] Chuck Schumer
ANSWERS: BOTH.
CHUCK SCHUMER AND KEVIN DELLICKER AGREE ON MORE FUNDING FOR WAR IN UKRAINE. RADICAL LIBERALS LIKE SUSAN WILD AND JOE BIDEN ALSO CONTINUE TO SUPPORT MORE WAR FUNDING.
_(For the record: Quote 1 - Chuck Schumer in Washington DC, 2/12/24 and Quote 2 - Kevin Dellicker at the Slate Belt Republican Association on 8/8/2023)_
Forever Wars Kevin Dellicker consistently advocates to send more of your money overseas for war in Ukraine. He shares this globalist position with the likes of Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, Susan Wild, and a bunch of warmongering RINOs.
**Ryan Mackenzie believes we need to address America’s issues first**. And we shouldn’t be forced by the Democrats or RINOs to send **even more** of our money overseas, while our country’s own borders remain wide open.
Building the wall and bringing back the policies of Donald Trump that stopped the flow of illegal immigration should be our top priority. Without a border, we don’t have a country.
IN THE UPCOMING ELECTIONS, WE MUST STOP JOE BIDEN AND FOREVER WAR CANDIDATES LIKE KEVIN DELLICKER.
| [DONATE TODAY TO HELP ME STOP THE NEOCONS](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=d89a55eb42&e=5ccada9200)
---
If you would like to be part of our team, please reach out at [info@mackenzieforcongress.com](mailto:info@mackenzieforcongress.com) or call my campaign at (484) 347-8777.
|

subject: Today is the day of Lincoln and LaRouche
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sare for Senate
body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240218_invit_3&n=1)
---
Friend Today, February 12, is the birthday of one of America's greatest presidents, Abraham Lincoln, and this year it also is the fifth anniversary of the death of one of America's greatest statesmen,[ Lyndon LaRouche,](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=mKw8jchFyn85Yz7XRNVdeuXJxFpOf0VXCh6xnws3LZ8j7sRbX5yY7aXZz5u7Koposb02E8q5uV_kBIUEanRfWuLnwDUaRqQDs8q1gjxkul-FXyPQGRqJrGhwxmAyhEazpblNDtPq8PHeVrZfPTNp7A&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240218_invit_3&n=2) with whom I worked for over 30 years. In 1975, Lyndon LaRouche first proposed a bold peace plan for Palestine and Israel, based on development of the most important resource of the region: water. The LaRouche Organization has just released a beautiful video of that program, [linked here](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=mKw8jchFyn85Yz7XRNVdeuXJxFpOf0VXCh6xnws3LZ8yJ65heBOGb8WyqFzlEF-z3cSijId_vy6Hl7nImMgIJWiTsy9Ko-hpzpvS4H8_Dxb5NhNf1dkOubycaObR_6cy&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240218_invit_3&n=3), which I encourage you to share far and wide. The horror of the genocide being carried out by Israeli troops with American weapons against the people of Gaza, of whom over 100,000 are now dead, wounded or buried under rubble, must compel us to demand a change in American policy NOW, not after the November elections. To that end, I again invite you to join me at the February 18th conference, _**America's Next 50 Years**_ , which will be held this Sunday in Manhattan. I am also delighted to announce that Jose Vega, who just declared his candidacy for Congress against Ritchie Torres, will be speaking as well. You may RSVP to attend in person or over zoom by clicking the appropriate box below. See you soon!
# **America's Next Fifty Years
**
### **NYC, Sunday, February 18, 2024**
### _Conference tickets are $25. If you've already given the donation limit to my campaign and want to attend, please call 646-328-1932._
| [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/presidents_day_conference_zoom?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240218_invit_3&n=4 "RSVP for Zoom Link") [RSVP for Zoom Link](https://www.sareforsenate.com/presidents_day_conference_zoom?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240218_invit_3&n=4)
---
## Partial Speakers List for Sunday, Feb. 18
**(Some speakers will be via video, participation does not constitute endorsement of any political campaign, the views expressed are those of the speakers.)**
****
**Diane Sare** _ – LaRouche Candidate for US Senate, NY_
Moderator, **Daniel Burke** _ – Former candidate for US Senate, NJ; political activist_
__
**Jose Vega** _ – LaRouche Candidate for U.S. Representative NY-15; political activist; [votevega.nyc](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=ql8DonfEknxnqNamBfnM8LI_K16-Bnk_vCUXFFJEK8A&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240218_invit_3&n=5)
_
**Vanessa Beeley** _ – British independent journalist, [beeley.substack.com](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=l9OkhVznrohcGfWC_ay0sw-pyJk9GfEUW3FdiBDr_xM&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240218_invit_3&n=6)
_
**Anastasia Battle** _– Editor-in-Chief, Schiller Institute Leonore Magazine; Lead Organizer, [humanityforpeace.net](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=LfcS0PZJTRYcW5uDMAWHmiTNKL15LHpcCTQrniRMVR8&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240218_invit_3&n=7)_
**Helga Zepp-LaRouche** – _Founder and Leader of The Schiller Institute_
**Bob Baker** – _Staff writer, EIR magazine; political agricultural activist_
__
**Princy Mthombeni** — _Founder of “[Africa4Nuclear](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwN9gXvAKe08Furg6AFdUJor8EGY2XOIyeJN3YlrwXewTY&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240218_invit_3&n=8)”;__ advocate of empowering girls and women through education and technology_
**Dennis Speed** – _Host of the LaRouche Organization's weekly [Fireside Chat program](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=w5XKTZ0h8dEcNEoc_HghfNA27XkOC96gLA0TwDMRlh_-7l4dG-_dBLJccKytWQBQe08U1DlOa9x58nL7MrRSwQ&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240218_invit_3&n=9), veteran political strategist_
* * *
\--Diane

But today, tomorrow, and every day, we want to celebrate the incredible women who prove day in and day out that we are **tough enough** , we are **smart enough** , and we are **brave enough** to get the job done — no matter the challenges.

clean_body: | = It’s almost Galentine’s Day, friends! Whether it's running a business, raising a family, or touring the world — here's to all the gals out there getting it done each and every day. | = As a woman, a mother, and a candidate, Callie knows the hurdles that we're expected to jump through before we can be taken as seriously as our male counterparts. And I know that, to some people, watching strong women succeed can feel threatening. But today, tomorrow, and every day, we want to celebrate the incredible women who prove day in and day out that we are tough enough , we are smart enough , and we are brave enough to get the job done — no matter the challenges. = So, if you're ready to celebrate Galentine’s day at full volume, take a moment to then = so we can have a role model in Congress for young women to look up to. = Rock on, ladies! Annalee Garrity, Campaign Manager and Gabrielle Brohr, Coordinating Director Team Callie Barr | Callie Barr is a 5th-generation Michigander, advocate for veterans, and lawyer. She’s running to take on extremism and do-nothing politicians in D.C. that are leaving rural America behind. Can you help send Callie to Congress by donating today? | = | Paid for by Callie Barr for Congress Callie Barr for Congress PO Box 6921 Traverse City, MI 49696 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

AGWAN CAMPAIGN RELEASES STATEMENT ON AIPAC AND DMFI’S INTERFERENCE IN TX-07 DEMOCRATIC PRIMARY

“Houston Democrats must not allow our primary to be hijacked by Republican billionaires who are trying to protect Benjamin
Netanyahu and his right-wing war machine.”

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:

February 12, 2024

HOUSTON, TX – Agwan for Congress released the following statement in response to the American Israel Public Affairs Committee
(AIPAC) and Democratic Majority for Israel (DMFI)’s interference in the TX-07 Democratic primary:

“Congresswoman Lizzie Fletcher and her MAGA extremist mega-donors are terrified of our grassroots movement to elect a champion for
Palestinian human rights,” said Alex Inkiow, Pervez Agwan’s Campaign Manager. “Texas’ 7th District is excited about Pervez because
he is the only candidate for Congress who is calling for an end to the war in Gaza through a permanent ceasefire. The momentum is
on our side, so AIPAC and DMFI are mobilizing to try and stop us by pouring dark money into attacks against our campaign. Houston
Democrats must not allow our primary to be hijacked by Republican billionaires who are trying to protect Benjamin Netanyahu and
his war machine.”

clean_body: Peter, MAGA billionaires are trying to buy this election! We will not pro-israel lobbies [] [] REPUBLICAN BILLIONAIRES ARE FUNDING MY OPPONENT Read our Press Release Here [] AGWAN CAMPAIGN RELEASES STATEMENT ON AIPAC AND DMFI’S INTERFERENCE IN TX-07 DEMOCRATIC PRIMARY “Houston Democrats must not allow our primary to be hijacked by Republican billionaires who are trying to protect Benjamin Netanyahu and his right-wing war machine.” FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: February 12, 2024 HOUSTON, TX – Agwan for Congress released the following statement in response to the American Israel Public Affairs Committee (AIPAC) and Democratic Majority for Israel (DMFI)’s interference in the TX-07 Democratic primary: “Congresswoman Lizzie Fletcher and her MAGA extremist mega-donors are terrified of our grassroots movement to elect a champion for Palestinian human rights,” said Alex Inkiow, Pervez Agwan’s Campaign Manager. “Texas’ 7th District is excited about Pervez because he is the only candidate for Congress who is calling for an end to the war in Gaza through a permanent ceasefire. The momentum is on our side, so AIPAC and DMFI are mobilizing to try and stop us by pouring dark money into attacks against our campaign. Houston Democrats must not allow our primary to be hijacked by Republican billionaires who are trying to protect Benjamin Netanyahu and his war machine.” Continue reading the press statement here. [] Continue Reading My Blog Here [] [] THE ISSUES PERVEZ AGWAN STANDS FOR UNIVERSAL MEDICARE FOR ALL [] CEASEFIRE IN GAZA [] GREEN NEW HOUSTON [] WOMENS RIGHTS [] EQUALITY AND JUSTICE FOR ALL [] Pervez Agwan - Instagram [] [] Pervez Agwan Twitter [] [] Pervez Agwan - Youtube [] [] Copyright © 2024 Pervez Agwan For US Congress, All rights reserved. name: Justice Democrats
subject: All eyes on Rafah
disclaimer_text: paid for by our tax dollars
body:
Take action to demand President Biden stop ALL funding for Israel’s genocide and ethnic cleansing of the Palestinian people.
#
Peter,
Yesterday while many Americans were distracted by the Super Bowl, **the Israeli military carpet bombed the city of Rafah where more than 1.4 million Palestinians were previously told to seek refuge.**
Benjamin Netanyahu’s government has made clear they plan to forcibly remove more than a million people from Gaza, whether through bombs and guns or deportation. _This is genocide and ethnic cleansing, full stop._
**[President Biden must end any political, military, and financial support for Israel immediately. If you agree, add your name to our petition with Rashida Tlaib and other partners now!](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140348?t=1&akid=33296%2E1203867%2EsuFc6K)**
**Rafah was supposed to be a ‘safe zone.’** More than a million innocent civilians have nowhere else to go, after Israel carpet bombed and led a ground invasion across the rest of Gaza, destroying their homes and communities. This city has become the most densely populated area in the world, and now Israel is indiscriminately dropping bombs and planning a ground invasion to clear out the remaining Palestinian population.
We cannot allow Israel’s government to attack and forcibly remove these innocent people, paid for by our tax dollars.
**[Help us increase the pressure on President Biden to suspend all weapons transfers and military funding to Israel’s government, stop enabling the genocide of Palestinians, and push for a ceasefire NOW. Add your name →](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140348?t=2&akid=33296%2E1203867%2EsuFc6K)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140348?t=3&akid=33296%2E1203867%2EsuFc6K)**
Time is of the essence and millions of lives are at stake. Thank you for joining us in taking action and standing on the right side of history.
— Justice Democrats

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240212-33296-footer&t=4&refcode2=33296_1203867_suFc6K&akid=33296%2E1203867%2EsuFc6K)**

body:
The road to flipping the House blue runs straight through districts like AZ-01 and NY-03. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78885322/454765027/41388607?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240212_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWU4ODY1ZDEtZTljOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mbuZV_hdV5UjSg74H4kRKD_8shPYz6L5ZUmYyDcnzjU=)
---
Peter, The road to flipping the House blue runs **straight through** toss-up districts like AZ-01 and NY-03. Although New York and Arizona are on opposite coasts, AZ-01 and NY-03 have a lot in common. They’ve both been saddled with ineffective leaders who’ve failed to deliver. George Santos is one of only six people to be expelled from Congress and David Schweikert is one of only five people in American history to be unanimously censured by both parties. Tomorrow, NY-03 will hold a special election to fill Santos’ empty seat. It will be one of the **first real tests of strength for grassroots Democrats in 2024** — its results could help us predict who will fill the White House and control Congress. The next step? We’ve got to defeat David Schweikert, elect Andrei, flip the House, and get back to work for everyday Americans. Just like the people of NY-03, residents of AZ-01 deserve a _**real representative**_ who will fight for them in Congress — not for Big Wall Street Banks, Big Oil, and Big Drug Companies. Andrei is ready to step up and deliver for his community, but he can’t get there without the support of this team. [**Peter, can you chip in $25, $50, or any amount today to help get Andrei to Congress so constituents of AZ-01 finally get the representation they deserve? Your support is vital to this campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78885324/454765029/-106617006?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240212_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWU4ODY1ZDEtZTljOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mbuZV_hdV5UjSg74H4kRKD_8shPYz6L5ZUmYyDcnzjU=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78885326/454765031/-106617006?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240212_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWU4ODY1ZDEtZTljOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mbuZV_hdV5UjSg74H4kRKD_8shPYz6L5ZUmYyDcnzjU=)

clean_body: The road to flipping the House blue runs straight through districts like AZ-01 and NY-03. | = Peter, The road to flipping the House blue runs straight through toss-up districts like AZ-01 and NY-03. Although New York and Arizona are on opposite coasts, AZ-01 and NY-03 have a lot in common. They’ve both been saddled with ineffective leaders who’ve failed to deliver. George Santos is one of only six people to be expelled from Congress and David Schweikert is one of only five people in American history to be unanimously censured by both parties. Tomorrow, NY-03 will hold a special election to fill Santos’ empty seat. It will be one of the first real tests of strength for grassroots Democrats in 2024 — its results could help us predict who will fill the White House and control Congress. The next step? We’ve got to defeat David Schweikert, elect Andrei, flip the House, and get back to work for everyday Americans. Just like the people of NY-03, residents of AZ-01 deserve a real representative who will fight for them in Congress — not for Big Wall Street Banks, Big Oil, and Big Drug Companies. Andrei is ready to step up and deliver for his community, but he can’t get there without the support of this team. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for your support. — Andrei for Arizona Andrei for Arizona PO Box 26058 Phoenix, AZ 85068 United States ** | mailto:info@andreiforarizona.com | Paid for by Andrei for Arizona | Andrei Cherny is a former member of the U.S. Navy Reserves. name: Team Fetterman
subject: It’s brutal out there
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Derek,
Can you spare $5 to support John Fetterman’s work in the Senate?
To be honest with you... it’s brutal out there. On one hand, you have John + Senate Democrats trying to pass common-sense legislation. **On the other, you have Senate Republicans wasting time in protest of a bill they *literally asked for*.**
And don’t even get us started on House Republicans...
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240212-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240212-8791&refcode2=8791_434096_TZc0Fu&akid=8791%2E434096%2ETZc0Fu)
John is doing what he can to fight for working folks, but he needs your support. He only got to the Senate in the first place because of thousands of people like you, chipping in $5 when they could, to support him.
**[And trust us-- it adds up. So if you’re able, chip in today. ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240212-1?refcode=em20240212-1-8791&refcode2=8791_434096_TZc0Fu&akid=8791%2E434096%2ETZc0Fu)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240212-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240212-8791&refcode2=8791_434096_TZc0Fu&akid=8791%2E434096%2ETZc0Fu)**
Thank you!
-- Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20240212-8791-footer&t=1&refcode2=8791_434096_TZc0Fu&akid=8791%2E434096%2ETZc0Fu)**

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Before Katie takes the stage tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
After our last debate, we didn’t see the bump in poll numbers that we would have hoped.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=37532%2E3422442%2E_9QGuO)
Derek,
Tonight, Katie takes the stage in San Francisco for the second California Senate candidate debate (**[you can watch it live at 7 PM PT/10 PM ET](https://act.katieporter.com/go/19980?t=2&akid=37532%2E3422442%2E_9QGuO)**).
We’ll be honest, after our last debate, we didn’t see the bump in poll numbers that we hoped.
Last time, we set a goal of $50,000, but this time we need to be even more ambitious. **If we meet our $100,000 goal, we’ll have the resources to plus up our ads amplifying Katie’s standout debate moments.**
**[Can you make a donation of $5 today to help us prepare for the debate and make sure we have the resources to run ads amplifying Katie’s performance?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240212-2?refcode=em20240212-37532&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37532_3422442__9QGuO&akid=37532%2E3422442%2E_9QGuO)**
Thanks so much,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240212-37532&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=37532_3422442__9QGuO&akid=37532%2E3422442%2E_9QGuO)**

clean_body: After our last debate, we didn’t see the bump in poll numbers that we would have hoped. Derek, Tonight, Katie takes the stage in San Francisco for the second California Senate candidate debate (). We’ll be honest, after our last debate, we didn’t see the bump in poll numbers that we hoped. Last time, we set a goal of $50,000, but this time we need to be even more ambitious. If we meet our $100,000 goal, we’ll have the resources to plus up our ads amplifying Katie’s standout debate moments. Thanks so much, Team Katie Porter Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.
