name: David Trone
subject: Celebrating Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78886162/454768099/-405871460?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2U0MDAwZi1lY2M5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pVlbZqAHc1QpzI5uoNMed64bVdpNkUxumP9c-7EpLg0=&emci=72ecbde0-b6c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=23e4000f-ecc9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=25681160) Peter – Black History Month is an especially great time to celebrate the contributions and accomplishments of Black Americans. But we cannot celebrate this month without also recognizing the injustice and inequality that Black Americans experience in this country. Maryland's history with slavery, Jim Crow, and, now, mass incarceration shows that we’ve still got big changes to make to ensure a better future. From touring Black Wall Street to hosting a panel on Re-entry and Small Businesses and visiting the Park Heights Community Health Alliance, I’m committed to uplifting the people and businesses that call our beloved state home. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78886163/454768127/1326195835?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2U0MDAwZi1lY2M5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pVlbZqAHc1QpzI5uoNMed64bVdpNkUxumP9c-7EpLg0=&emci=72ecbde0-b6c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=23e4000f-ecc9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=25681160) Economic justice is essential to revitalizing and strengthening Maryland. We need to reinvest in Baltimore and ensure that the communities that have called it home for generations can thrive and grow. I have spent my time as a businessman and Congressman providing solutions by supporting equal economic opportunity, voting for bills that reform our racist criminal justice system, and getting resources to those who need them. [**I hope you’ll join us this month in uplifting Black-owned businesses, Black leaders, and the fight for racial equity. If you’re looking for a place to donate to or volunteer at, the NAACP is headquartered right here in Baltimore and would love your support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78886164/454768128/1326195835?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2U0MDAwZi1lY2M5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pVlbZqAHc1QpzI5uoNMed64bVdpNkUxumP9c-7EpLg0=&emci=72ecbde0-b6c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=23e4000f-ecc9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=25681160) | [LEARN MORE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78886165/454768129/-405871460?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2U0MDAwZi1lY2M5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pVlbZqAHc1QpzI5uoNMed64bVdpNkUxumP9c-7EpLg0=&emci=72ecbde0-b6c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=23e4000f-ecc9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=25681160)

In solidarity,
David
Mitch McConnell's super PAC is preparing to spend hundreds of millions to flip the Senate in 2024, and we need to be ready to fight back with everything we've got.

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Here's the link:

body:
Hi there, it's Marcy.
I know you're busy, so I'll make this quick. We're doing everything we can to win for the Heartland in November — but our district is one of the top GOP targets in the nation, and we can't do it alone.
Friend, so much hangs in the balance this year: our Great Lakes environment, our investments in rebuilding the Heartland, our work to lower healthcare costs and prescription drug prices, and our fight to finally create an economy that puts working people first.
**Can I count on you to help support this work? For a grassroots campaign like ours, even a small donation makes a big difference. name: Sen. Rosen
subject: Friend, I'm the most vulnerable woman in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
what would you do in my situation?
| | |
---
Friend – I don’t like reaching out like this, but what would _you_ do in my situation?
**Right now, I’m the most vulnerable woman in the Senate, and experts predict that Nevada could deliver both the White House AND the Senate to Republicans this year.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78886359/454768840/2128632416?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3439-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTcyOTE3OC1lY2M5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rBWt8MkLGiy8Gfw65LpE71BIfbCpU8iPUHDSSiZsBRQ=)
With so much riding on my critical battleground race in Nevada and polling showing me neck and neck with my GOP opponent, I have **_no choice_** but to call on top supporters like you for help.
Let me be clear: Missing _any_ of my fundraising deadlines at this stage could cause irreversible damage to my campaign’s momentum. **And right now, there are just _hours left_ to make up a $1,083 gap on our critical $20,000 midnight goal before our midnight fundraising deadline.**
**Please, friend, we can’t just stand by and let Republicans pour money into Nevada until it flips red: ****[_Will you chip in $5 – or as much as you can spare today – to help me fight back and keep Nevada and our Senate blue?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78886363/454768846/2128632416?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3439-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTcyOTE3OC1lY2M5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rBWt8MkLGiy8Gfw65LpE71BIfbCpU8iPUHDSSiZsBRQ=)**

name: Mazi Pilip
subject: Breaking News: New York special election declared

body:
My name is Mazi Pilip- I’m the GOP candidate in the NY special election
My name is Mazi Pilip- I'm the GOP candidate in the NY special election

| |
---
| | | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/AMljsWC_O8PBMpUEEtDUQA~~/AARclAA~)
---

Friend,

I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress.

My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short!

I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared.

If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority.

I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family.

Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed.

They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things.

And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials.

They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative.

And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them.

The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me.

---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/AMljsWC_O8PBMpUEEtDUQA~~/AARclAA~)
---

I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/AMljsWC_O8PBMpUEEtDUQA~~/AARclAA~)
---

Early voting begins in just a few days. That makes this the most important race in the nation right now.

I hope you'll step up & stand with me today to defeat the Democrats & hold the House Majority.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/AMljsWC_O8PBMpUEEtDUQA~~/AARclAA~)
---

And if I can ever help you the way you've helped me, please just say the word.

All the best,

Mazi Melesa Pilip
GOP Nominee
Special Election NY-03

If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority. I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family. Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed. They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things. And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials. They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative. And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them. The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me. | I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line. | | Early voting begins in just a few days. I hope you'll step up & stand with me today to defeat the Democrats & hold the House Majority. | | And if I can ever help you the way you've helped me, please just say the word. name: Chrissy
subject: I carry my dad's values with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78886716/454770235/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWExNmVkZi1lZGM5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4qMk96-UhALN0n9xiVHSOXUlNg0eb-aHX_TFXd-qADI=&emci=54826547-90c7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=59a16edf-edc9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=21278485)
---
Derek, my father was born in Poland. When he was just 4 years old, he came to the United States as a Holocaust survivor and refugee of World War II.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78886717/454770237/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk956-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWExNmVkZi1lZGM5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4qMk96-UhALN0n9xiVHSOXUlNg0eb-aHX_TFXd-qADI=)
**To this day, I carry the values he has passed on to me. He dedicated his life to service to others, and always stressed the value of a good education.** That's why he got a Regents Scholarship to Columbia University and became an aviator in the U.S. Navy. His story is one of hard work and determination – of perseverance through the worst of human cruelty and violence.
In my work in Congress, I look to him for inspiration –**so, as the first Democrat in Chester County to hold a national seat in more than 165 years, I'm not going to let the GOP replace me with a far-right challenger who would inevitably be a rubber stamp on the chaos and harmful policies of Republicans in Washington.** We've got A LOT of work to do if we want to defend our progress in November. Here's where things stand:
**FIRST:** The GOP rallied their millionaire donors to target key Democratic seats like mine across the country.
**THEN:** Not one, not two, but THREE Republicans launched their campaigns to take my seat.
**NOW:** If we can't gather enough resources to resist the GOP's attacks, we'll risk losing this seat and all of the incredible progress we've made.
Derek, I've dedicated my service in the House to making life better for all Pennsylvanians. I do this for my family and yours. **But right now, with so much up against us, I'm counting on this team to make sure we can continue this progress in 2024 and beyond.**
**To continue powering my campaign against my GOP opponents, we set a goal to raise $1,000 by our mid-month deadline. Missing this goal today could cost us _everything._ So please: [Will you chip in $5, $25, whatever you're able to before midnight so that we can reach this goal and defend our seat and the future of PA-06? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78886718/454770238/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk956-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWExNmVkZi1lZGM5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4qMk96-UhALN0n9xiVHSOXUlNg0eb-aHX_TFXd-qADI=)**

name: Mucarsel-Powell, Debbie
subject: Rick Scott knows he is more vulnerable than ever before
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
He's calling me a liar every chance he gets.
| | |
---
Listen, I need you to hear this: My opponent, Rick Scott, has already spent $3 MILLION running attack ads.
Not only has he spent more than any other GOP Senate candidate so far, he's calling me a liar every chance he gets. He just went on the record to say that I lied about his stance on abortion.**Let me make this clear:** _Rick Scott voted for a 15-week national abortion ban._ **I am unapologetically pro-choice, and his accusations don't scare me. I will always fight to protect reproductive freedom.** His spending and his blatant attempts to smear me and this campaign might look like a sign of strength at first glance. But that couldn't be farther from the truth.
**In reality, Rick Scott is terrified. Honestly, I don't blame him — polling shows our team in the lead, and experts at CNN just ranked Florida as one of the most likely Senate seats to flip blue.**

Scott knows that he's more vulnerable than ever before. Last time around, he had to outspend his Democratic opponent by $50 MILLION to just barely win this seat — that race came down to just 10,033 votes. Now, he's trying to pull the same trick again in a desperate last-ditch effort to save his campaign. We can't let him get away with it: **[_So, friend, if you have anything extra to spare today, will you chip in to help us win in Florida and defend Democrats' Senate majority?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78886760/454770317/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk791-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTdhMTZlZGYtZWRjOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=16ZpuO32Q0VF6DciUUYNNJUwPm6QMcVIfbSH0oXBlQc=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78886762/454770319/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk791-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTdhMTZlZGYtZWRjOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=16ZpuO32Q0VF6DciUUYNNJUwPm6QMcVIfbSH0oXBlQc=)
---
| | [DONATE $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78886764/454770321/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=jtk791-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTdhMTZlZGYtZWRjOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=16ZpuO32Q0VF6DciUUYNNJUwPm6QMcVIfbSH0oXBlQc=)

| | [DONATE $50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78886766/454770323/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=jtk791-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTdhMTZlZGYtZWRjOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=16ZpuO32Q0VF6DciUUYNNJUwPm6QMcVIfbSH0oXBlQc=)

| | [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78886768/454770325/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk791-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTdhMTZlZGYtZWRjOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=16ZpuO32Q0VF6DciUUYNNJUwPm6QMcVIfbSH0oXBlQc=)
---
Listen, friend, we cannot let these attacks go unanswered. He is lying, and he is spreading disinformation.
Rick Scott knows that he can't win this race by telling the truth about his record. He built his fortune as the CEO of a hospital chain convicted of what the Justice Department called the largest Medicare fraud scheme ever. He made off with millions, pled the Fifth, and faced no consequences. Now, he's pushing a far-right agenda that would ban abortions, raise taxes on working families, and end Social Security and Medicare.
My story is different. As a teen immigrant from Ecuador, I fought hard to create my own American dream. In high school, I worked early morning shifts to help my family afford rent for our one room apartment.
I studied hard to earn a scholarship that made college possible for me and dedicated my career to public service. Eventually, I ran for Congress, flipped a battleground district blue, and became the first South American immigrant elected to the House. In Congress, I fought tirelessly to expand Medicare access, lower the cost of living, end gun violence, and protect families like yours.
**I've spent my life giving back to the communities that gave me so much and fighting to protect the opportunities that made my story possible. Rick Scott has spent his career getting rich and leaving working families behind. That's why I'm running for Senate to defeat him — because Floridians will suffer if he wins six more years.**
**But every day that we allow these ads to go unanswered, his lies and disinformation are reaching more and more voters, undermining our message, and jeopardizing our campaign. We've got to fight back, and I can't do that without your help:[So I'm personally asking — if you've made it this far, will you please chip in $5 to help us tell the truth about Rick Scott's record and flip Florida blue? clean_body: He's calling me a liar every chance he gets. | | | Listen, I need you to hear this: My opponent, Rick Scott, has already spent $3 MILLION running attack ads. Not only has he spent more than any other GOP Senate candidate so far, he's calling me a liar every chance he gets. He just went on the record to say that I lied about his stance on abortion.Let me make this clear: Rick Scott voted for a 15-week national abortion ban. I am unapologetically pro-choice, and his accusations don't scare me. I will always fight to protect reproductive freedom. His spending and his blatant attempts to smear me and this campaign might look like a sign of strength at first glance. But that couldn't be farther from the truth. In reality, Rick Scott is terrified. Honestly, I don't blame him — polling shows our team in the lead, and experts at CNN just ranked Florida as one of the most likely Senate seats to flip blue. Scott knows that he's more vulnerable than ever before. Last time around, he had to outspend his Democratic opponent by $50 MILLION to just barely win this seat — that race came down to just 10,033 votes. Now, he's trying to pull the same trick again in a desperate last-ditch effort to save his campaign. We can't let him get away with it: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Listen, friend, we cannot let these attacks go unanswered. He is lying, and he is spreading disinformation. Rick Scott knows that he can't win this race by telling the truth about his record. He built his fortune as the CEO of a hospital chain convicted of what the Justice Department called the largest Medicare fraud scheme ever. He made off with millions, pled the Fifth, and faced no consequences. Now, he's pushing a far-right agenda that would ban abortions, raise taxes on working families, and end Social Security and Medicare. My story is different. As a teen immigrant from Ecuador, I fought hard to create my own American dream. In high school, I worked early morning shifts to help my family afford rent for our one room apartment. I studied hard to earn a scholarship that made college possible for me and dedicated my career to public service. Eventually, I ran for Congress, flipped a battleground district blue, and became the first South American immigrant elected to the House. In Congress, I fought tirelessly to expand Medicare access, lower the cost of living, end gun violence, and protect families like yours. I've spent my life giving back to the communities that gave me so much and fighting to protect the opportunities that made my story possible. Rick Scott has spent his career getting rich and leaving working families behind. That's why I'm running for Senate to defeat him — because Floridians will suffer if he wins six more years. But every day that we allow these ads to go unanswered, his lies and disinformation are reaching more and more voters, undermining our message, and jeopardizing our campaign. We've got to fight back, and I can't do that without your help:= | | = With immense gratitude, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

body:
Despite our opponent's massive war chest and deep political connections, our campaign won the endorsement from the Monmouth County Democrats. And that upset the well-connected political machine.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78886817/454770583/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTk0OTY2ZC1lZWM5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gtJ67j7lELAxCSVIM92ulwKx6szCSg5NxaJMe_-k97w=&emci=a548da81-e7c9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=ce94966d-eec9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=26261389)

| | Over the weekend, despite our opponent's massive war chest and deep political connections, our campaign won the endorsement from the Monmouth County Democrats. **And that upset the well-connected political machine.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78886818/454770584/-1197072038?refcode=2024-02-12-convention&recurring=&amount=13&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=ce94966d-eec9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTk0OTY2ZC1lZWM5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gtJ67j7lELAxCSVIM92ulwKx6szCSg5NxaJMe_-k97w=) **According to**** _Insider NJ_****,****the political bosses are prepared to "go to war" with our people-powered campaign because they are "livid" with us winning this massive endorsement.** It's clear who the grassroots, everyday people are choosing in this primary: A new poll showed us with a double-digit lead despite our opponent's endless war chest and political connections. **The people of New Jersey don't want to be told who to vote for, they want to change our broken politics.** Here's the truth, though: One of Insider NJ's sources said, "Once the big machine counties kick in... Tammy will be fine." Our opponent is heavily relying on the political machine and her well-connected friends – along with her endless war chest of campaign cash – to carry her over the finish line. **It shouldn't be up to the "powers that be" to choose our elected representatives. Call me old-fashioned but I still believe in "Government of the people, by the people, for the people."** We're up against a lot. That's why we need to raise $150,000 before the end of the quarter to start building our voter turnout operations and make sure our message isn't drowned out by my opponent's big money and the political machine backing her. [**So I'm asking for your support today. Peter,
**Imagine someone who brazenly stormed the Capitol, attempting to topple our democracy, now sitting on your child's school board.** It's happening. Kimberly Dragoo, a self-confessed participant in the January 6th insurrection, is not alone. Numerous insurrectionists are now eyeing roles in our children's schools.
Three years have passed since that dark day when our democracy faced an unprecedented assault. Alarmingly, the very individuals involved in that chaos are now quietly positioning themselves in educational roles, seeking to influence and control the future of our nation.
This year, tens of thousands of school board seats across the country are at stake. Right-wing extremists, flush with funding, are backing these insurrectionists' campaigns, aiming to infiltrate and reshape our schools.
Public education is not just a pillar of society; it's the bedrock of our democratic values. We cannot stand idly by and watch these extremists erode the principles we hold dear. We need you, Peter, to step up and join us in this crucial fight.
[_**Will you chip in $3, $20, or more as a testament to our collective strength and commitment to preserving our democratic ideals? clean_body: Peter, I’m about to ask you to renew your official 2024 Democratic Membership with $15 before midnight. But first, please let me explain why donations from our members are so important. This election is our historic opportunity for Democrats to take back the House. | | | = = Extreme MAGA Republicans are out of control. They’ve raked in millions to unseat us for exposing their plans to impose a nationwide abortion ban and cut funding to Social Security and Medicare. They’ve peddled dangerous conspiracy theories. They’ve coddled serial fraudsters like Rudy Giuliani and George Santos. Enough is enough. = = = = = = I’m so proud of our incredibly strong track record. House Democrats are: – Bringing manufacturing jobs back home – Investing in our communities and keeping Americans safe – Protecting Social Security and Medicare benefits for our seniors We will continue to build upon the work that has been done to move America forward – not from the top down, but from the middle out and the bottom up. And that’s what we as House Democrats intend to do For The People – but we need you by our side. That’s why I’m counting on seeing your name on our list of 2024 Democratic Members. | = = | = = | = = Keep the faith, Hakeem Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor. Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats. Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. Is there any way you could chip in to help? = We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. name: Rep. Salazar
subject: There are socialists in America.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
| | | Fellow American, the socialist squad makes me absolutely sick. They’re trying to take away every last one of your rights and liberties. _**Let me be clear: I've seen where this road leads, and it's not good.**_ My family escaped Communist Cuba to gain their FREEDOM in the United States. name: Ted Cruz
subject: I won’t take much of your time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Ted Cruz here.

While Lizzie doesn’t make a big deal about her birthday, I know it’d mean a lot to her to hear from you and to know she has your support. [_**Will you sign Lizzie’s birthday card?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78887318/454772134/2102097702?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzc3MDBkZC1mMGM5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0dW0KGSXKfNFVP9-KfFW1tkg0-C7gHXx9o3h-8-NqLw=&emci=fc436740-bdc9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=137700dd-f0c9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=30230943)
As Political Director, I can tell you firsthand how important your support and engagement are for our campaign—especially with about one week until early voting starts in Texas and roughly three weeks until primary day.
There is so much at stake in the 2024 elections, and Lizzie and our team are working every day to ensure we not only win our race in #TX07 but also flip the House and win other important elections across Texas and the country.
[_**Knowing you will be with us every step of the way is the best birthday present you can give Lizzie today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78887319/454772135/2102097702?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzc3MDBkZC1mMGM5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0dW0KGSXKfNFVP9-KfFW1tkg0-C7gHXx9o3h-8-NqLw=&emci=fc436740-bdc9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=137700dd-f0c9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=30230943)
Thanks!
Collin

Lizzie’s birthday just so happens to coincide with Galentine’s Day, and [_**what better way to celebrate than by showing your support for a strong pro-choice woman on the ballot in 2024?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78887320/454772136/527283927?refcode=lpfe240212bday_active&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzc3MDBkZC1mMGM5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0dW0KGSXKfNFVP9-KfFW1tkg0-C7gHXx9o3h-8-NqLw=)

subject: Up on the airwaves

body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=1060%2E52803%2E4xkGvm)

| | I wanted to officially share the news, Peter: **Our brand-new TV ad is on the air, and we need to make sure it stays there.** [****](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10553?t=11&amount=25&akid=1060%2E52803%2E4xkGvm)**Before I get into the details on why this is such an important moment for our Democratic campaign, I have to ask:[Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can ASAP to help us hit our $50,000 TV Ad Fund goal? ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10553?t=12&amount=25&akid=1060%2E52803%2E4xkGvm)** | | | [DONATE](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10553?t=13&amount=25&akid=1060%2E52803%2E4xkGvm)
---
Getting ads like this one on the airwaves helps us reach folks across Maryland in a dynamic and impactful way.
_Especially_ now that Larry Hogan has jumped into the race to flip Maryland red, **we need to show every single Marylander exactly what we stand for: choice, equality, and a better future for working families.**
We need our voices heard, not drowned out. But if we don’t have the funds to keep our ad running, _I’m afraid that’s exactly what will happen._
It doesn’t help that I have one opponent who has spent nearly $30 million trying to buy the airwaves and another opponent who's Mitch McConnell’s "best recruit," and backed by the full force of out-of-state Republican billionaires.

**But I’m not a millionaire,****Peter, so instead, I’m counting on this grassroots team to keep us competitive in this fight.**
**[Please, will you rush $25 or more to reach our $50,000 TV Ad Goal before midnight tonight? The stakes have never been higher in our battleground Senate race. ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10553?t=14&amount=25&akid=1060%2E52803%2E4xkGvm)**
_If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._

name: Adam Schiff
subject: My second debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
| Folks - I’m hours away from the second U.S. Senate debate, and I'm really excited to take the stage and talk about the issues we face here in California and around the country. Since we launched this Senate campaign, I've had the privilege of connecting with so many of you and listening to your stories. Your hopes, your needs, and your vision for a brighter future have guided me every step of the way on this campaign journey. **Tonight, undecided voters will tune in, and I want to make sure I can explain why I am the best candidate to tackle the challenges we face.** From addressing the affordability crisis to defending our democracy, I know I’m the right candidate to get things done in the Golden State. [Before I take the stage tonight, I’m hoping you will show your support and chip in a split donation of $3 between DASS PAC and my campaign. body:
The rule of law in our country is teetering on a knife’s edge

| | | [ ](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkT-vnDAQxD-N6Xwya7CPggIJ0d3TKU1Ka88snPP8BxmTU759RHJPadPO7M7ot_v9Zm7ovIvrBwbqczB5N3FD86CVF8rZLY7m2oCAhgvgNRio5l51oK91RX2thdZaX3VdPXtorZDSoriCtNAuGjqltOwezUwtzbpy_ZkjoAYAAdBdWqm6RgjZStmpTrWsEZm24-GdxRjwR8qu_LpEKpXvn6VsO5MDg4nBtJM9Ml1eLmaaLzYFBhN63D8x7nxJmUdnP_mDVmefDKYNeT488bRwjy8mp6MEE2h2R2BypIDOZ4oFPQN1Wns6siUmx_tgPu6DuQ9vw2LY0K2RyfGLxZxVf5vMWZIWjy_-szb3wcS3_m8_xUKxMDnOKWKht1wsk-O3G_CvUAYKQzr-TEZkoPIJnF1cmRxLPqjK_by9nPduV5o1Yj0ZzkNU5f_e-DsAAP__2FujYQ)
---
**I’m terrified for my son's future.**

_Because the rule of law in our country is teetering on a knife’s edge._

Police are openly beaten in the streets, illegal immigrants violate our laws freely, and defending yourself is enough to be thrown in **PRISON.**

That’s the #1 reason I’m running for Congress in Alaska’s ONLY House seat - to SAVE our country before it’s too late.

My name is Nick Begich. You likely haven’t heard of me before, but I’m a father, a husband, a faithful Christian, and a conservative pro-Trump Republican.

And my race is the most **HOTLY** contested in the nation.

Why? Because Democrats know it’s where they are most vulnerable. Alaska’s House seat is THE most Republican district in the country to have a Democrat representative, and the D.C. Swamp is doing ANYTHING to keep her in power.

They know that if I flip this seat **RED** , I’ll put the brakes on their RADICAL agenda in Congress.

clean_body: The rule of law in our country is teetering on a knife’s edge | | | I’m terrified for my son's future. Because the rule of law in our country is teetering on a knife’s edge. Police are openly beaten in the streets, illegal immigrants violate our laws freely, and defending yourself is enough to be thrown in PRISON. That’s the #1 reason I’m running for Congress in Alaska’s ONLY House seat - to SAVE our country before it’s too late. My name is Nick Begich. You likely haven’t heard of me before, but I’m a father, a husband, a faithful Christian, and a conservative pro-Trump Republican. And my race is the most HOTLY contested in the nation. Why? Because Democrats know it’s where they are most vulnerable. Alaska’s House seat is THE most Republican district in the country to have a Democrat representative, and the D.C. Swamp is doing ANYTHING to keep her in power. They know that if I flip this seat RED , I’ll put the brakes on their RADICAL agenda in Congress. That’s why Democrats have already raised over $71,000,000 to destroy my chances in November. | Please, don’t let that happen. | | | | PAID FOR BY ALASKANS FOR NICK BEGICH PO BOX 671710 CHUGIAK, AK 99567 Republican Majority PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1971%2E552475%2EqwqS5s)
Peter, my Finance Director, Taylor, reached out to give me an update. Take a look:
| | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
Senator, since our opponent outraised us, we’ve been working hard to see how we can close the gap heading into 2024. I’ve crunched the numbers with the team and if we can hit our goal for February, it’ll make a big difference. Could you reach out to some of our top supporters with a personal ask to help? Every dollar counts right now. Thank you! Taylor
Thanks for the update, Taylor. I’ll send a note today. Bob
Peter, with the Senate majority hinging on Pennsylvania, we’re going to need resources to fight back — but my opponent, Mitch McConnell, and GOP super PACs are doing everything in their power to defeat me, and a recent poll shows this race tightening. That’s why I’m asking for your support today.

clean_body: Rep. Summer Lee's AIPAC-linked challenger reportedly told donors at a closed-door fundraiser that she wants Republican voters to temporarily re-register as Democrats so they can vote in the Democratic primary this April (against Summer). | | | This is troubling, Peter. Rep. Summer Lee's AIPAC-linked challenger reportedly told donors at a closed-door fundraiser that she wants Republican voters to temporarily re-register as Democrats so they can vote in the Democratic primary this April (against Summer).1 In 2022, AIPAC spent over $4 million on ads claiming Summer Lee "wasn't a real Democrat." Now, they're gearing up to spend millions on a challenger who is planning to leverage Republican megadonors and Republican voters to take down a progressive in a Democratic primary. We can’t let AIPAC-backed candidates like this win with cynical strategies like this — in Pennsylvania or anywhere. ** Republican donors and right-wing lobbying groups like AIPAC want to keep Summer out of Congress because she stands up for her constituents and won’t back down to special interests. Summer has proven herself a working-class champion who fights for what working people need and isn’t afraid to stand up and speak out against injustice — whether it’s happening here, at the southern border, or in Gaza. That’s why they spent millions to defeat her in 2022, and why they’re gearing up to spend even more against her in dark money attacks this year. They might have the billionaires and extremists on their side — but we have people power on ours. In solidarity, Team WFP Source: 1\. , The Intercept, February 1, 2024. Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Greg Casar
subject: What is Ken Paxton smoking?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREG CASAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
Ken Paxton is waging a war on marijuana decriminalization.
Ken Paxton is waging a war on pot, Peter.
More than 8 in 10 Texans support legalizing marijuana, either for medical or recreational purposes.
But that hasn’t stopped Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton from using his office and taxpayer dollars to try to block meaningful marijuana reforms.**In fact, Ken Paxton recently launched a lawsuit to block FIVE cities in Texas from effectively decriminalizing marijuana.**
So what is Ken Paxton smoking?
As a City Council member in Austin, I fought to end all arrests and citations for personal marijuana use. We should be using valuable taxpayer resources to promote justice and safety, we shouldn’t spend your money to chase everyday people down for low-level marijuana use.
The policy I authored has been incredibly successful for years, and it has been implemented in a number of cities since. But now, Ken Paxton wants to take us back to a time where hundreds of people in places like Austin and Killeen were arrested every year for simple low-level marijuana possession.
We can’t let that happen. Can you join us in fighting back?
[**Can you chip in $10, $20, or whatever you can to help us fight back against Ken Paxton’s war on pot? Help us remind Ken Paxton, Greg Abbott, and Republicans in the Texas legislature that marijuana legislation is POPULAR—and they’ll pay the price for standing in the way of meaningful marijuana reform. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78888771/454777404/-166231455?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmUyMDNkNC1mNGM5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UYFtkc0jEsTRpXJBDbdJ6Vu3YqK1KZ2Zi6TM8Xl64Ds=)

Fellow American,

Our border is insecure, millions of aliens are brazenly streaming across it, the federal government is doing nothing about it, and apparently, neither is Congress?!

The Republican-controlled House just **FAILED** to impeach Secretary of Homeland Security Alejandro Mayorkas, who, second to Joe Biden, is responsible for this disaster.

Mayorkas’s ONE JOB is to keep our country secure. Not only _can’t_ he do that... **he won’t!** _He REFUSES to!_

Tragically for our country, some Republicans in Congress voted against impeaching Mayorkas this week and removing him from office.

[**It’s time for new leadership in Washington that will get things done**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c74f9b267d6a4465a17ba8f37d55d2c2&_e=izMa8DiUboNZqAZWtMXGlTwrpAMrftVdD1aWzXzNX-MIjoI6n2E74_6fMhHA8Y4DV8tLXcucTsmfeE8MBvvIPpaz5NnIx4M-S-3iMlaINcgO77BmPVVdfj95w4kxlbsGoiaVtw59pGRKBDMvNn3S6lFVbBN10wWUbsJThGPcyP1hMym02tBLybERxtY5VFFZOIVTz18xHtX3Prd3XmfPDreBIvXWSMdufmIFGP-67OOIaY2BL1UQ2g_Jdbh4xA_v-SBRusbpBsg0oN4AhnuKvuZwDc0bKxwfCaAfaAkb-P6UwQYJFcE487aA9wnRVs7xM_07JhRh-fBMRsYBtjb0R7kHGLEmWW8W5vtL7Yl9E6eaglWXm4FczWUQw-5XEtKeUcEgXGrNKJkgE4U-Cv_sqw%3D%3D), starting with securing our border and stopping illegal immigration once and for all!

I’m the only candidate in this race who has authored and passed anti-illegal immigration legislation in Arizona. I’m ready to take the fight to Washington, DC!

Securing our border is my top priority, and I need your help to win this seat in AZ-8 and get to Congress so we actually have leaders there _**_who will do their jobs!_**_

[**Will you stand with me and chip in with a donation of $15 or more to support our campaign?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c74f9b267d6a4465a17ba8f37d55d2c2&_e=izMa8DiUboNZqAZWtMXGlTwrpAMrftVdD1aWzXzNX-MIjoI6n2E74_6fMhHA8Y4DV8tLXcucTsmfeE8MBvvIPpaz5NnIx4M-S-3iMlaINcgO77BmPVVdfj95w4kxlbsGoiaVtw59pGRKBDMvNn3S6lFVbBN10wWUbsJThGPcyP1hMym02tBLybERxtY5VFFZOIVTz18xHtX3Prd3XmfPDreBIvXWSMdufmIFGP-67OOIaY2BL1UQ2g_Jdbh4xA_v2MY3_0I6GhjxfcpveN59P_mEqItLu1njYHD-OoF7yZ1kEh2o3T5zh0ExYGMkgaDf-hLRqGiMFiuLkMK1pmTK94zMAS9tEL_AuNpJKyqS_IGlcLHeaUx_DLOXa333WIls72kQj11Zm1J7J1idJ0EacQ%3D%3D)

| **ABOUT BEN TOMA
**
Ben Toma’s family legally immigrated to the United States when he was just 9 years old. His family fled the dangers of communism at the time in Romania to seek freedom and build a new life here in America.

Ben is a small business owner and real estate broker, served on the Peoria City Council, and was appointed to the Arizona State House of Representatives in 2017. In 2018, Toma was elected in his own right and was quickly elevated to leadership roles by his peers. In the legislature, Toma authored and passed two landmark pieces of conservative legislation that were labeled “impossible” by both friend and foe.

First was the historic “flat tax” law bringing economic relief to working families and small businesses; to date, this was the single largest tax cut in Arizona’s history. Second, he was the author of, and instrumental in passing, the “biggest school choice victory in U.S. history” better known as universal Empowerment Scholarship Accounts. These ESAs allow parents to make the best decisions for their children’s education.

In 2023, Ben Toma was elected Speaker of the Arizona House of Representatives.

Peter,

If you’re fortunate enough to know a Marine, you know we carry our identity as a Marine with us to the grave.

My service in the United States Marine Corps was a life-changing commitment, and it has continued to shape mine as I have returned to civilian life.

**Even now, as I’m fighting to win a seat in the United States Congress, I’m doing so with Honor, Courage and Commitment.**

I don’t back down from a fight, and when there is a fight, I make sure I’m there first.

When I saw my city suffering from economic hardship and rampant crime due to poor leadership, I took on an entrenched & well-funded incumbent and won election as Mayor.

Now, I see the country that I served to protect suffering from the exact same crises _and worse_ , [**so I’m jumping into the fight to fix it.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6faa82cd4aa64772a79d086469a18ad6&_e=8cjTudhpOLLzXtNPQRBwxzclsfnucegqtMonogRXtT8y8VplVpeH63FoFW536-pC8rgq_7wkRY4ae_2MlWfleHqeFqGG51o6mTD35nGwbPwe6X5s9CH7C7qCxA_jCER90WVUZ6pcoawCDnao-g9cZqrFZ3aq1QBygwJE21a4eifR4kIRx7-inZWfB73yEnMTbPmKma4ilNQQT6z8EhQdFwosvZH6YNuT0KV2WxJ2EhDdlNdzmylAeZEj6B3Ez195s_AHz-VMNYz-HnfysdDbPrIowD5FPi4lUx2mtiPTmGepnNIpYR5tY17Y9L05DhyFx80mcazmvAvT_y-FcWGSbLhN02iISHrOeqf7dnAiD8zolyIQrDaMTbGDQf_I3ww_)

[ ** SEND A MARINE TO CONGRESS ➞ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6faa82cd4aa64772a79d086469a18ad6&_e=8cjTudhpOLLzXtNPQRBwxzclsfnucegqtMonogRXtT8y8VplVpeH63FoFW536-pC8rgq_7wkRY4ae_2MlWfleHqeFqGG51o6mTD35nGwbPwe6X5s9CH7C7qCxA_jCER90WVUZ6pcoawCDnao-g9cZqrFZ3aq1QBygwJE21a4eifR4kIRx7-inZWfB73yEnMTbPmKma4ilNQQT6z8EhQdFwosvZH6YNuT0KV2WxJ2EhDeUlK3Acs7zFDmj7HZiqbUTC2S3YaU3x4-OXAniZHeINjMDOeILL6Q0fLfs3B7J4R2cPaTkU0OALDJ3CbvAnfE4nWIH0feYJT9mKXCMj_JOH5xd0g76NFbfbuPnnJ68_rC_MEqTVdc6iijIdLhj5xk)
**But no Marine goes into battle alone** , which is why I need your support in my fight to win one of the most competitive Congressional seats on the ballot in 2024 – California’s 9th District.

[**Will you send a Marine and conservative patriot to Congress by chipping in anything you can to my campaign today?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6faa82cd4aa64772a79d086469a18ad6&_e=8cjTudhpOLLzXtNPQRBwxzclsfnucegqtMonogRXtT8y8VplVpeH63FoFW536-pC8rgq_7wkRY4ae_2MlWfleHqeFqGG51o6mTD35nGwbPwe6X5s9CH7C7qCxA_jCER90WVUZ6pcoawCDnao-g9cZqrFZ3aq1QBygwJE21a4eifR4kIRx7-inZWfB73yEnMTbPmKma4ilNQQT6z8EhQdFwosvZH6YNuT0KV2WxJ2EhCsah17iUp7PUqDcBu7pph7sYNDQkIpLvpvtxEvtuSbTqXpX26zAEenVCrzHJovSeT2DQbTL83mDUsliopFkiPq86UZU2Ua9iY5F4fIFvQxH3UdkSzE55mwodqfmhtMvhuA3AgKABy9yA4dx-vcJCPL)

Our current leadership has failed to secure our borders and compromised our national security; they’ve allowed drugs & crime to take over our communities; they’ve been reckless spenders – driving up our national debt and burdening families with out-of-control inflation; they’ve abandoned our military & veterans; and they’ve made our nation weaker.

**It’s the work of politicians, and it’s time we relieved them of their duties.**

I need your help to win this seat so we have leaders in Washington who will serve our country and our people, instead of their own agendas.

You trust our Marines to protect our nation. _Will you trust one to help save it?_ [**Please join my campaign today with a contribution of any amount, and let’s take our country back!**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6faa82cd4aa64772a79d086469a18ad6&_e=8cjTudhpOLLzXtNPQRBwxzclsfnucegqtMonogRXtT8y8VplVpeH63FoFW536-pC8rgq_7wkRY4ae_2MlWfleHqeFqGG51o6mTD35nGwbPwe6X5s9CH7C7qCxA_jCER90WVUZ6pcoawCDnao-g9cZqrFZ3aq1QBygwJE21a4eifR4kIRx7-inZWfB73yEnMTbPmKma4ilNQQT6z8EhQdFwosvZH6YNuT0KV2WxJ2EhAM4A9QUJm46mm9RzqppXsnkZMeLncNoAos6a1j5Gcy89Jmk4wcScuubuEfcJlNEC_6tosu6Sx1FaZMUAg-DHGIDJD-nsO_W9H0Aa2hz1ElxDLN3vr1XLBvQhnTs4ZR7Mu7pWbJPVs4aRWSS1dRWyh6)

Kevin Lincoln

| **Meet Kevin Lincoln
**
My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran.

Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader.

I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78889003/454778395/1993432125?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-02-12_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjBmOWEzNDEtZjZjOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qVLqrXNV4FF1nT75edptito_vHduI8CvDNFqYhaGA9A=)

| Peter,

I know you hear a lot from our campaign about our fundraising efforts and all the work we need to do to build a winning campaign, but what you don’t see as much is the behind-the-scenes work I am doing now to lay a strong foundation for 2025.

Up until November 2025, I will be traveling throughout the Commonwealth, engaging in conversations with voters, meeting community leaders, and leaving no stone unturned in my efforts to earn Virginians' votes.

As I’ve traveled, I can feel the enthusiasm among Virginia residents. It’s clear that Virginia is ready for change and is ready for a leader who will bring people together.

body:
In the Biden Family
|

| [ ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=80e7b46ce28145449feb67b91f7b7d83&_e=UfP7xJ7O4Hxq5Yd_3i4NYwaxayEQj63eOHshVNkaIaQmAP76lbGrfKHR39L5_Nf5wja81O9A97PJw-UcudSSwQtnFmtJ490fQFJElCW6wVJ9QJD43GbmlxROML0OlOokbE31RS3VV3Dt9a8AXh-Rfsh_pbPkrJ630Nn_1tuda1mdd92jTlas_QaGkMcmzJiR5-QO8Lavnnb706WRlEB3i9iAu_W5fHg0TPkSG7ZL4qjKsANIbzj0XKZ3PPhF_esHPYjV3e2B4Zhbqy38tEAub9ZK3WlCZ4hvIwbJLGuNlXgOAAUNzi3puk2WSgptUQuuKJP1XKGRjuyCE5JCrWSWO9a8-AWv1eTXQMN_7Mlh5Yhyek7amoucgElN3LulpvJm)
---
Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con*spir*a*cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=80e7b46ce28145449feb67b91f7b7d83&_e=UfP7xJ7O4Hxq5Yd_3i4NYwaxayEQj63eOHshVNkaIaQmAP76lbGrfKHR39L5_Nf5wja81O9A97PJw-UcudSSwQtnFmtJ490fQFJElCW6wVJ9QJD43GbmlxROML0OlOokbE31RS3VV3Dt9a8AXh-Rfsh_pbPkrJ630Nn_1tuda1mdd92jTlas_QaGkMcmzJiR5-QO8Lavnnb706WRlEB3i9iAu_W5fHg0TPkSG7ZL4qja8HjN0NOR6U_doS9xN9h4acUOqtjzW8u7XO8NEyYWfPwWfntxF-QRC796Mur18NQkxMRJeRlFDoYyHRgyR4H_txFXeR8Axfyb2lU7my_cZq_xlj-sxOg-5uADzrbOIAqmiN5eufc4qcP6wn9FmoMC)
---
It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight.**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=80e7b46ce28145449feb67b91f7b7d83&_e=UfP7xJ7O4Hxq5Yd_3i4NYwaxayEQj63eOHshVNkaIaQmAP76lbGrfKHR39L5_Nf5wja81O9A97PJw-UcudSSwQtnFmtJ490fQFJElCW6wVJ9QJD43GbmlxROML0OlOokbE31RS3VV3Dt9a8AXh-Rfsh_pbPkrJ630Nn_1tuda1mdd92jTlas_QaGkMcmzJiR5-QO8Lavnnb706WRlEB3i9iAu_W5fHg0TPkSG7ZL4qiUbdccs76CBYKjDfZdKUQeTNN3XHqx_kh45tuk6dw7mBubbKQ_rv9T3rMkK4E4OgpUeC7mBsJzjmvI26VAzu-XJFrvlNinu4HxbFF14vuKxWqjrN9sxmtauSAHnYoBYms9kdd7XwQx5HExNfh1Fclk)
---
I've only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I'm once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY.

clean_body: In the Biden Family | | Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years. For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE! While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. CONSPIRACY NOUN conspiracy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family. | It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight. | I've only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I'm once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY. As Theodore Roosevelt said "Nothing worth having is easy" and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, it 's the promise of America to all of her citizens. | - With Courage, James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee | | | | | | | | Paid for by Comer for Congress**

I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con*spir*a*cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The first $6,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $3,300/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $3,300/$5,000 for the general election. The next $41,300/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $510,000/$255,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.
A contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant by contacting contact@joebiden.com. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. Biden Victory Fund does not accept contributions from corporations or their PACs, unions, federal contractors, national banks, those registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA, SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies, or foreign nationals.

I’m glad to reach you fellow conservative. It’s Coach Tommy Tuberville.

As you may know, I enjoyed a long career in college football – it’s where I honed my skill in spotting winners – and today I am proud to represent Alabama in the U.S. Senate.

Today, I’m writing to share my _COMPLETE AND TOTAL ENDORSEMENT_ in one of the most important 2024 U.S. Senate races, in the great state of Ohio.

**Bernie Moreno is a successful businessman, a proven leader, and a conservative political outsider who will help lead the fight against the Washington swamp after we flip this seat on November 5th.** I’m proud to stand with Bernie – and so is President Trump.

Right now, Bernie is locked in a heated primary race with less than 40 days to go.

**Will you[rush critical support](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f95620ef07b24d0dba913d46bf654215&_e=zqCbrj-gCo0vINf6txsEm72mtZwlps_Zikpea0YCnmw1D7cUMSPyTx3w8hvPwAbXS6W8IlxuYZOt8kmwLrIn_hbpykXuzY3sQqdTElUTrSSoxqIKJcvzTBz1l-Fbv65McWl_0s89qkEBq9d3_sV9stdOG1l3QVNCdfiJAi5WVZ9IToAHv0mLLwlqT8ANR00Jieb8c2jpyBr6daKtgts5yF_WiVX3OwlNhlsrQRWSMuklRlEyX9Un9hgPQ-0M45qEupdcBt4GJubjb1Y__AKfU-55gN6Yfw5g1lh_YLtTqBDWSkxbkPTEklbiQojIjUebV1WykKypxGf766hSZNMJx3UYKW-Q--sViNdIL50P9bjnPuOcXjIuLp2sUw9q5adEAsV3KUxYO7-lFwp_jHskl3SF67odQsiEfy-KjBAmY4E%3D) to fuel our fight for MAGA VICTORY this fall?**

This is one of the three 2024 Senate races rated a “Toss Up” by the political pundits at The Cook Political Report. It could absolutely decide control of the U.S. Senate.

_And let me tell you,_we need conservative fighters in the Senate now more than ever!__

Bernie Moreno has lived the American Dream and he’s running to help restore and protect it for our children, our grandchildren, and future generations to come.

President Trump won Ohio in 2016 and 2020. I firmly believe he’ll win it again this year, and I firmly believe we need a committed MAGA conservative as our Republican Senate candidate to defeat entrenched Democrat incumbent Sherrod Brown.

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

[ ** Join Bernie ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f95620ef07b24d0dba913d46bf654215&_e=zqCbrj-gCo0vINf6txsEm72mtZwlps_Zikpea0YCnmw1D7cUMSPyTx3w8hvPwAbXS6W8IlxuYZOt8kmwLrIn_hbpykXuzY3sQqdTElUTrSSoxqIKJcvzTBz1l-Fbv65McWl_0s89qkEBq9d3_sV9stdOG1l3QVNCdfiJAi5WVZ9IToAHv0mLLwlqT8ANR00Jieb8c2jpyBr6daKtgts5yF_WiVX3OwlNhlsrQRWSMuklRlEyX9Un9hgPQ-0M45qEtUkRpD19274wWZUXvsuAihayne4t6-S3odr1g6vpUyuvdAqBLB3UBlEgpaw2siA-mcZfiOIZac6uVo3K_BwWcrFn4CBDL2PyYlVLHPhW0NyH1rO8qZNG0LV0QOPd-VwafuZBpAIca89xGpuJYMp89Vdag3mq4RDV2ur0_qGPXP4%3D)

This is her first time facing re-election in Congress.

| Peter, I want to talk to you about my friend Valerie Foushee, the Congresswoman for North Carolina’s 4th District.

Valerie was first elected to Congress in 2022, which means this year, she’s facing her first bid for re-election.

[_**Valerie needs the help of dedicated Democratic supporters like you to get her first congressional re-election campaign off to a strong start. Will you split a contribution between her campaign and mine?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78889858/454781297/-507492141?refcode=BLU_EM_VFC_2024-02-12_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Yjc5N2Y3Mi1mYWM5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YeZP5GfJEmFzEJasSvGboagOkZgnW1ZRc16DbIR7PrY=)

I recently joined Valerie on the campaign trail because I know she’s the right person for the job and she’s an indispensable champion for our values in Congress.

Born and raised in Orange County, North Carolina, Valerie’s parents worked multiple jobs to make ends meet for their family of eight and Valerie was in segregated schooling until sixth grade. Valerie takes the lessons and values she’s learned growing up **–** justice, equality, and opportunity for all **–** with her to work every day.

Valerie is a champion for fair wages, good-paying job opportunities, access to affordable health care, and women’s right to choose. I’ve worked with her directly to protect voting rights, end partisan gerrymandering, and advance new gun violence prevention measures.

While this is Valerie’s first time facing re-election to Congress; she’s won tough races before **–** including becoming the first Black woman elected to the Orange County Board of Commissioners and serving North Carolinians in the General Assembly **–** and I know she can do it again in 2024.

[_**But she needs our help. Please split any amount you can between Valerie’s campaign and mine.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78889860/454781299/-507492141?refcode=BLU_EM_VFC_2024-02-12_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Yjc5N2Y3Mi1mYWM5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YeZP5GfJEmFzEJasSvGboagOkZgnW1ZRc16DbIR7PrY=)

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

clean_body: This is a must-win “Toss Up” race – we need Bernie to lead the way >>> | | ** PROUD TO ENDORSE BERNIE MORENO Let’s Flip Ohio RED This November! I’m glad to reach you Peter. It’s Coach Tommy Tuberville. As you may know, I enjoyed a long career in college football – it’s where I honed my skill in spotting winners – and today I am proud to represent Alabama in the U.S. Senate. Today, I’m writing to share my COMPLETE AND TOTAL ENDORSEMENT in one of the most important 2024 U.S. Senate races, in the great state of Ohio. Bernie Moreno is a successful businessman, a proven leader, and a conservative political outsider who will help lead the fight against the Washington swamp after we flip this seat on November 5th. I’m proud to stand with Bernie – and so is President Trump. Right now, Bernie is locked in a heated primary race with less than 40 days to go. Will you to fuel our fight for MAGA VICTORY this fall? This is one of the three 2024 Senate races rated a “Toss Up” by the political pundits at The Cook Political Report. It could absolutely decide control of the U.S. Senate. And let me tell you,we need conservative fighters in the Senate now more than ever! Bernie Moreno has lived the American Dream and he’s running to help restore and protect it for our children, our grandchildren, and future generations to come. President Trump won Ohio in 2016 and 2020. I firmly believe he’ll win it again this year, and I firmly believe we need a committed MAGA conservative as our Republican Senate candidate to defeat entrenched Democrat incumbent Sherrod Brown. _Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78889944/454781422/768541956?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTc5N2Y3Mi1mYWM5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vNuKW_igJ-IbGsoVskD1WpxFkrEDg7_3IPuVlhNYXOs=)
Friend, **The Supreme Court is on the verge of making a crucial decision that could lead to a nationwide ban on mifepristone, a key drug used in medical abortions.** Even states where safe abortion care is legal are in jeopardy of this upcoming decision. Less than two years after the Supreme Court's far-right majority overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , we are faced with another critical juncture that could further limit access to safe and legal abortion care. **We cannot back down at this moment. We’re thrilled to share some incredible news with you — a recent NBC News poll has shown that a remarkable 34% of voters can see themselves supporting our campaign!
The fact that a significant portion of voters believe in our vision and can envision us as leaders is _a testament to the hard work and dedication of _each and every one of you__.
Make no mistake, this news isn’t just glimmer of hope for our campaign; it's a beacon of possibility, shining brightly on the path to victory.
[It means we can win this thing!!](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=34_2_12_24_non_donor_1&n=3)

The poll reaffirms what we've known all along: that there is a real hunger for substantive leadership to heal the partisan divisions that have plagued our political landscape for far too long.
Our message of hope, unity, and progress is clearly striking a chord with voters across the nation. _And with your continued support, I'm confident that we can harness this momentum to propel our campaign to victory in the upcoming election._
Today, we are launching a renewed fundraising push to ensure that we have the necessary resources to turn these poll numbers into votes on election day.
[DONATE NOW](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=34_2_12_24_non_donor_1&n=5)
We need your help to capitalize on this surge. Your contribution, no matter the size, will make a real difference in our efforts to reach more voters, spread our message, and build the kind of future we all believe in.
[Will you join us in turning this excitement into action by making a donation today?](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=34_2_12_24_non_donor_1&n=6)
Thank you for your unwavering belief in our movement and for your continued support. _We can’t do any of this without you._

clean_body: We can win this! | | | | | Dear Peter, We’re thrilled to share some incredible news with you — a recent NBC News poll has shown that a remarkable 34% of voters can see themselves supporting our campaign! The fact that a significant portion of voters believe in our vision and can envision us as leaders is a testament to the hard work and dedication of each and every one of you. Make no mistake, this news isn’t just glimmer of hope for our campaign; it's a beacon of possibility, shining brightly on the path to victory. The poll reaffirms what we've known all along: that there is a real hunger for substantive leadership to heal the partisan divisions that have plagued our political landscape for far too long. Our message of hope, unity, and progress is clearly striking a chord with voters across the nation. And with your continued support, I'm confident that we can harness this momentum to propel our campaign to victory in the upcoming election. Today, we are launching a renewed fundraising push to ensure that we have the necessary resources to turn these poll numbers into votes on election day. We need your help to capitalize on this surge. Your contribution, no matter the size, will make a real difference in our efforts to reach more voters, spread our message, and build the kind of future we all believe in. Thank you for your unwavering belief in our movement and for your continued support. We can’t do any of this without you. Team Kennedy P.S. | to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Derek —
In just a short while, Adam is going to take the debate stage for the second televised debate of this U.S. Senate primary.
**[Before he takes the stage, will you show your support for his vision for California’s future by pitching in $10 or any amount?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240212_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=4&akid=5454%2E5257348%2ElR4sJq)**
Last debate, celebrity GOP candidate Steve Garvey refused to admit whether he supports Donald Trump but previously voted for him twice.
He ducked and dodged Adam’s repeated attempts to get him to answer the question.
That tells us all we need to know about him: **his refusal to condemn Trump after _everything_ the disgraced former president has done is reason enough for him to not be in the U.S. Senate.**
After the insurrection on January 6th. After refusing to accept election results and undermining our democratic institutions. After _91 criminal indictments_ , many of which came as a result of Adam’s investigations.
**Derek, Steve Garvey would be a rubber stamp for Trump’s agenda in the U.S. Senate. And that’s what Adam is going to cover in the debate tonight.**
**[If you’re with Adam, please chip in before he takes the stage tonight. Rush in $10 now.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240212_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=5&akid=5454%2E5257348%2ElR4sJq)**
