name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkU1v3CAQQH8NvtmCgbXXBx9W2a5UVamiXnpEGMYOCh_WgFvl31dOnZ57hTdPejM_n_Wz8cGn9buJOL1Z0lR0MtpY3xIGv7Zlp1_4LjRwUC2HVoCGxk1utL3pG5zEwIfhyoeral4ntGIecRHK8Z6rUfXusszOXK6jVVw41fjp8HAQAJIrDp0cDQwDh4ucAa9WMcVNQKrdG-Jmc1oJSyHc9jl4a1Jnc2zC9FrrVpi8MXgweORlQSqdiUgHYzMlpFJzwi7TyuDxUeLzXtrgZ6T6flYd4_Kx16itiZvxa2Ly_g8-2U-0P7iSd7LI5H2jXDa01af1_Iro_B6ZvGM0PpyPNqeKqTJ5f7m1355-tJ_5DPq_Lm2zO4S3p6_HSr68cC4amtz224fgSz8wxdfD-JFe__tGfwIAAP__qhGc2g)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkU1v3CAQQH8NvtmCgbXXBx9W2a5UVamiXnpEGMYOCh_WgFvl31dOnZ57hTdPejM_n_Wz8cGn9buJOL1Z0lR0MtpY3xIGv7Zlp1_4LjRwUC2HVoCGxk1utL3pG5zEwIfhyoeral4ntGIecRHK8Z6rUfXusszOXK6jVVw41fjp8HAQAJIrDp0cDQwDh4ucAa9WMcVNQKrdG-Jmc1oJSyHc9jl4a1Jnc2zC9FrrVpi8MXgweORlQSqdiUgHYzMlpFJzwi7TyuDxUeLzXtrgZ6T6flYd4_Kx16itiZvxa2Ly_g8-2U-0P7iSd7LI5H2jXDa01af1_Iro_B6ZvGM0PpyPNqeKqTJ5f7m1355-tJ_5DPq_Lm2zO4S3p6_HSr68cC4amtz224fgSz8wxdfD-JFe__tGfwIAAP__qhGc2g) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkU1v3CAQQH8NvtmCgbXXBx9W2a5UVamiXnpEGMYOCh_WgFvl31dOnZ57hTdPejM_n_Wz8cGn9buJOL1Z0lR0MtpY3xIGv7Zlp1_4LjRwUC2HVoCGxk1utL3pG5zEwIfhyoeral4ntGIecRHK8Z6rUfXusszOXK6jVVw41fjp8HAQAJIrDp0cDQwDh4ucAa9WMcVNQKrdG-Jmc1oJSyHc9jl4a1Jnc2zC9FrrVpi8MXgweORlQSqdiUgHYzMlpFJzwi7TyuDxUeLzXtrgZ6T6flYd4_Kx16itiZvxa2Ly_g8-2U-0P7iSd7LI5H2jXDa01af1_Iro_B6ZvGM0PpyPNqeKqTJ5f7m1355-tJ_5DPq_Lm2zO4S3p6_HSr68cC4amtz224fgSz8wxdfD-JFe__tGfwIAAP__qhGc2g)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkU1v3CAQQH8NvtmCgbXXBx9W2a5UVamiXnpEGMYOCh_WgFvl31dOnZ57hTdPejM_n_Wz8cGn9buJOL1Z0lR0MtpY3xIGv7Zlp1_4LjRwUC2HVoCGxk1utL3pG5zEwIfhyoeral4ntGIecRHK8Z6rUfXusszOXK6jVVw41fjp8HAQAJIrDp0cDQwDh4ucAa9WMcVNQKrdG-Jmc1oJSyHc9jl4a1Jnc2zC9FrrVpi8MXgweORlQSqdiUgHYzMlpFJzwi7TyuDxUeLzXtrgZ6T6flYd4_Kx16itiZvxa2Ly_g8-2U-0P7iSd7LI5H2jXDa01af1_Iro_B6ZvGM0PpyPNqeKqTJ5f7m1355-tJ_5DPq_Lm2zO4S3p6_HSr68cC4amtz224fgSz8wxdfD-JFe__tGfwIAAP__qhGc2g)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.
---
|
---

subject: 🎉 Endorsement Alert: Rep. Rick Green for Lt. Col. Flippo🎉
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee To Elect David Flippo]( "Paid for by The Committee To Elect David Flippo")
body:
Buckle up for some electrifying news! |
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=f06433e19d&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| Peter,

I am thrilled to share some exhilarating news directly from our campaign's heart – Rick Green, a respected Conservative, former Texas State Representative, and constitutional advocate, has officially endorsed our campaign for Nevada’s 4th Congressional District!

Rick Green, a prominent figure in promoting America's constitutional heritage, shared his endorsement **with these powerful words:**

_“I am proud to officially announce my endorsement of a true American Patriot, Lt. Col. David Flippo. I have known David for some time and I can honestly say that he is fighting for Nevada and is fighting for America. David is the best choice for our country and will never back down from our enemies, both domestic and abroad. David Flippo will defend our constitutional rights as your next Congressman, just as he defended your rights as a Lt. Col. in the United States Air Force. He has dedicated his life to our country, and I am so proud to be on his team as we work to FLIP NEVADA RED!” -**Rick Green**_
_[But have you endorsed me yet?](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=25fcd9dcf3&e=273c9a71fb)_ This endorsement is not just a testament to our campaign's momentum; it’s a validation of our shared values and commitment to preserving the Constitution. Rick Green's support amplifies our message of strong, principled leadership and our dedication to the core American values of liberty and justice.
---
| [JOIN OUR CONSTITUTIONAL CRUSADE](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=dc316979be&e=273c9a71fb "JOIN OUR CONSTITUTIONAL CRUSADE")
---
| Your support, Peter, , has never been more critical. In the spirit of this endorsement, let’s rally together to further our cause. Whether through donating, volunteering, or simply spreading the word, your involvement is crucial in turning our vision into reality.

Together, with the backing of constitutional champions like Rick Green and patriots like you, we are forging a path to victory. Let’s stand united for a future that honors our heritage, defends our freedoms, and upholds the principles that make America great.

Thank you for standing with us in this crucial journey. Your support, coupled with endorsements from dedicated Americans like Rick Green, is the cornerstone of our success.
---
| | For Strong Leadership and Small Government,

name: Andrew Hughes
subject: Help take a stand against cancel culture
body:
Dr. Carson asked me to reach out to Americans who want what’s best for our country

|
---
| | | [](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyM0U-LHCEQBfBPY9-60Sq3nTn0YchkIIcNS1jIURwtewT_NGqTrx86Ows57tnfe_Cs36_61YQY8vrTJFp67bo2nY02NozWZEtxtHvsqIGDHDmMAjQMbpEKHM4DLUJxpU7ihHx4LGcJgu6G38mjlNLPL0p5tICEp7ObX4awHD0cBAAKLuRkzl4ieg5cSX9ylkluItXepv6gStt-j8Ga3MmkyZY0xOXR-9YYXhjcGNyK91TbZBLVw9lSM9XWS6ap1JXB7b8Re6Vxi-RWOrJ423vS1qTNhDUzvH7IJ_x084Fa2aslhtetlraR7SGvz6dELuyJ4ZWSCZHB_GG1Le4IXL79AOTw_Y1z8UzYkjvlzvD6dhnff72Pnz8y1MVtf0KMoc2KSb4ejf9G968e5m8AAAD__yQdlpg)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

Dr. Carson asked me to reach out to Americans who want what's best for our country, to help him take a stand against "cancel culture." It's tearing our country apart and needs to be stopped.

This is something he has experienced firsthand.

As you may have heard, this past November the Detroit School Board voted to change the name of the Benjamin Carson High School of Science and Medicine. Why? Because the School Board was mad that Dr. Carson was part of the Trump Administration!

These educational leaders - who should be acting as role models for our kids - instead decided to create a huge political spectacle by "canceling" Dr. Carson and trying to erase his amazing achievements as a doctor, as a leader, and as a citizen. It's really outrageous.

Dr. Carson is disappointed by this - not because he wants any glory but because it sets a bad example ... for the kids at this school, and for the entire country.

"Cancel culture" tells young people and all Americans that you shouldn't listen to those with whom you disagree and try to find common ground; you should just stigmatize them and erase them.

The Left probably expected Dr. Carson to lash out at the Detroit School Board and his political opponents - hurl some insults, call people names, keep the fight going.

But instead, Dr. Carson said to our team here at the American Cornerstone Institute (ACI):

_" What if we use this as an opportunity to rally people across the country to speak out against cancel culture? To show America that we have a better path forward for our country than hate and division?"_

And that's exactly what we're doing. It's why Dr. Carson launched ACI in the first place - to lead the way for what's best for our country.

And we've created a way for you to stand with Dr. Carson and make your voice heard. Just click the link below; it will take you to our **National Statement Against Cancel Culture** that you can review and then co-sign.

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyM0U-LHCEQBfBPY9-60Sq3nTn0YchkIIcNS1jIURwtewT_NGqTrx86Ows57tnfe_Cs36_61YQY8vrTJFp67bo2nY02NozWZEtxtHvsqIGDHDmMAjQMbpEKHM4DLUJxpU7ihHx4LGcJgu6G38mjlNLPL0p5tICEp7ObX4awHD0cBAAKLuRkzl4ieg5cSX9ylkluItXepv6gStt-j8Ga3MmkyZY0xOXR-9YYXhjcGNyK91TbZBLVw9lSM9XWS6ap1JXB7b8Re6Vxi-RWOrJ423vS1qTNhDUzvH7IJ_x084Fa2aslhtetlraR7SGvz6dELuyJ4ZWSCZHB_GG1Le4IXL79AOTw_Y1z8UzYkjvlzvD6dhnff72Pnz8y1MVtf0KMoc2KSb4ejf9G968e5m8AAAD__yQdlpg)

Dr. Carson is getting asked about the Detroit school incident quite a bit, and when he answers he wants to speak for Americans who are heartbroken by what cancel culture is doing to our country - who want this divisiveness and vitriol to end! I think you're just such an American.

And when you and thousands of concerned citizens like you sign this Statement, Dr. Carson will be able to keep speaking from the heart against cancel culture - knowing that he's broadcasting a message that is important to his fellow Americans.

He can say ... "Enough is enough! I'm fed up with cancel culture, and so are folks everywhere who love America and want what's best for the country."

If that's a message you want Dr. Carson to share on your behalf, please take a moment now to be part of ACI's **National Statement Against Cancel Culture**. Here's the link again for you:

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyM0U-LHCEQBfBPY9-60Sq3nTn0YchkIIcNS1jIURwtewT_NGqTrx86Ows57tnfe_Cs36_61YQY8vrTJFp67bo2nY02NozWZEtxtHvsqIGDHDmMAjQMbpEKHM4DLUJxpU7ihHx4LGcJgu6G38mjlNLPL0p5tICEp7ObX4awHD0cBAAKLuRkzl4ieg5cSX9ylkluItXepv6gStt-j8Ga3MmkyZY0xOXR-9YYXhjcGNyK91TbZBLVw9lSM9XWS6ap1JXB7b8Re6Vxi-RWOrJ423vS1qTNhDUzvH7IJ_x084Fa2aslhtetlraR7SGvz6dELuyJ4ZWSCZHB_GG1Le4IXL79AOTw_Y1z8UzYkjvlzvD6dhnff72Pnz8y1MVtf0KMoc2KSb4ejf9G968e5m8AAAD__yQdlpg)

Amid all the divisiveness and polarization that has been injected into our policy debates, Dr. Carson is proud of the work ACI is doing to encourage Americans to come together despite our differences and find ways to take on the challenges that face our country.

I hope you'll join Dr. Carson in this important work. Thank you!

Sincerely,

Andrew D. Hughes
Executive Director & CEO
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2024 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

The Republican Team

Just click the link below; it will take you to our National Statement Against Cancel Culture that you can review and then co-sign. Dr. Carson is getting asked about the Detroit school incident quite a bit, and when he answers he wants to speak for Americans who are heartbroken by what cancel culture is doing to our country - who want this divisiveness and vitriol to end! I think you're just such an American. And when you and thousands of concerned citizens like you sign this Statement, Dr. Carson will be able to keep speaking from the heart against cancel culture - knowing that he's broadcasting a message that is important to his fellow Americans. He can say ... "Enough is enough! I'm fed up with cancel culture, and so are folks everywhere who love America and want what's best for the country." If that's a message you want Dr. Carson to share on your behalf, please take a moment now to be part of ACI's National Statement Against Cancel Culture. Here's the link again for you: Amid all the divisiveness and polarization that has been injected into our policy debates, Dr. Carson is proud of the work ACI is doing to encourage Americans to come together despite our differences and find ways to take on the challenges that face our country. I hope you'll join Dr. Carson in this important work. Thank you! Sincerely, Andrew D. Hughes Executive Director & CEO American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2024 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. The Republican Team PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

subject: Does something feel ... different?
body:
|
#
Hi Peter, Does something feel... different about this month? We think we might know why, and it’s because this leap year, February is a short month — 2 days shorter than January! When it comes to ensuring we can stay the course to defend our Senate majority, just two days can make or break our monthly fundraising goals. And that’s two days that Mitch McConnell and MAGA Republicans are counting on us to let our guard down. _But there's good news, Peter._ Thanks to this incredible grassroots team, we’ve crunched the numbers, and all it takes to make up the difference is a few extra donations **of just $1**. _Yes, just $1._ **[Because while Republicans have right-wing mega-donors, our strength is in the number of grassroots supporters who make up our incredible team. Friend,

Well, it's official.

I feel lower than a gopher hole.

So low I couldn't even jump over a dime.

We didn't meet our recent fundraising deadline, which doesn't bode well for the rest of this year.

body:
This guy almost makes Benedict Arnold look good
#
Derek:
We’re not much in the business of defending Nikki Haley, but over the weekend Trump made fun of her husband, Michael Haley, for not campaigning with his wife.
One problem: Major Michael Haley is deployed, serving his country.
But Trump wouldn’t understand that. He’ll never understand what it means to serve your country.
He’s too busy selling out our allies — at the same speech, he encouraged Putin to attack NATO members. Said he’d encourage Putin to do whatever the hell he wanted. He is pushing destabilization on a global scale, and the destruction of an alliance that has kept western democracies safe for 75 years.
This guy almost makes Benedict Arnold look good.
From retired Army General Wesley Clark, former Commander of NATO forces during the Kosovo War: _“It’s an appalling statement that could only come from a deranged and twisted mind. I do not say this lightly: A second Trump presidency would put the lives of every American, both in uniform and civilian, at severe risk.”_
It is up to us to make sure that the American people know what Trump is saying and doing.
We can’t count on the media to cover this threat appropriately. The Republican Party is falling in lockstep behind him, with Eisenhower and Reagan rolling in their graves.
This falls on us. So please, we’re depending on your help to get the job done.
**[Chip in to VoteVets today and help us hold Trump accountable for threatening our closest allies. Every American has to know that Trump is ready to sell out our National Security to Putin.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-feb24.mdEg22&refcode=em240212-1-30&t=1&akid=24897%2E3013755%2EIypDIA)**

Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you — no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you’ll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won’t let them win so easily.

[**That’s why I’m reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=eb70fe4273194bbca3c8390df1d70da1&_e=_61FDSnNpjKLVCeT6zdVoQIYpjHAR__ObhBwEenCnzdqNhgEGMyytS55ufDiIfIc_vxiuVDPp3DVrzMBcLXknDtMnIW-A8rXuNDVp8w6apqIs7g0FJNzS56Elz49N3xdwzk5J5qNvlfGj1NJu2OLn63OnzNL0HfcWKHGhYGcFRmi0R0IC3QprIn9NgYNhoGMqWHEq84_FFy1p6u3EdP6u4RVCu1JYyr0BpjKYLO1ZL81CT5yEIMSwHYs9h7KfmOJQ40tija3Wxvdut-M_1K-hEtZtn2vUuvcHfYi1DnDpXAlFlIfxeQ73AAVyna7nziXfxlRHRvcdypyHFO5SRPN14raRgFXxSQGoOwHjOeyIpa_BkAu1R-Y-A3tRFBJqcT0EX7DYKgmuBl33E7AG7HKXg%3D%3D)
The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don’t realize that I’ve been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative.

I’m not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there’s no way I can make it on my own.

The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride.

clean_body: Friend... | Hello... This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend. But I have to be honest with you — no matter how weary I am about opening up. Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you’ll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate. Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won’t let them win so easily. The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don’t realize that I’ve been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative. I’m not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there’s no way I can make it on my own. The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. | Friend, I’m not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That’s why I’m being so candid with you today. I’m not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless, Jim Banks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

subject: I laid out my goals as New Jersey’s next senator:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tammy Murphy for Senate**

If you agree we need action on my priorities — reproductive freedom, health care, climate preparedness, and gun safety — please add your name to personally endorse my campaign today. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78891459/454786104/1354111473?refcode=AU_TMNJ_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20240212_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODdkYjI2MDgtMDBjYS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wCe6OKMtBxZTcCQF_PHmLUIdFl_8hOeVv6t_-eM0x2k=)
---
Hi everyone, I recently sat down with Mosaic to talk about my campaign and my goals as New Jersey’s United States Senator. It was [a terrific conversation worth reading in full here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78891460/454786105/-2012034229?refcode=AU_TMNJ_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20240212_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODdkYjI2MDgtMDBjYS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wCe6OKMtBxZTcCQF_PHmLUIdFl_8hOeVv6t_-eM0x2k=&emci=1cf37445-e7c9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=87db2608-00ca-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=18002451), but if you’re short on time, I’ll take a moment to summarize the four priorities we’re fighting for in this race:
1. **Abortion access and reproductive freedom.** MAGA extremists are working to roll back basic freedoms we’ve known for generations — making abortion illegal everywhere, even in cases of incest and rape. As a woman, as the mother of a daughter, this is completely unacceptable, and I’ll fight it with everything I have.
2. **Health care and affordability.** The lack of affordability, especially within our health care system, is costing New Jerseyans’ their health and lives. From prescription drug prices, to insurance premiums, to the cost of essentials like diapers and formula, we need to bring costs down and fast. New Jersey sends far more money to Washington DC than we get back, and I’ll work to fix that as soon as I’m elected.
3. **Climate change.** I led the charge to make New Jersey the first state to teach climate change in all K-12 schools and prepare our kids for high-paying, green jobs of the future. But we cannot fix the climate on our own, so we need leaders who will make addressing climate change a national priority. The next generations are depending on us.
4. **Gun safety.** NJ has some of the strongest gun safety measures in the country, but there’s little we can do to stop truckloads of weapons from other states crossing state lines. We need to shift the conversation about guns — treating gun violence as a national health emergency — to put common-sense reforms like New Jersey’s into place at the federal level.

My priorities reflect those of the people I’ve met all across New Jersey. They’re common sense, achievable, and wildly popular, but the current dysfunction in Washington is allowing our priorities to be pushed to the wayside. That needs to stop, and this election is a chance to stop it. [**If you agree we need action on these four priorities — reproductive freedom, health care, climate preparedness, and gun safety — please add your name to personally endorse my campaign today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78891461/454786106/-2126796021?refcode=AU_TMNJ_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20240212_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODdkYjI2MDgtMDBjYS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wCe6OKMtBxZTcCQF_PHmLUIdFl_8hOeVv6t_-eM0x2k=&emci=1cf37445-e7c9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=87db2608-00ca-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=18002451) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78891462/454786107/-2126796021?refcode=AU_TMNJ_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20240212_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODdkYjI2MDgtMDBjYS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wCe6OKMtBxZTcCQF_PHmLUIdFl_8hOeVv6t_-eM0x2k=&emci=1cf37445-e7c9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=87db2608-00ca-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=18002451)
---
Together, we’ll secure new leadership for New Jersey in Washington, and we will fight hard for the overdue change New Jerseyans need. Please add your name if you’re with me.
Thank you,
Tammy
* * *
Tammy Murphy for Senate
PO Box 378
Maplewood, NJ 07040
United States **[info@tammymurphyforsenate.com](mailto:info@tammymurphyforsenate.com) ** | **Paid for by Tammy Murphy for Senate**
---
**This email was sent to**dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/y_454ezNwkiBGueG09CeTA2?unsubscribedata=IpHrHMHEOBLYpAAe%2Fo0S8RJkNCkwaKVu%2FW9d8Aom8YIN0OMoqxvU5%2F2pQNyuTpJ1imtmWRrFpFqkfzZD4uTrwEpYEAnemFXI395v2ivTVGIDOXECnixjwQRxvBOx7o%2F%2FicMNR1Q4zYc64aBYZQYPqHJ9u0aSfETd%2BVu7MTrNK%2F1Tf73EcFsc%2Bkf8hPEWb3qCmydG1boyEIhOqFqCfynKa%2B7v2ATzOnGsJs7CFZRKdy0zmli4sEygqEhevSYCKhBzQe958NRb1CmhcaL59L1uFq26imnfJdYiEckNBd360pPs%2BA0uZCTT6L9a7vf7Oej4bGiuj0OQztzj9E6Gv6Ry9vi7nfXZQBi3AQh1hQJlUeEr8I8WSQhEfoIv%2B0nQRov2Ub0PR8KIR9YBtKwdgEC5rZNVafU93HOn0eP0%2B5hbyLYx5Yk025PsTEZnXtz75mHx)**
